org.springframework.stereotype.Service;\nimport org.springframework.transaction.annotation.Transactional;\nimport org.springframework.web.client.RestClient;\n\n@Service\npublic class PaymentService {\n\n    private final BookingRepository bookingRepository;\n    private final PaymentRepository paymentRepository;\n    private final BookingItemRepository bookingItemRepository;\n    private final ETicketRepository eTicketRepository;\n    private final StripePaymentService stripePaymentService;\n    private final BookingMapper bookingMapper;\n    private final ETicketMapper eTicketMapper;\n    private final AfterCommitEventPublisher afterCommitEventPublisher;\n    private final BookingRefGenerator bookingRefGenerator;\n    private final SlotSummaryReader slotSummaryReader;\n    private final CartSnapshotReader cartSnapshotReader;\n    private final RestClient restClient;\n\n    public PaymentService(\n        BookingRepository bookingRepository,\n        PaymentRepository paymentRepository,\n        BookingItemRepository bookingItemRepository,\n        ETicketRepository eTicketRepository,\n        StripePaymentService stripePaymentService,\n        BookingMapper bookingMapper,\n        ETicketMapper eTicketMapper,\n        AfterCommitEventPublisher afterCommitEventPublisher,\n        BookingRefGenerator bookingRefGenerator,\n        SlotSummaryReader slotSummaryReader,\n        CartSnapshotReader cartSnapshotReader,\n        @Value(\"${app.internal-base-url:http://localhost:8080}\") String internalBaseUrl\n    ) {\n        this.bookingRepository = bookingRepository;\n        this.paymentRepository = paymentRepository;\n        this.bookingItemRepository = bookingItemRepository;\n        this.eTicketRepository = eTicketRepository;\n        this.stripePaymentService = stripePaymentService;\n        this.bookingMapper = bookingMapper;\n        this.eTicketMapper = eTicketMapper;\n        this.afterCommitEventPublisher = afterCommitEventPublisher;\n        this.bookingRefGenerator = bookingRefGenerator;\n        this.slotSummaryReader = slotSummaryReader;\n        this.cartSnapshotReader = cartSnapshotReader;\n        this.restClient = RestClient.builder().baseUrl(internalBaseUrl).build();\n    }\n\n    @Transactional\n    public CheckoutInitResponse createCheckout(CartAssembledEvent event) {\n        Booking existingBooking = bookingRepository.findByCartId(event.cartId()).orElse(null);\n        if (existingBooking != null) {\n            Payment existingPayment = paymentRepository.findByBookingId(existingBooking.getId()).orElse(null);\n            if (existingPayment != null && (existingPayment.getStatus() == PaymentStatus.PENDING || existingPayment.getStatus() == PaymentStatus.SUCCESS)) {\n                StripePaymentIntentResponse paymentIntent = stripePaymentService.getPaymentIntent(existingPayment.getStripePaymentIntentId());\n                return new CheckoutInitResponse(\n                    event.cartId(),\n                    existingBooking.getBookingRef(),\n                    existingPayment.getStripePaymentIntentId(),\n                    paymentIntent.clientSecret(),\n                    existingPayment.getAmount(),\n                    existingPayment.getCurrency()\n                );\n            }\n        }\n\n        String bookingRef = bookingRefGenerator.nextRef();\n        var slotSummary = slotSummaryReader.getSlotSummary(event.slotId());\n        if (slotSummary == null) {\n            throw new CartItemsFetchException(\"Unable to resolve slot details for cart=\" + event.cartId());\n        }\n        Long eventId = event.slotId();\n        Instant slotStartTime = fetchSlotTiming(event.slotId()).startTime();\n\n        Booking booking = bookingRepository.save(new Booking(\n            bookingRef,\n            event.cartId(),\n            event.userId(),\n            eventId,\n            event.slotId(),\n            slotSummary.orgId(),\n            slotStartTime,\n            event.totalAmountInSmallestUnit(),\n            event.currency()\n        ));\n\n        StripePaymentIntentRequest request = new StripePaymentIntentRequest(\n            event.totalAmountInSmallestUnit(),\n            event.currency(),\n            event.userEmail(),\n            \"Booking \" + bookingRef,\n            \"cart-\" + event.cartId(),\n            Map.of(\n                \"booking_ref\", bookingRef,\n                \"user_id\", String.valueOf(event.userId())\n            )\n        );\n        StripePaymentIntentResponse paymentIntent = stripePaymentService.createPaymentIntent(request);\n\n        Payment payment = new Payment(\n            booking.getId(),\n            paymentIntent.paymentIntentId(),\n            event.totalAmountInSmallestUnit(),\n            event.currency()\n        );\n        paymentRepository.save(payment);\n\n        return new CheckoutInitResponse(\n            event.cartId(),\n            bookingRef,\n            paymentIntent.paymentIntentId(),\n            paymentIntent.clientSecret(),\n            event.totalAmountInSmallestUnit(),\n            event.currency()\n        );\n    }\n\n    @Transactional(readOnly = true)\n    public CheckoutInitResponse getCheckout(Long cartId, Long userId) {\n        Booking booking = bookingRepository.findByCartId(cartId).orElseThrow(() -> new BookingNotFoundException(\"cart-\" + cartId));\n        if (!Objects.equals(booking.getUserId(), userId)) {\n            throw new BookingNotFoundException(booking.getBookingRef());\n        }\n        Payment payment = paymentRepository.findByBookingId(booking.getId())\n            .orElseThrow(() -> new PaymentIntentNotFoundException(\"cart-\" + cartId));\n\n        StripePaymentIntentResponse paymentIntent = stripePaymentService.getPaymentIntent(payment.getStripePaymentIntentId());\n        return new CheckoutInitResponse(\n            cartId,\n            booking.getBookingRef(),\n            payment.getStripePaymentIntentId(),\n            paymentIntent.clientSecret(),\n            payment.getAmount(),\n            payment.getCurrency()\n        );\n    }\n\n    @Transactional(readOnly = true)\n    public BookingResponse getBookingResponse(Long userId, String bookingRef) {\n        Booking booking = bookingRepository.findByBookingRef(bookingRef)\n            .orElseThrow(() -> new BookingNotFoundException(bookingRef));\n        if (!Objects.equals(booking.getUserId(), userId)) {\n            throw new BookingNotFoundException(bookingRef);\n        }\n        return buildBookingResponse(booking);\n    }\n\n    @Transactional\n    public BookingResponse confirmPayment(Long userId, String paymentIntentId) {\n        Payment payment = paymentRepository.findByStripePaymentIntentId(paymentIntentId)\n            .orElseThrow(() -> new PaymentIntentNotFoundException(paymentIntentId));\n        Booking booking = bookingRepository.findById(payment.getBookingId())\n            .orElseThrow(() -> new BookingNotFoundException(payment.getBookingId()));\n\n        if (!Objects.equals(booking.getUserId(), userId)) {\n            throw new BookingNotFoundException(booking.getBookingRef());\n        }\n\n        if (payment.getStatus() == PaymentStatus.SUCCESS && booking.getStatus() == BookingStatus.CONFIRMED) {\n            return buildBookingResponse(booking);\n        }\n\n        StripePaymentIntentResponse stripePaymentIntent = stripePaymentService.getPaymentIntent(paymentIntentId);\n        if (!\"succeeded\".equalsIgnoreCase(stripePaymentIntent.status())) {\n            throw new PaymentNotConfirmedException(stripePaymentIntent.status());\n        }\n\n        payment.markSuccess(stripePaymentIntent.latestCharge());\n        booking.confirm(paymentIntentId, stripePaymentIntent.latestCharge());\n\n        List<CartItemSnapshotDto> cartItems = cartSnapshotReader.getCartItems(booking.getCartId());\n        if (cartItems.isEmpty()) {\n            throw new CartItemsFetchException(\"No cart items found for cart=\" + booking.getCartId());\n        }\n\n        List<Long> seatIds = new ArrayList<>();\n        for (CartItemSnapshotDto cartItem : cartItems) {\n            int quantity = cartItem.quantity() == null || cartItem.quantity() < 1 ? 1 : cartItem.quantity();\n            for (int i = 0; i < quantity; i++) {\n                BookingItem item = bookingItemRepository.save(new BookingItem(\n                    booking.getId(),\n                    cartItem.seatId(),\n                    cartItem.gaClaimId(),\n                    cartItem.ticketClassId(),\n                    cartItem.unitPrice(),\n                    cartItem.currency()\n                ));\n\n                String rawQrData = booking.getBookingRef() + \":\" + item.getId();\n                String encodedQrData = Base64.getEncoder().encodeToString(rawQrData.getBytes(StandardCharsets.UTF_8));\n                ETicket eTicket = new ETicket(\n                    booking.getId(),\n                    item.getId(),\n                    encodedQrData,\n                    \"/tickets/\" + booking.getBookingRef() + \"/\" + item.getId() + \".pdf\"\n                );\n                eTicketRepository.save(eTicket);\n\n                if (item.getSeatId() != null) {\n                    seatIds.add(item.getSeatId());\n                }\n            }\n        }\n\n        afterCommitEventPublisher.publish(new BookingConfirmedEvent(\n            booking.getId(),\n            booking.getCartId(),\n            seatIds,\n            paymentIntentId,\n            booking.getUserId()\n        ));\n\n        return buildBookingResponse(booking);\n    }\n\n    @Transactional\n    public BookingResponse confirmPaymentFromWebhook(String paymentIntentId) {\n        Payment payment = paymentRepository.findByStripePaymentIntentId(paymentIntentId)\n            .orElseThrow(() -> new PaymentIntentNotFoundException(paymentIntentId));\n        Booking booking = bookingRepository.findById(payment.getBookingId())\n            .orElseThrow(() -> new BookingNotFoundException(payment.getBookingId()));\n        return confirmPayment(booking.getUserId(), paymentIntentId);\n    }\n\n    @Transactional\n    public void handleFailure(String paymentIntentId, String failureCode, String failureMessage) {\n        Payment payment = paymentRepository.findByStripePaymentIntentId(paymentIntentId)\n            .orElseThrow(() -> new PaymentIntentNotFoundException(paymentIntentId));\n\n        if (payment.getStatus() == PaymentStatus.FAILED) {\n            return;\n        }\n\n        Booking booking = bookingRepository.findById(payment.getBookingId())\n            .orElseThrow(() -> new BookingNotFoundException(payment.getBookingId()));\n\n        payment.markFailed(failureCode, failureMessage);\n        booking.cancelDueToPaymentFailure();\n"
  }
}

## Entry 157
**Timestamp:** 2026-03-04T21:36:59.262Z
**Role/Type:** response_item
**Content:**
```json
{
  "timestamp": "2026-03-04T21:36:59.262Z",
  "type": "response_item",
  "payload": {
    "type": "function_call_output",
    "call_id": "call_HvN8OKjDhUhAkq8s8ojPrEvc",
    "output": "Chunk ID: fa6d06\nWall time: 0.0512 seconds\nProcess exited with code 0\nOriginal token count: 439\nOutput:\npackage com.eventplatform.bookinginventory.mapper;\n\nimport com.eventplatform.bookinginventory.api.dto.response.CartItemResponse;\nimport com.eventplatform.bookinginventory.api.dto.response.CartResponse;\nimport com.eventplatform.bookinginventory.domain.Cart;\nimport com.eventplatform.bookinginventory.domain.CartItem;\nimport com.eventplatform.bookinginventory.service.CartPricingService.CartPricingResult;\nimport com.eventplatform.shared.common.domain.Money;\nimport java.math.BigDecimal;\nimport java.util.List;\nimport java.util.Map;\nimport org.mapstruct.Mapper;\n\n@Mapper(componentModel = \"spring\")\npublic interface CartMapper {\n\n    default CartResponse toResponse(\n        Cart cart,\n        List<CartItem> items,\n        CartPricingResult pricing,\n        Map<Long, String> tierNames,\n        Map<Long, String> seatNumbers\n    ) {\n        List<CartItemResponse> responses = items.stream()\n            .map(item -> new CartItemResponse(\n                item.getId(),\n                item.getSeatId(),\n                seatNumbers.get(item.getSeatId()),\n                item.getPricingTierId(),\n                tierNames.get(item.getPricingTierId()),\n                item.getQuantity(),\n                item.getBasePrice(),\n                pricing.itemDiscounts().getOrDefault(item.getId(), new Money(BigDecimal.ZERO, item.getBasePrice().currency()))\n            ))\n            .toList();\n\n        return new CartResponse(\n            cart.getId(),\n            cart.getShowSlotId(),\n            cart.getStatus(),\n            cart.getExpiresAt(),\n            cart.getSeatingMode(),\n            responses,\n            pricing.subtotal(),\n            pricing.discount(),\n            cart.getCouponDiscountAmount(),\n            pricing.total()\n        );\n    }\n}\n"
  }
}
```

## Entry 168
**Timestamp:** 2026-03-04T21:37:06.745Z
**Role/Type:** response_item
**Content:**
```json
{
  "timestamp": "2026-03-04T21:37:06.745Z",
  "type": "response_item",
  "payload": {
    "type": "function_call_output",
    "call_id": "call_YRuoGxzWQszLly1nPEhFFsvG",
    "output": "Chunk ID: a109ce\nWall time: 0.0518 seconds\nProcess exited with code 0\nOriginal token count: 1838\nOutput:\npackage com.eventplatform.shared.eventbrite.service;\n\nimport com.eventplatform.shared.eventbrite.dto.request.EbInventoryTierRequest;\nimport com.eventplatform.shared.eventbrite.dto.response.EbInventoryTierResponse;\nimport com.eventplatform.shared.eventbrite.dto.request.EbTicketClassRequest;\nimport com.eventplatform.shared.eventbrite.dto.response.EbTicketClassResponse;\nimport com.eventplatform.shared.eventbrite.exception.EbIntegrationException;\nimport com.fasterxml.jackson.annotation.JsonIgnoreProperties;\nimport com.fasterxml.jackson.annotation.JsonProperty;\nimport java.util.List;\nimport java.util.Map;\nimport org.slf4j.Logger;\nimport org.slf4j.LoggerFactory;\nimport org.springframework.beans.factory.annotation.Qualifier;\nimport org.springframework.http.HttpStatusCode;\nimport org.springframework.stereotype.Service;\nimport org.springframework.web.client.RestClient;\n\n@Service\npublic class DefaultEbTicketService implements EbTicketService {\n\n    private static final Logger log = LoggerFactory.getLogger(DefaultEbTicketService.class);\n\n    private final RestClient client;\n\n    public DefaultEbTicketService(@Qualifier(\"ebRestClient\") RestClient client) {\n        this.client = client;\n    }\n\n    @JsonIgnoreProperties(ignoreUnknown = true)\n    private record TicketClassListResponse(@JsonProperty(\"ticket_classes\") List<EbTicketClassResponse> ticketClasses) {}\n\n    @JsonIgnoreProperties(ignoreUnknown = true)\n    private record InventoryTierListResponse(List<EbInventoryTierResponse> inventoryTiers) {}\n\n    @Override\n    public List<EbTicketClassResponse> createTicketClasses(String eventId, List<EbTicketClassRequest> ticketClasses) {\n        try {\n            log.debug(\"Creating {} ticket class(es) for eventId={}\", ticketClasses.size(), eventId);\n            var results = new java.util.ArrayList<EbTicketClassResponse>();\n            for (EbTicketClassRequest tc : ticketClasses) {\n                EbTicketClassResponse resp = client.post()\n                    .uri(\"/v3/events/{eventId}/ticket_classes/\", eventId)\n                    .body(Map.of(\"ticket_class\", toTicketClassMap(tc)))\n                    .retrieve()\n                    .onStatus(HttpStatusCode::isError, (req, resp2) -> {\n                        throw new EbIntegrationException(\"EB createTicketClass failed: \" + resp2.getStatusCode());\n                    })\n                    .body(EbTicketClassResponse.class);\n                if (resp != null) results.add(resp);\n            }\n            return results;\n        } catch (EbIntegrationException ex) {\n            throw ex;\n        } catch (Exception ex) {\n            throw new EbIntegrationException(\"EB createTicketClasses error: \" + ex.getMessage(), ex);\n        }\n    }\n\n    @Override\n    public List<EbInventoryTierResponse> createInventoryTiers(String eventId, List<EbInventoryTierRequest> tiers) {\n        try {\n            log.debug(\"Creating {} inventory tier(s) for eventId={}\", tiers.size(), eventId);\n            var results = new java.util.ArrayList<EbInventoryTierResponse>();\n            for (EbInventoryTierRequest tier : tiers) {\n                // Eventbrite inventory tiers are created as ticket classes with additional metadata\n                EbInventoryTierResponse resp = client.post()\n                    .uri(\"/v3/events/{eventId}/ticket_classes/\", eventId)\n                    .body(Map.of(\"ticket_class\", Map.of(\n                        \"name\", tier.name(),\n                        \"quantity_total\", tier.quantity()\n                    )))\n                    .retrieve()\n                    .onStatus(HttpStatusCode::isError, (req, resp2) -> {\n                        throw new EbIntegrationException(\"EB createInventoryTier failed: \" + resp2.getStatusCode());\n                    })\n                    .body(EbInventoryTierResponse.class);\n                if (resp != null) results.add(resp);\n            }\n            return results;\n        } catch (EbIntegrationException ex) {\n            throw ex;\n        } catch (Exception ex) {\n            throw new EbIntegrationException(\"EB createInventoryTiers error: \" + ex.getMessage(), ex);\n        }\n    }\n\n    @Override\n    public String copySeatMap(String eventId, String sourceSeatMapId) {\n        try {\n            log.debug(\"Copying seatmap for eventId={} from sourceSeatMapId={}\", eventId, sourceSeatMapId);\n            // Eventbrite seatmap copy endpoint\n            var resp = client.post()\n                .uri(\"/v3/events/{eventId}/\", eventId)\n                .body(Map.of(\"event\", Map.of(\"is_reserved_seating\", true, \"show_pick_a_seat\", true)))\n                .retrieve()\n                .onStatus(HttpStatusCode::isError, (req, resp2) -> {\n                    throw new EbIntegrationException(\"EB copySeatMap failed: \" + resp2.getStatusCode());\n                })\n                .body(Map.class);\n            return sourceSeatMapId; // mock doesn't support seatmap copy; return source ID\n        } catch (EbIntegrationException ex) {\n            throw ex;\n        } catch (Exception ex) {\n            throw new EbIntegrationException(\"EB copySeatMap error: \" + ex.getMessage(), ex);\n        }\n    }\n\n    @Override\n    public EbTicketClassResponse getTicketClass(String eventId, String ticketClassId) {\n        try {\n            return client.get()\n                .uri(\"/v3/events/{eventId}/ticket_classes/{ticketClassId}/\", eventId, ticketClassId)\n                .retrieve()\n                .onStatus(HttpStatusCode::isError, (req, resp2) -> {\n                    throw new EbIntegrationException(\"EB getTicketClass failed: \" + resp2.getStatusCode());\n                })\n                .body(EbTicketClassResponse.class);\n        } catch (EbIntegrationException ex) {\n            throw ex;\n        } catch (Exception ex) {\n            throw new EbIntegrationException(\"EB getTicketClass error: \" + ex.getMessage(), ex);\n        }\n    }\n\n    @Override\n    public List<EbTicketClassResponse> listTicketClasses(String eventId) {\n        try {\n            TicketClassListResponse response = client.get()\n                .uri(\"/v3/events/{eventId}/ticket_classes/\", eventId)\n                .retrieve()\n                .onStatus(HttpStatusCode::isError, (req, resp2) -> {\n                    throw new EbIntegrationException(\"EB listTicketClasses failed: \" + resp2.getStatusCode());\n                })\n                .body(TicketClassListResponse.class);\n            return response == null || response.ticketClasses() == null\n                ? List.of()\n                : response.ticketClasses();\n        } catch (EbIntegrationException ex) {\n            throw ex;\n        } catch (Exception ex) {\n            throw new EbIntegrationException(\"EB listTicketClasses error: \" + ex.getMessage(), ex);\n        }\n    }\n\n    private Map<String, Object> toTicketClassMap(EbTicketClassRequest tc) {\n        var map = new java.util.LinkedHashMap<String, Object>();\n        map.put(\"name\", tc.name());\n        if (tc.price() != null) {\n            // Eventbrite cost format: \"USD,1000\" (currency,cents)\n            long cents = tc.price().amount().multiply(java.math.BigDecimal.valueOf(100)).longValue();\n            map.put(\"cost\", tc.price().currency() + \",\" + cents);\n            map.put(\"free\", cents == 0);\n        }\n        if (tc.quantity() != null) map.put(\"quantity_total\", tc.quantity());\n        return map;\n    }\n}\n"
  }
}
```

DefaultEbTicketService(@Qualifier(\"ebRestClient\") RestClient client) {\n        this.client = client;\n    }\n\n    @JsonIgnoreProperties(ignoreUnknown = true)\n    private record TicketClassListResponse(@JsonProperty(\"ticket_classes\") List<EbTicketClassResponse> ticketClasses) {}\n\n    @JsonIgnoreProperties(ignoreUnknown = true)\n    private record InventoryTierListResponse(List<EbInventoryTierResponse> inventoryTiers) {}\n\n    @Override\n    public List<EbTicketClassResponse> createTicketClasses(String eventId, List<EbTicketClassRequest> ticketClasses) {\n        try {\n            log.debug(\"Creating {} ticket class(es) for eventId={}\", ticketClasses.size(), eventId);\n            var results = new java.util.ArrayList<EbTicketClassResponse>();\n            for (EbTicketClassRequest tc : ticketClasses) {\n                EbTicketClassResponse resp = client.post()\n                    .uri(\"/v3/events/{eventId}/ticket_classes/\", eventId)\n                    .body(Map.of(\"ticket_class\", toTicketClassMap(tc)))\n                    .retrieve()\n                    .onStatus(HttpStatusCode::isError, (req, resp2) -> {\n                        throw new EbIntegrationException(\"EB createTicketClass failed: \" + resp2.getStatusCode());\n                    })\n                    .body(EbTicketClassResponse.class);\n                if (resp != null) results.add(resp);\n            }\n            return results;\n        } catch (EbIntegrationException ex) {\n            throw ex;\n        } catch (Exception ex) {\n            throw new EbIntegrationException(\"EB createTicketClasses error: \" + ex.getMessage(), ex);\n        }\n    }\n\n    @Override\n    public List<EbInventoryTierResponse> createInventoryTiers(String eventId, List<EbInventoryTierRequest> tiers) {\n        try {\n            log.debug(\"Creating {} inventory tier(s) for eventId={}\", tiers.size(), eventId);\n            var results = new java.util.ArrayList<EbInventoryTierResponse>();\n            for (EbInventoryTierRequest tier : tiers) {\n                // Eventbrite inventory tiers are created as ticket classes with additional metadata\n                EbInventoryTierResponse resp = client.post()\n                    .uri(\"/v3/events/{eventId}/ticket_classes/\", eventId)\n                    .body(Map.of(\"ticket_class\", Map.of(\n                        \"name\", tier.name(),\n                        \"quantity_total\", tier.quantity()\n                    )))\n                    .retrieve()\n                    .onStatus(HttpStatusCode::isError, (req, resp2) -> {\n                        throw new EbIntegrationException(\"EB createInventoryTier failed: \" + resp2.getStatusCode());\n                    })\n                    .body(EbInventoryTierResponse.class);\n                if (resp != null) results.add(resp);\n            }\n            return results;\n        } catch (EbIntegrationException ex) {\n            throw ex;\n        } catch (Exception ex) {\n            throw new EbIntegrationException(\"EB createInventoryTiers error: \" + ex.getMessage(), ex);\n        }\n    }\n\n    @Override\n    public String copySeatMap(String eventId, String sourceSeatMapId) {\n        try {\n            log.debug(\"Copying seatmap for eventId={} from sourceSeatMapId={}\", eventId, sourceSeatMapId);\n            // Eventbrite seatmap copy endpoint\n            var resp = client.post()\n                .uri(\"/v3/events/{eventId}/\", eventId)\n                .body(Map.of(\"event\", Map.of(\"is_reserved_seating\", true, \"show_pick_a_seat\", true)))\n                .retrieve()\n                .onStatus(HttpStatusCode::isError, (req, resp2) -> {\n                    throw new EbIntegrationException(\"EB copySeatMap failed: \" + resp2.getStatusCode());\n                })\n                .body(Map.class);\n            return sourceSeatMapId; // mock doesn't support seatmap copy; return source ID\n        } catch (EbIntegrationException ex) {\n            throw ex;\n        } catch (Exception ex) {\n            throw new EbIntegrationException(\"EB copySeatMap error: \" + ex.getMessage(), ex);\n        }\n    }\n\n    @Override\n    public EbTicketClassResponse getTicketClass(String eventId, String ticketClassId) {\n        try {\n            return client.get()\n                .uri(\"/v3/events/{eventId}/ticket_classes/{ticketClassId}/\", eventId, ticketClassId)\n                .retrieve()\n                .onStatus(HttpStatusCode::isError, (req, resp2) -> {\n                    throw new EbIntegrationException(\"EB getTicketClass failed: \" + resp2.getStatusCode());\n                })\n                .body(EbTicketClassResponse.class);\n        } catch (EbIntegrationException ex) {\n            throw ex;\n        } catch (Exception ex) {\n            throw new EbIntegrationException(\"EB getTicketClass error: \" + ex.getMessage(), ex);\n        }\n    }\n\n    @Override\n    public List<EbTicketClassResponse> listTicketClasses(String eventId) {\n        try {\n            TicketClassListResponse response = client.get()\n                .uri(\"/v3/events/{eventId}/ticket_classes/\", eventId)\n                .retrieve()\n                .onStatus(HttpStatusCode::isError, (req, resp2) -> {\n                    throw new EbIntegrationException(\"EB listTicketClasses failed: \" + resp2.getStatusCode());\n                })\n                .body(TicketClassListResponse.class);\n            return response == null || response.ticketClasses() == null\n                ? List.of()\n                : response.ticketClasses();\n        } catch (EbIntegrationException ex) {\n            throw ex;\n        } catch (Exception ex) {\n            throw new EbIntegrationException(\"EB listTicketClasses error: \" + ex.getMessage(), ex);\n        }\n    }\n\n    private Map<String, Object> toTicketClassMap(EbTicketClassRequest tc) {\n        var map = new java.util.LinkedHashMap<String, Object>();\n        map.put(\"name\", tc.name());\n        if (tc.price() != null) {\n            // Eventbrite cost format: \"USD,1000\" (currency,cents)\n            long cents = tc.price().amount().multiply(java.math.BigDecimal.valueOf(100)).longValue();\n            map.put(\"cost\", tc.price().currency() + \",\" + cents);\n            map.put(\"free\", cents == 0);\n        }\n        if (tc.quantity() != null) map.put(\"quantity_total\", tc.quantity());\n        return map;\n    }\n}\n"
  }
}
```

jakarta.persistence.Enumerated;\nimport jakarta.persistence.Table;\nimport java.time.Instant;\n\n@Entity\n@Table(name = \"bookings\")\npublic class Booking extends BaseEntity {\n\n    @Column(name = \"booking_ref\", nullable = false, unique = true)\n    private String bookingRef;\n\n    @Column(name = \"cart_id\", nullable = false)\n    private Long cartId;\n\n    @Column(name = \"user_id\", nullable = false)\n    private Long userId;\n\n    @Column(name = \"event_id\", nullable = false)\n    private Long eventId;\n\n    @Column(name = \"slot_id\", nullable = false)\n    private Long slotId;\n\n    @Column(name = \"org_id\")\n    private Long orgId;\n\n    @Column(name = \"slot_start_time\")\n    private Instant slotStartTime;\n\n    @Enumerated(EnumType.STRING)\n    @Column(name = \"status\", nullable = false)\n    private BookingStatus status;\n\n    @Column(name = \"stripe_payment_intent_id\")\n    private String stripePaymentIntentId;\n\n    @Column(name = \"stripe_charge_id\")\n    private String stripeChargeId;\n\n    @Column(name = \"total_amount\", nullable = false)\n    private Long totalAmount;\n\n    @Column(name = \"currency\", nullable = false)\n    private String currency;\n\n    protected Booking() {\n    }\n\n    public Booking(\n        String bookingRef,\n        Long cartId,\n        Long userId,\n        Long eventId,\n        Long slotId,\n        Long orgId,\n        Instant slotStartTime,\n        Long totalAmount,\n        String currency\n    ) {\n        this.bookingRef = bookingRef;\n        this.cartId = cartId;\n        this.userId = userId;\n        this.eventId = eventId;\n        this.slotId = slotId;\n        this.orgId = orgId;\n        this.slotStartTime = slotStartTime;\n        this.totalAmount = totalAmount;\n        this.currency = currency;\n        this.status = BookingStatus.PENDING;\n    }\n\n    public Booking(String bookingRef, Long cartId, Long userId, Long eventId, Long slotId, Long totalAmount, String currency) {\n        this(bookingRef, cartId, userId, eventId, slotId, null, null, totalAmount, currency);\n    }\n\n    public void confirm(String stripePaymentIntentId, String stripeChargeId) {\n        if (status != BookingStatus.PENDING) {\n            throw new BusinessRuleException(\"Booking cannot be confirmed from state \" + status, \"INVALID_BOOKING_STATE\");\n        }\n        this.stripePaymentIntentId = stripePaymentIntentId;\n        this.stripeChargeId = stripeChargeId;\n        this.status = BookingStatus.CONFIRMED;\n    }\n\n    public void markCancellationPending() {\n        if (status != BookingStatus.CONFIRMED) {\n            throw new BusinessRuleException(\"Booking cannot enter cancellation pending from state \" + status, \"INVALID_BOOKING_STATE\");\n        }\n        this.status = BookingStatus.CANCELLATION_PENDING;\n    }\n\n    public void revertCancellationPending() {\n        if (status == BookingStatus.CANCELLATION_PENDING) {\n            this.status = BookingStatus.CONFIRMED;\n        }\n    }\n\n    public void cancel() {\n        if (status != BookingStatus.CANCELLATION_PENDING) {\n            throw new BusinessRuleException(\"Booking cannot be cancelled from state \" + status, \"INVALID_BOOKING_STATE\");\n        }\n        this.status = BookingStatus.CANCELLED;\n    }\n\n    public void cancelFromConfirmed() {\n        if (status == BookingStatus.CANCELLED) {\n            return;\n        }\n        if (status != BookingStatus.CONFIRMED && status != BookingStatus.CANCELLATION_PENDING) {\n            throw new BusinessRuleException(\"Booking cannot be cancelled from state \" + status, \"INVALID_BOOKING_STATE\");\n        }\n        this.status = BookingStatus.CANCELLED;\n    }\n\n    public void updateTotalAmount(Long totalAmount) {\n        this.totalAmount = totalAmount;\n    }\n\n    public void cancelDueToPaymentFailure() {\n        if (status == BookingStatus.CANCELLED) {\n            return;\n        }\n        if (status == BookingStatus.PENDING || status == BookingStatus.CANCELLATION_PENDING || status == BookingStatus.CONFIRMED) {\n            this.status = BookingStatus.CANCELLED;\n            return;\n        }\n        throw new BusinessRuleException(\"Booking cannot be cancelled from state \" + status, \"INVALID_BOOKING_STATE\");\n    }\n\n    public String getBookingRef() {\n        return bookingRef;\n    }\n\n    public Long getCartId() {\n        return cartId;\n    }\n\n    public Long getUserId() {\n        return userId;\n    }\n\n    public Long getEventId() {\n        return eventId;\n    }\n\n    public Long getSlotId() {\n        return slotId;\n    }\n\n    public Long getOrgId() {\n        return orgId;\n    }\n\n    public Instant getSlotStartTime() {\n        return slotStartTime;\n    }\n\n    public BookingStatus getStatus() {\n        return status;\n    }\n\n    public String getStripePaymentIntentId() {\n        return stripePaymentIntentId;\n    }\n\n    public String getStripeChargeId() {\n        return stripeChargeId;\n    }\n\n    public Long getTotalAmount() {\n        return totalAmount;\n    }\n\n    public String getCurrency() {\n        return currency;\n    }\n}\n"
  }
}

{
  "timestamp": "2026-03-04T21:37:19.842Z",
  "type": "response_item",
  "payload": {
    "type": "function_call_output",
    "call_id": "call_YbOivhR6hUjEhVyDkilnY74Z",
    "output": "Chunk ID: ff8b94\nWall time: 0.0508 seconds\nProcess exited with code 0\nOriginal token count: 218\nOutput:\npackage com.eventplatform.shared.common.event.published;\n\n/**\n * Published by booking-inventory when cart lock is confirmed (HARD_LOCKED transition).\n * Consumed by payments-ticketing to create a Stripe PaymentIntent.\n *\n * Rule 4 compliance: contains only primitives, IDs, and Strings -- no @Entity objects.\n * couponCode may be null if no coupon was applied.\n */\npublic record CartAssembledEvent(\n    Long cartId,\n    Long slotId,\n    Long userId,\n    Long orgId,\n    String ebEventId,\n    String couponCode,                   // nullable -- null if no coupon applied\n    long totalAmountInSmallestUnit,      // paise (for INR) -- passed to Stripe PaymentIntent `amount`\n    String currency,                     // e.g. \"inr\" -- passed to Stripe PaymentIntent `currency`\n    String userEmail                     // passed to Stripe PaymentIntent `receipt_email`\n) {\n}\n"
  }
}
```

## Entry 221
**Timestamp:** 2026-03-04T21:37:55.453Z
**Role/Type:** response_item
**Content:**
```json
{
  "timestamp": "2026-03-04T21:37:55.453Z",
  "type": "response_item",
  "payload": {
    "type": "function_call_output",
    "call_id": "call_MogKlPuLupXbiZnKaubJjwRp",
    "output": "Chunk ID: 510824\nWall time: 0.0505 seconds\nProcess exited with code 0\nOriginal token count: 343\nOutput:\n/**\n * Promotions module — owns Coupons, Promotions, Eligibility rules, and\n * Eventbrite discount sync.\n *\n * Module dependency contract (HARD RULE #10):\n *   - MAY import from: shared/ only\n *   - MUST NOT import: booking-inventory, payments-ticketing, identity, or any\n *     other module @Service / @Entity / @Repository directly\n *   - Cross-module reads go via CartSnapshotReader (shared interface) or REST calls\n *   - Cross-module writes are triggered by Spring ApplicationEvents\n *\n * Canonical package layout (per docs/MODULE_STRUCTURE_TEMPLATE.md):\n *   api/controller/   — REST controllers\n *   api/dto/          — request / response DTOs\n *   domain/           — @Entity classes and enums\n *   event/listener/   — @TransactionalEventListener beans\n *   event/published/  — module-internal events (if any)\n *   exception/        — module-specific exception classes\n *   mapper/           — MapStruct @Mapper interfaces\n *   repository/       — Spring Data @Repository interfaces\n *   service/          — @Service beans (orchestration + eligibility pipeline)\n *   statemachine/     — EB discount sync state machine (create/modify/delete)\n *   scheduler/        — @Scheduled / Quartz jobs for expiry + sync\n */\npackage com.eventplatform.promotions;\n/** Promotions module — domain layer. */\npackage com.eventplatform.promotions.domain;\n"
  }
}
```
**Metadata:**
```json
{
  "payload": {

    "call_id": "call_MogKlPuLupXbiZnKaubJjwRp",
    "output": "Chunk ID: 510824\nWall time: 0.0505 seconds\nProcess exited with code 0\nOriginal token count: 343\nOutput:\n/**\n * Promotions module — owns Coupons, Promotions, Eligibility rules, and\n * Eventbrite discount sync.\n *\n * Module dependency contract (HARD RULE #10):\n *   - MAY import from: shared/ only\n *   - MUST NOT import: booking-inventory, payments-ticketing, identity, or any\n *     other module @Service / @Entity / @Repository directly\n *   - Cross-module reads go via CartSnapshotReader (shared interface) or REST calls\n *   - Cross-module writes are triggered by Spring ApplicationEvents\n *\n * Canonical package layout (per docs/MODULE_STRUCTURE_TEMPLATE.md):\n *   api/controller/   — REST controllers\n *   api/dto/          — request / response DTOs\n *   domain/           — @Entity classes and enums\n *   event/listener/   — @TransactionalEventListener beans\n *   event/published/  — module-internal events (if any)\n *   exception/        — module-specific exception classes\n *   mapper/           — MapStruct @Mapper interfaces\n *   repository/       — Spring Data @Repository interfaces\n *   service/          — @Service beans (orchestration + eligibility pipeline)\n *   statemachine/     — EB discount sync state machine (create/modify/delete)\n *   scheduler/        — @Scheduled / Quartz jobs for expiry + sync\n */\npackage com.eventplatform.promotions;\n/** Promotions module — domain layer. */\npackage com.eventplatform.promotions.domain;\n"
  }
}

{
  "timestamp": "2026-03-04T21:38:01.024Z",
  "type": "event_msg",
  "payload": {
    "type": "agent_message",
    "message": "I’ve confirmed this is a ground-up FR7 implementation: `promotions` is currently only package stubs, and `EbDiscountSyncService` is also missing in `shared`.  \nImplementation plan:\n1. Add DB migration `V37` for promotions/coupons/redemptions/reservations/reconciliation tables.  \n2. Implement `shared/eventbrite` discount facade (`EbDiscountSyncService`, default impl, request/response DTOs).  \n3. Build full `promotions` module (entities, enums, repositories, mappers, exceptions, services, controllers, event listeners, schedulers) aligned with `SPEC_7.md`.  \n4. Add `booking-inventory` `CouponAppliedListener` to persist coupon discount and code on cart when promotions publishes the event.  \n5. Run a compile check (no tests) and fix any integration errors.",
    "phase": "commentary"
  }
}
```

## Entry 234
**Timestamp:** 2026-03-04T21:38:53.797Z
**Role/Type:** response_item
**Content:**
```json
{
  "timestamp": "2026-03-04T21:38:53.797Z",
  "type": "response_item",
  "payload": {
    "type": "function_call",
    "name": "exec_command",
    "arguments": "{\"cmd\":\"cat > app/src/main/resources/db/migration/V37__create_promotions_tables.sql <<'SQL'\\nCREATE TABLE promotions (\\n    id BIGSERIAL PRIMARY KEY,\\n    org_id BIGINT NOT NULL,\\n    name VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL,\\n    discount_type VARCHAR(20) NOT NULL,\\n    discount_value NUMERIC(12,4) NOT NULL,\\n    scope VARCHAR(20) NOT NULL,\\n    eb_event_id VARCHAR(255),\\n    max_usage_limit INTEGER,\\n    per_user_cap INTEGER,\\n    valid_from TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL,\\n    valid_until TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL,\\n    status VARCHAR(20) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'ACTIVE',\\n    created_at TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL DEFAULT NOW(),\\n    updated_at TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL DEFAULT NOW()\\n);\\n\\nCREATE INDEX idx_promotions_org_id ON promotions(org_id);\\nCREATE INDEX idx_promotions_status ON promotions(status);\\nCREATE INDEX idx_promotions_eb_event ON promotions(eb_event_id) WHERE eb_event_id IS NOT NULL;\\n\\nCREATE TABLE coupons (\\n    id BIGSERIAL PRIMARY KEY,\\n    promotion_id BIGINT NOT NULL REFERENCES promotions(id),\\n    org_id BIGINT NOT NULL,\\n    code VARCHAR(100) NOT NULL,\\n    status VARCHAR(20) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'ACTIVE',\\n    redemption_count INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,\\n    eb_discount_id VARCHAR(255),\\n    eb_sync_status VARCHAR(30) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'NOT_SYNCED',\\n    eb_quantity_sold_at_last_sync INTEGER,\\n    last_eb_sync_at TIMESTAMPTZ,\\n    created_at TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL DEFAULT NOW(),\\n    updated_at TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL DEFAULT NOW()\\n);\\n\\nCREATE UNIQUE INDEX uq_coupons_code_org_active ON coupons(lower(code), org_id) WHERE status != 'INACTIVE';\\nCREATE INDEX idx_coupons_promotion_id ON coupons(promotion_id);\\nCREATE INDEX idx_coupons_eb_discount_id ON coupons(eb_discount_id) WHERE eb_discount_id IS NOT NULL;\\nCREATE INDEX idx_coupons_eb_sync_status ON coupons(eb_sync_status);\\nCREATE INDEX idx_coupons_status ON coupons(status);\\n\\nCREATE TABLE coupon_redemptions (\\n    id BIGSERIAL PRIMARY KEY,\\n    coupon_id BIGINT NOT NULL REFERENCES coupons(id),\\n    user_id BIGINT NOT NULL,\\n    booking_id BIGINT NOT NULL,\\n    cart_id BIGINT NOT NULL,\\n    discount_amount NUMERIC(12,4) NOT NULL,\\n    currency VARCHAR(10) NOT NULL,\\n    redeemed_at TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL DEFAULT NOW(),\\n    voided BOOLEAN NOT NULL DEFAULT FALSE,\\n    voided_at TIMESTAMPTZ\\n);\\n\\nCREATE UNIQUE INDEX uq_coupon_redemptions_active ON coupon_redemptions(coupon_id, booking_id) WHERE voided = FALSE;\\nCREATE INDEX idx_coupon_redemptions_coupon_id ON coupon_redemptions(coupon_id);\\nCREATE INDEX idx_coupon_redemptions_user_id ON coupon_redemptions(user_id);\\nCREATE INDEX idx_coupon_redemptions_booking_id ON coupon_redemptions(booking_id);\\nCREATE INDEX idx_coupon_redemptions_cart_id ON coupon_redemptions(cart_id);\\n\\nCREATE TABLE coupon_usage_reservations (\\n    id BIGSERIAL PRIMARY KEY,\\n    coupon_id BIGINT NOT NULL REFERENCES coupons(id),\\n    cart_id BIGINT NOT NULL,\\n    user_id BIGINT NOT NULL,\\n    reserved_at TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL DEFAULT NOW(),\\n    expires_at TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL,\\n    released BOOLEAN NOT NULL DEFAULT FALSE\\n);\\n\\nCREATE UNIQUE INDEX uq_coupon_reservations_active ON coupon_usage_reservations(coupon_id, cart_id) WHERE released = FALSE;\\nCREATE INDEX idx_coupon_reservations_coupon_id ON coupon_usage_reservations(coupon_id);\\nCREATE INDEX idx_coupon_reservations_cart_id ON coupon_usage_reservations(cart_id);\\nCREATE INDEX idx_coupon_reservations_user_id ON coupon_usage_reservations(user_id);\\nCREATE INDEX idx_coupon_reservations_expires_at ON coupon_usage_reservations(expires_at) WHERE released = FALSE;\\n\\nCREATE TABLE orphan_eb_discounts (\\n    id BIGSERIAL PRIMARY KEY,\\n    eb_discount_id VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL,\\n    org_id BIGINT NOT NULL,\\n    code VARCHAR(100) NOT NULL,\\n    detected_at TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL DEFAULT NOW(),\\n    reviewed BOOLEAN NOT NULL DEFAULT FALSE,\\n    notes TEXT\\n);\\n\\nCREATE INDEX idx_orphan_eb_discounts_org_id ON orphan_eb_discounts(org_id);\\nCREATE INDEX idx_orphan_eb_discounts_reviewed ON orphan_eb_discounts(reviewed) WHERE reviewed = FALSE;\\n\\nCREATE TABLE discount_reconciliation_logs (\\n    id BIGSERIAL PRIMARY KEY,\\n    org_id BIGINT NOT NULL,\\n    run_at TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL DEFAULT NOW(),\\n    discounts_checked INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,\\n    drifts_found INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,\\n    orphans_found INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,\\n    externally_deleted_found INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,\\n    actions_taken_summary TEXT,\\n    error_summary TEXT\\n);\\n\\nCREATE INDEX idx_reconciliation_logs_org_id ON discount_reconciliation_logs(org_id);\\nCREATE INDEX idx_reconciliation_logs_run_at ON discount_reconciliation_logs(run_at);\\nSQL\"}",
    "call_id": "call_MxPjgyPO7Tn91EM0BJpOUfMO"
  }
}

Double amountOff,\\n    @JsonProperty(\\\"quantity_sold\\\") Integer quantitySold,\\n    @JsonProperty(\\\"quantity_available\\\") Integer quantityAvailable,\\n    @JsonProperty(\\\"event_id\\\") String eventId\\n) {\\n}\\nEOF\\n\\ncat > shared/src/main/java/com/eventplatform/shared/eventbrite/service/EbDiscountSyncService.java <<'EOF'\\npackage com.eventplatform.shared.eventbrite.service;\\n\\nimport com.eventplatform.shared.eventbrite.dto.request.EbDiscountCreateRequest;\\nimport com.eventplatform.shared.eventbrite.dto.response.EbDiscountResponse;\\nimport java.util.List;\\n\\npublic interface EbDiscountSyncService {\\n\\n    EbDiscountResponse createDiscount(String orgId, EbDiscountCreateRequest request);\\n\\n    List<EbDiscountResponse> listDiscounts(String orgId);\\n\\n    EbDiscountResponse getDiscount(String discountId);\\n\\n    void deleteDiscount(String discountId);\\n}\\nEOF\\n\\ncat > shared/src/main/java/com/eventplatform/shared/eventbrite/service/DefaultEbDiscountSyncService.java <<'EOF'\\npackage com.eventplatform.shared.eventbrite.service;\\n\\nimport com.eventplatform.shared.eventbrite.dto.request.EbDiscountCreateRequest;\\nimport com.eventplatform.shared.eventbrite.dto.response.EbDiscountResponse;\\nimport com.eventplatform.shared.eventbrite.exception.EbIntegrationException;\\nimport com.fasterxml.jackson.annotation.JsonIgnoreProperties;\\nimport com.fasterxml.jackson.annotation.JsonProperty;\\nimport java.util.List;\\nimport java.util.Map;\\nimport org.springframework.beans.factory.annotation.Qualifier;\\nimport org.springframework.http.HttpStatusCode;\\nimport org.springframework.stereotype.Service;\\nimport org.springframework.web.client.RestClient;\\n\\n@Service\\npublic class DefaultEbDiscountSyncService implements EbDiscountSyncService {\\n\\n    private final RestClient client;\\n\\n    @JsonIgnoreProperties(ignoreUnknown = true)\\n    private record DiscountListResponse(@JsonProperty(\\\"discounts\\\") List<EbDiscountResponse> discounts) {}\\n\\n    public DefaultEbDiscountSyncService(@Qualifier(\\\"ebRestClient\\\") RestClient client) {\\n        this.client = client;\\n    }\\n\\n    @Override\\n    public EbDiscountResponse createDiscount(String orgId, EbDiscountCreateRequest request) {\\n        try {\\n            return client.post()\\n                .uri(\\\"/v3/organizations/{orgId}/discounts/\\\", orgId)\\n                .body(Map.of(\\\"discount\\\", request))\\n                .retrieve()\\n                .onStatus(HttpStatusCode::isError, (req, resp) -> {\\n                    throw new EbIntegrationException(\\\"EB createDiscount failed: \\\" + resp.getStatusCode());\\n                })\\n                .body(EbDiscountResponse.class);\\n        } catch (EbIntegrationException ex) {\\n            throw ex;\\n        } catch (Exception ex) {\\n            throw new EbIntegrationException(\\\"EB createDiscount error: \\\" + ex.getMessage(), ex);\\n        }\\n    }\\n\\n    @Override\\n    public List<EbDiscountResponse> listDiscounts(String orgId) {\\n        try {\\n            DiscountListResponse response = client.get()\\n                .uri(\\\"/v3/organizations/{orgId}/discounts/\\\", orgId)\\n                .retrieve()\\n                .onStatus(HttpStatusCode::isError, (req, resp) -> {\\n                    throw new EbIntegrationException(\\\"EB listDiscounts failed: \\\" + resp.getStatusCode());\\n                })\\n                .body(DiscountListResponse.class);\\n            return response == null || response.discounts() == null ? List.of() : response.discounts();\\n        } catch (EbIntegrationException ex) {\\n            throw ex;\\n        } catch (Exception ex) {\\n            throw new EbIntegrationException(\\\"EB listDiscounts error: \\\" + ex.getMessage(), ex);\\n        }\\n    }\\n\\n    @Override\\n    public EbDiscountResponse getDiscount(String discountId) {\\n        try {\\n            return client.get()\\n                .uri(\\\"/v3/discounts/{discountId}/\\\", discountId)\\n                .retrieve()\\n                .onStatus(HttpStatusCode::isError, (req, resp) -> {\\n                    throw new EbIntegrationException(\\\"EB getDiscount failed: \\\" + resp.getStatusCode());\\n                })\\n                .body(EbDiscountResponse.class);\\n        } catch (EbIntegrationException ex) {\\n            throw ex;\\n        } catch (Exception ex) {\\n            throw new EbIntegrationException(\\\"EB getDiscount error: \\\" + ex.getMessage(), ex);\\n        }\\n    }\\n\\n    @Override\\n    public void deleteDiscount(String discountId) {\\n        try {\\n            client.delete()\\n                .uri(\\\"/v3/discounts/{discountId}/\\\", discountId)\\n                .retrieve()\\n                .onStatus(HttpStatusCode::isError, (req, resp) -> {\\n                    throw new EbIntegrationException(\\\"EB deleteDiscount failed: \\\" + resp.getStatusCode());\\n                })\\n                .toBodilessEntity();\\n        } catch (EbIntegrationException ex) {\\n            throw ex;\\n        } catch (Exception ex) {\\n            throw new EbIntegrationException(\\\"EB deleteDiscount error: \\\" + ex.getMessage(), ex);\\n        }\\n    }\\n}\\nEOF\"}",
    "call_id": "call_oJkWjKlJxH8b6V8XpA5C2Slb"
  }
}

    "arguments": "{\"cmd\":\"cat > promotions/src/main/java/com/eventplatform/promotions/repository/PromotionRepository.java <<'EOF'\\npackage com.eventplatform.promotions.repository;\\n\\nimport com.eventplatform.promotions.domain.Promotion;\\nimport com.eventplatform.promotions.domain.enums.PromotionStatus;\\nimport java.util.List;\\nimport org.springframework.data.jpa.repository.JpaRepository;\\n\\npublic interface PromotionRepository extends JpaRepository<Promotion, Long> {\\n    List<Promotion> findByOrgId(Long orgId);\\n    List<Promotion> findByOrgIdAndStatus(Long orgId, PromotionStatus status);\\n}\\nEOF\\n\\ncat > promotions/src/main/java/com/eventplatform/promotions/repository/CouponRepository.java <<'EOF'\\npackage com.eventplatform.promotions.repository;\\n\\nimport com.eventplatform.promotions.domain.Coupon;\\nimport com.eventplatform.promotions.domain.enums.CouponStatus;\\nimport com.eventplatform.promotions.domain.enums.EbSyncStatus;\\nimport java.time.Instant;\\nimport java.util.List;\\nimport java.util.Optional;\\nimport org.springframework.data.jpa.repository.JpaRepository;\\nimport org.springframework.data.jpa.repository.Lock;\\nimport org.springframework.data.jpa.repository.Query;\\nimport org.springframework.data.repository.query.Param;\\nimport jakarta.persistence.LockModeType;\\n\\npublic interface CouponRepository extends JpaRepository<Coupon, Long> {\\n\\n    Optional<Coupon> findByCodeIgnoreCaseAndOrgId(String code, Long orgId);\\n\\n    @Lock(LockModeType.PESSIMISTIC_WRITE)\\n    @Query(\\\"select c from Coupon c where c.id = :couponId\\\")\\n    Optional<Coupon> findByIdForUpdate(@Param(\\\"couponId\\\") Long couponId);\\n\\n    @Query(\\\"select c from Coupon c where lower(c.code) = lower(:code) and c.orgId = :orgId and c.status <> 'INACTIVE'\\\")\\n    Optional<Coupon> findActiveOrExhaustedByCodeAndOrg(@Param(\\\"code\\\") String code, @Param(\\\"orgId\\\") Long orgId);\\n\\n    boolean existsByCodeIgnoreCaseAndOrgIdAndStatusNot(String code, Long orgId, CouponStatus status);\\n\\n    List<Coupon> findByPromotionId(Long promotionId);\\n\\n    List<Coupon> findByStatusAndEbSyncStatus(CouponStatus status, EbSyncStatus ebSyncStatus);\\n\\n    @Query(\\\"select distinct c.orgId from Coupon c where c.ebSyncStatus = :status\\\")\\n    List<Long> findDistinctOrgIdByEbSyncStatus(@Param(\\\"status\\\") EbSyncStatus status);\\n\\n    @Query(\\\"select c from Coupon c join c.promotion p where c.status = 'ACTIVE' and p.validUntil < :now\\\")\\n    List<Coupon> findExpiredActiveCoupons(@Param(\\\"now\\\") Instant now);\\n\\n    List<Coupon> findByOrgIdAndEbSyncStatus(Long orgId, EbSyncStatus status);\\n\\n    Optional<Coupon> findTopByCodeIgnoreCaseAndOrgId(String code, Long orgId);\\n}\\nEOF\\n\\ncat > promotions/src/main/java/com/eventplatform/promotions/repository/CouponRedemptionRepository.java <<'EOF'\\npackage com.eventplatform.promotions.repository;\\n\\nimport com.eventplatform.promotions.domain.CouponRedemption;\\nimport java.util.Collection;\\nimport java.util.Optional;\\nimport org.springframework.data.jpa.repository.JpaRepository;\\n\\npublic interface CouponRedemptionRepository extends JpaRepository<CouponRedemption, Long> {\\n\\n    long countByCouponIdAndUserIdAndVoidedFalse(Long couponId, Long userId);\\n\\n    long countByCouponIdAndVoidedTrue(Long couponId);\\n\\n    boolean existsByCouponIdAndBookingIdAndVoidedFalse(Long couponId, Long bookingId);\\n\\n    Optional<CouponRedemption> findByBookingIdAndVoidedFalse(Long bookingId);\\n\\n    boolean existsByCouponIdInAndVoidedFalse(Collection<Long> couponIds);\\n}\\nEOF\\n\\ncat > promotions/src/main/java/com/eventplatform/promotions/repository/CouponUsageReservationRepository.java <<'EOF'\\npackage com.eventplatform.promotions.repository;\\n\\nimport com.eventplatform.promotions.domain.CouponUsageReservation;\\nimport java.time.Instant;\\nimport java.util.Optional;\\nimport org.springframework.data.jpa.repository.JpaRepository;\\nimport org.springframework.data.jpa.repository.Modifying;\\nimport org.springframework.data.jpa.repository.Query;\\nimport org.springframework.data.repository.query.Param;\\n\\npublic interface CouponUsageReservationRepository extends JpaRepository<CouponUsageReservation, Long> {\\n\\n    @Query(\\\"select count(r) from CouponUsageReservation r where r.coupon.id = :couponId and r.released = false and r.expiresAt > :now\\\")\\n    long countActiveByCouponId(@Param(\\\"couponId\\\") Long couponId, @Param(\\\"now\\\") Instant now);\\n\\n    @Query(\\\"select r from CouponUsageReservation r where r.coupon.id = :couponId and r.cartId = :cartId and r.released = false and r.expiresAt > :now\\\")\\n    Optional<CouponUsageReservation> findActiveByCouponIdAndCartId(@Param(\\\"couponId\\\") Long couponId,\\n                                                                    @Param(\\\"cartId\\\") Long cartId,\\n                                                                    @Param(\\\"now\\\") Instant now);\\n\\n    @Query(\\\"select r from CouponUsageReservation r where r.cartId = :cartId and r.released = false\\\")\\n    Optional<CouponUsageReservation> findOpenByCartId(@Param(\\\"cartId\\\") Long cartId);\\n\\n    @Modifying\\n    @Query(\\\"update CouponUsageReservation r set r.released = true where r.coupon.id = :couponId and r.released = false\\\")\\n    int releaseAllByCouponId(@Param(\\\"couponId\\\") Long couponId);\\n\\n    @Modifying\\n    @Query(\\\"update CouponUsageReservation r set r.released = true where r.cartId = :cartId and r.userId = :userId and r.released = false\\\")\\n    int releaseByCartIdAndUserId(@Param(\\\"cartId\\\") Long cartId, @Param(\\\"userId\\\") Long userId);\\n\\n    @Query(\\\"select count(r) from CouponUsageReservation r where r.coupon.id = :couponId and r.released = false and r.expiresAt > :now\\\")\\n    long countOpenReservations(@Param(\\\"couponId\\\") Long couponId, @Param(\\\"now\\\") Instant now);\\n}\\nEOF\\n\\ncat > promotions/src/main/java/com/eventplatform/promotions/repository/OrphanEbDiscountRepository.java <<'EOF'\\npackage com.eventplatform.promotions.repository;\\n\\nimport com.eventplatform.promotions.domain.OrphanEbDiscount;\\nimport org.springframework.data.jpa.repository.JpaRepository;\\n\\npublic interface OrphanEbDiscountRepository extends JpaRepository<OrphanEbDiscount, Long> {\\n}\\nEOF\\n\\ncat > promotions/src/main/java/com/eventplatform/promotions/repository/DiscountReconciliationLogRepository.java <<'EOF'\\npackage com.eventplatform.promotions.repository;\\n\\nimport com.eventplatform.promotions.domain.DiscountReconciliationLog;\\nimport java.util.Optional;\\nimport org.springframework.data.jpa.repository.JpaRepository;\\n\\npublic interface DiscountReconciliationLogRepository extends JpaRepository<DiscountReconciliationLog, Long> {\\n    Optional<DiscountReconciliationLog> findTopByOrgIdOrderByRunAtDesc(Long orgId);\\n}\\nEOF\"}",

{
  "timestamp": "2026-03-04T21:42:41.675Z",

  "payload": {
    "type": "function_call",
    "name": "exec_command",
    "arguments": "{\"cmd\":\"cat > promotions/src/main/java/com/eventplatform/promotions/service/DiscountCalculationResult.java <<'EOF'\\npackage com.eventplatform.promotions.service;\\n\\nimport com.eventplatform.promotions.domain.enums.DiscountType;\\n\\npublic record DiscountCalculationResult(\\n    String couponCode,\\n    DiscountType discountType,\\n    long discountAmountInSmallestUnit,\\n    long adjustedTotalInSmallestUnit,\\n    String currency\\n) {\\n}\\nEOF\\n\\ncat > promotions/src/main/java/com/eventplatform/promotions/service/DiscountSyncOrchestrator.java <<'EOF'\\npackage com.eventplatform.promotions.service;\\n\\nimport com.eventplatform.promotions.domain.Coupon;\\nimport com.eventplatform.promotions.domain.Promotion;\\nimport com.eventplatform.promotions.domain.enums.EbSyncStatus;\\nimport com.eventplatform.promotions.domain.enums.PromotionScope;\\nimport com.eventplatform.promotions.mapper.EbDiscountSyncPayloadMapper;\\nimport com.eventplatform.promotions.repository.CouponRepository;\\nimport com.eventplatform.shared.eventbrite.dto.response.EbDiscountResponse;\\nimport com.eventplatform.shared.eventbrite.exception.EbIntegrationException;\\nimport com.eventplatform.shared.eventbrite.service.EbDiscountSyncService;\\nimport java.util.Locale;\\nimport org.slf4j.Logger;\\nimport org.slf4j.LoggerFactory;\\nimport org.springframework.scheduling.annotation.Async;\\nimport org.springframework.stereotype.Service;\\nimport org.springframework.transaction.annotation.Transactional;\\n\\n@Service\\npublic class DiscountSyncOrchestrator {\\n\\n    private static final Logger log = LoggerFactory.getLogger(DiscountSyncOrchestrator.class);\\n\\n    private final CouponRepository couponRepository;\\n    private final EbDiscountSyncService ebDiscountSyncService;\\n    private final EbDiscountSyncPayloadMapper payloadMapper;\\n\\n    public DiscountSyncOrchestrator(\\n        CouponRepository couponRepository,\\n        EbDiscountSyncService ebDiscountSyncService,\\n        EbDiscountSyncPayloadMapper payloadMapper\\n    ) {\\n        this.couponRepository = couponRepository;\\n        this.ebDiscountSyncService = ebDiscountSyncService;\\n        this.payloadMapper = payloadMapper;\\n    }\\n\\n    @Async\\n    @Transactional\\n    public void createSync(Long couponId) {\\n        couponRepository.findByIdForUpdate(couponId).ifPresent(this::createSyncInternal);\\n    }\\n\\n    @Transactional\\n    public void createSyncInternal(Coupon coupon) {\\n        Promotion promotion = coupon.getPromotion();\\n        if (promotion.getScope() == PromotionScope.EVENT_SCOPED && promotion.getEbEventId() == null) {\\n            coupon.markNotSynced();\\n            couponRepository.save(coupon);\\n            log.warn(\\\"Skipping EB coupon sync due to null ebEventId for event-scoped promotion. couponId={}\\\", coupon.getId());\\n            return;\\n        }\\n\\n        coupon.markSyncPending();\\n\\n        try {\\n            String orgId = String.valueOf(coupon.getOrgId());\\n            var existing = ebDiscountSyncService.listDiscounts(orgId).stream()\\n                .filter(d -> d.code() != null && d.code().equalsIgnoreCase(coupon.getCode()))\\n                .findFirst();\\n\\n            EbDiscountResponse adoptedOrCreated;\\n            if (existing.isPresent()) {\\n                adoptedOrCreated = existing.get();\\n            } else {\\n                adoptedOrCreated = ebDiscountSyncService.createDiscount(orgId, payloadMapper.toRequest(coupon, promotion));\\n            }\\n\\n            if (adoptedOrCreated == null || adoptedOrCreated.id() == null) {\\n                coupon.markSyncFailed();\\n                couponRepository.save(coupon);\\n                return;\\n            }\\n\\n            EbDiscountResponse verify = ebDiscountSyncService.getDiscount(adoptedOrCreated.id());\\n            if (verify == null || verify.id() == null) {\\n                coupon.markSyncFailed();\\n            } else {\\n                coupon.markSynced(verify.id(), safeInt(verify.quantitySold()));\\n            }\\n            couponRepository.save(coupon);\\n        } catch (Exception ex) {\\n            coupon.markSyncFailed();\\n            couponRepository.save(coupon);\\n            log.error(\\\"EB create sync failed for couponId={}\\\", coupon.getId(), ex);\\n        }\\n    }\\n\\n    @Transactional\\n    public void guardedDelete(Long couponId) {\\n        couponRepository.findByIdForUpdate(couponId).ifPresent(this::guardedDeleteInternal);\\n    }\\n\\n    @Transactional\\n    public void guardedDeleteInternal(Coupon coupon) {\\n        if (coupon.getEbDiscountId() == null || coupon.getEbDiscountId().isBlank()) {\\n            coupon.markNotSynced();\\n            couponRepository.save(coupon);\\n            return;\\n        }\\n\\n        try {\\n            EbDiscountResponse current = ebDiscountSyncService.getDiscount(coupon.getEbDiscountId());\\n            int quantitySold = safeInt(current == null ? null : current.quantitySold());\\n            if (quantitySold > 0) {\\n                coupon.markDeleteBlocked(quantitySold);\\n                couponRepository.save(coupon);\\n                return;\\n            }\\n\\n            ebDiscountSyncService.deleteDiscount(coupon.getEbDiscountId());\\n            coupon.markNotSynced();\\n            couponRepository.save(coupon);\\n        } catch (EbIntegrationException ex) {\\n            if (isDeleteBlocked(ex)) {\\n                coupon.markDeleteBlocked(coupon.getEbQuantitySoldAtLastSync() == null ? 1 : coupon.getEbQuantitySoldAtLastSync());\\n            } else {\\n                coupon.markSyncFailed();\\n            }\\n            couponRepository.save(coupon);\\n            log.warn(\\\"EB guarded delete failed for couponId={} status={}\\\", coupon.getId(), coupon.getEbSyncStatus(), ex);\\n        }\\n    }\\n\\n    @Transactional\\n    public void resyncAfterPromotionUpdate(Long couponId) {\\n        couponRepository.findByIdForUpdate(couponId).ifPresent(this::resyncAfterPromotionUpdateInternal);\\n    }\\n\\n    private void resyncAfterPromotionUpdateInternal(Coupon coupon) {\\n        if (coupon.getEbDiscountId() == null || coupon.getEbDiscountId().isBlank()) {\\n            createSyncInternal(coupon);\\n            return;\\n        }\\n\\n        try {\\n            EbDiscountResponse current = ebDiscountSyncService.getDiscount(coupon.getEbDiscountId());\\n            int quantitySold = safeInt(current == null ? null : current.quantitySold());\\n            if (quantitySold > 0) {\\n                coupon.markCannotResync(quantitySold);\\n                couponRepository.save(coupon);\\n                return;\\n            }\\n\\n            ebDiscountSyncService.deleteDiscount(coupon.getEbDiscountId());\\n            createSyncInternal(coupon);\\n        } catch (Exception ex) {\\n            coupon.markSyncFailed();\\n            couponRepository.save(coupon);\\n            log.error(\\\"EB resync failed for couponId={}\\\", coupon.getId(), ex);\\n        }\\n    }\\n\\n    private static int safeInt(Integer value) {\\n        return value == null ? 0 : Math.max(0, value);\\n    }\\n\\n    private static boolean isDeleteBlocked(EbIntegrationException ex) {\\n        String message = ex.getMessage() == null ? \\\"\\\" : ex.getMessage().toLowerCase(Locale.ROOT);\\n        return message.contains(\\\"400\\\");\\n    }\\n}\\nEOF\\n\\ncat > promotions/src/main/java/com/eventplatform/promotions/service/PromotionService.java <<'EOF'\\npackage com.eventplatform.promotions.service;\\n\\nimport com.eventplatform.promotions.api.dto.request.PromotionCreateRequest;\\nimport com.eventplatform.promotions.api.dto.request.PromotionUpdateRequest;\\nimport com.eventplatform.promotions.domain.Promotion;\\nimport com.eventplatform.promotions.domain.enums.EbSyncStatus;\\nimport com.eventplatform.promotions.domain.enums.PromotionStatus;\\nimport com.eventplatform.promotions.exception.PromotionHasActiveRedemptionsException;\\nimport com.eventplatform.promotions.exception.PromotionNotFoundException;\\nimport com.eventplatform.promotions.mapper.PromotionMapper;\\nimport com.eventplatform.promotions.repository.CouponRedemptionRepository;\\nimport com.eventplatform.promotions.repository.CouponRepository;\\nimport com.eventplatform.promotions.repository.CouponUsageReservationRepository;\\nimport com.eventplatform.promotions.repository.PromotionRepository;\\nimport java.util.List;\\nimport org.springframework.stereotype.Service;\\nimport org.springframework.transaction.annotation.Transactional;\\n\\n@Service\\npublic class PromotionService {\\n\\n    private final PromotionRepository promotionRepository;\\n    private final CouponRepository couponRepository;\\n    private final CouponRedemptionRepository couponRedemptionRepository;\\n    private final CouponUsageReservationRepository reservationRepository;\\n    private final PromotionMapper promotionMapper;\\n    private final DiscountSyncOrchestrator discountSyncOrchestrator;\\n\\n    public PromotionService(\\n        PromotionRepository promotionRepository,\\n        CouponRepository couponRepository,\\n        CouponRedemptionRepository couponRedemptionRepository,\\n        CouponUsageReservationRepository reservationRepository,\\n        PromotionMapper promotionMapper,\\n        DiscountSyncOrchestrator discountSyncOrchestrator\\n    ) {\\n        this.promotionRepository = promotionRepository;\\n        this.couponRepository = couponRepository;\\n        this.couponRedemptionRepository = couponRedemptionRepository;\\n        this.reservationRepository = reservationRepository;\\n        this.promotionMapper = promotionMapper;\\n        this.discountSyncOrchestrator = discountSyncOrchestrator;\\n    }\\n\\n    @Transactional\\n    public com.eventplatform.promotions.api.dto.response.PromotionResponse create(Long orgId, PromotionCreateRequest request) {\\n        Promotion promotion = new Promotion(\\n            orgId,\\n            request.name(),\\n            request.discountType(),\\n            request.discountValue(),\\n            request.scope(),\\n            request.ebEventId(),\\n            request.maxUsageLimit(),\\n            request.perUserCap(),\\n            request.validFrom(),\\n            request.validUntil()\\n        );\\n        return promotionMapper.toResponse(promotionRepository.save(promotion));\\n    }\\n\\n    @Transactional(readOnly = true)\\n    public List<com.eventplatform.promotions.api.dto.response.PromotionResponse> list(Long orgId, PromotionStatus status) {\\n        List<Promotion> promotions = status == null\\n            ? promotionRepository.findByOrgId(orgId)\\n            : promotionRepository.findByOrgIdAndStatus(orgId, status);\\n        return promotions.stream().map(promotionMapper::toResponse).toList();\\n    }\\n\\n    @Transactional(readOnly = true)\\n    public com.eventplatform.promotions.api.dto.response.PromotionResponse get(Long orgId, Long promotionId) {\\n        Promotion promotion = promotionRepository.findById(promotionId)\\n            .filter(p -> p.getOrgId().equals(orgId))\\n            .orElseThrow(() -> new PromotionNotFoundException(promotionId));\\n        return promotionMapper.toResponse(promotion);\\n    }\\n\\n    @Transactional\\n    public com.eventplatform.promotions.api.dto.response.PromotionResponse update(Long orgId, Long promotionId, PromotionUpdateRequest request) {\\n        Promotion promotion = promotionRepository.findById(promotionId)\\n            .filter(p -> p.getOrgId().equals(orgId))\\n            .orElseThrow(() -> new PromotionNotFoundException(promotionId));\\n\\n        promotion.updateWindowAndCaps(request.validFrom(), request.validUntil(), request.maxUsageLimit(), request.perUserCap());\\n        Promotion saved = promotionRepository.save(promotion);\\n\\n        couponRepository.findByPromotionId(saved.getId()).forEach(coupon -> {\\n            if (coupon.getEbSyncStatus() == EbSyncStatus.SYNCED || coupon.getEbSyncStatus() == EbSyncStatus.SYNC_FAILED) {\\n                discountSyncOrchestrator.resyncAfterPromotionUpdate(coupon.getId());\\n            }\\n        });\\n\\n        return promotionMapper.toResponse(saved);\\n    }\\n\\n    @Transactional\\n    public void deactivate(Long orgId, Long promotionId) {\\n        Promotion promotion = promotionRepository.findById(promotionId)\\n            .filter(p -> p.getOrgId().equals(orgId))\\n            .orElseThrow(() -> new PromotionNotFoundException(promotionId));\\n\\n        var coupons = couponRepository.findByPromotionId(promotion.getId());\\n        List<Long> couponIds = coupons.stream().map(c -> c.getId()).toList();\\n        if (!couponIds.isEmpty() && couponRedemptionRepository.existsByCouponIdInAndVoidedFalse(couponIds)) {\\n            throw new PromotionHasActiveRedemptionsException(promotionId);\\n        }\\n\\n        coupons.forEach(coupon -> {\\n            coupon.deactivate();\\n            couponRepository.save(coupon);\\n            reservationRepository.releaseAllByCouponId(coupon.getId());\\n            discountSyncOrchestrator.guardedDelete(coupon.getId());\\n        });\\n        promotion.deactivate();\\n        promotionRepository.save(promotion);\\n    }\\n}\\nEOF\\n\\ncat > final CouponMapper couponMapper;\\n    private final DiscountSyncOrchestrator discountSyncOrchestrator;\\n\\n    public CouponAdminService(\\n        PromotionRepository promotionRepository,\\n        CouponRepository couponRepository,\\n        CouponRedemptionRepository couponRedemptionRepository,\\n        CouponUsageReservationRepository reservationRepository,\\n        CouponMapper couponMapper,\\n        DiscountSyncOrchestrator discountSyncOrchestrator\\n    ) {\\n        this.promotionRepository = promotionRepository;\\n        this.couponRepository = couponRepository;\\n PromotionNotFoundException(promotionId));\\n\\n        if (couponRepository.existsByCodeIgnoreCaseAndOrgIdAndStatusNot(request.code(), orgId, (couponRedemptionRepository.existsByCouponIdAndBookingIdAndVoidedFalse(coupon.getId(), -1L)) {\\n            throw new CouponHasActiveRedemptionsException(couponCode);\\n        }\\n CouponUsageStatsResponse(\\n            coupon.getCode(),\\n            coupon.getStatus(),\\n            coupon.getRedemptionCount(),\\n            activeReservations,\\n            voided,\\n orgId = String.valueOf(coupon.getOrgId());\\n            var existing = ebDiscountSyncService.listDiscounts(orgId).stream()\\n                .filter(d -> d.code() != null && d.code().equalsIgnoreCase(coupon.getCode()))\\n                .findFirst();\\n\\n            EbDiscountResponse adoptedOrCreated;\\n            if (existing.isPresent()) {\\n                adoptedOrCreated = existing.get();\\n            } else {\\n                adoptedOrCreated = ebDiscountSyncService.createDiscount(orgId, payloadMapper.toRequest(coupon, promotion));\\n            }\\n\\n            if (adoptedOrCreated == null || adoptedOrCreated.id() == null) {\\n                coupon.markSyncFailed();\\n                couponRepository.save(coupon);\\n                return;\\n            }\\n\\n            EbDiscountResponse verify = ebDiscountSyncService.getDiscount(adoptedOrCreated.id());\\n            if (verify == null || verify.id() == null) {\\n                coupon.markSyncFailed();\\n            } else {\\n                coupon.markSynced(verify.id(), safeInt(verify.quantitySold()));\\n            }\\n            couponRepository.save(coupon);\\n        } catch (Exception ex) {\\n            coupon.markSyncFailed();\\n            couponRepository.save(coupon);\\n            log.error(\\\"EB create sync failed for couponId={}\\\", coupon.getId(), ex);\\n        }\\n    }\\n\\n    @Transactional\\n    public void guardedDelete(Long couponId) {\\n        couponRepository.findByIdForUpdate(couponId).ifPresent(this::guardedDeleteInternal);\\n coupon.markNotSynced();\\n            couponRepository.save(coupon);\\n            return;\\n        }\\n\\n        try {\\n            EbDiscountResponse current = ebDiscountSyncService.getDiscount(coupon.getEbDiscountId());\\n            int quantitySold = safeInt(current == null ? null : current.quantitySold());\\n            if (quantitySold > 0) {\\n         coupon.markSyncFailed();\\n            }\\n            couponRepository.save(coupon);\\n            log.warn(\\\"EB guarded delete failed for couponId={} status={}\\\", coupon.getId(), ebDiscountSyncService.deleteDiscount(coupon.getEbDiscountId());\\n            createSyncInternal(coupon);\\n        } catch (Exception ex) {\\n            coupon.markSyncFailed();\\n
