## Entry 271
**Timestamp:** 2026-03-04T21:43:49.712Z
**Role/Type:** response_item
**Content:**
```json
{
  "timestamp": "2026-03-04T21:43:49.712Z",
  "type": "response_item",
  "payload": {
    "type": "function_call",
    "name": "exec_command",
    "arguments": "{\"cmd\":\"cat > promotions/src/main/java/com/eventplatform/promotions/service/CouponEligibilityService.java <<'EOF'\\npackage com.eventplatform.promotions.service;\\n\\nimport com.eventplatform.promotions.api.dto.request.CouponValidateRequest;\\nimport com.eventplatform.promotions.api.dto.response.DiscountBreakdownResponse;\\nimport com.eventplatform.promotions.domain.Coupon;\\nimport com.eventplatform.promotions.domain.CouponUsageReservation;\\nimport com.eventplatform.promotions.domain.Promotion;\\nimport com.eventplatform.promotions.domain.enums.CouponStatus;\\nimport com.eventplatform.promotions.domain.enums.PromotionScope;\\nimport com.eventplatform.promotions.exception.CouponEventMismatchException;\\nimport com.eventplatform.promotions.exception.CouponExpiredException;\\nimport com.eventplatform.promotions.exception.CouponInactiveException;\\nimport com.eventplatform.promotions.exception.CouponNotFoundException;\\nimport com.eventplatform.promotions.exception.CouponNotYetValidException;\\nimport com.eventplatform.promotions.exception.CouponOrgMismatchException;\\nimport com.eventplatform.promotions.exception.CouponPerUserCapReachedException;\\nimport com.eventplatform.promotions.exception.CouponUsageLimitReachedException;\\nimport com.eventplatform.promotions.repository.CouponRedemptionRepository;\\nimport com.eventplatform.promotions.repository.CouponRepository;\\nimport com.eventplatform.promotions.repository.CouponUsageReservationRepository;\\nimport com.eventplatform.shared.common.dto.CartItemSnapshotDto;\\nimport com.eventplatform.shared.common.dto.CartSummaryDto;\\nimport com.eventplatform.shared.common.dto.SlotSummaryDto;\\nimport com.eventplatform.shared.common.event.published.CouponAppliedEvent;\\nimport com.eventplatform.shared.common.event.published.CouponValidatedEvent;\\nimport com.eventplatform.shared.common.exception.BusinessRuleException;\\nimport com.eventplatform.shared.common.service.CartSnapshotReader;\\nimport com.eventplatform.shared.common.service.SlotSummaryReader;\\nimport java.math.BigDecimal;\\nimport java.math.RoundingMode;\\nimport java.time.Instant;\\nimport java.util.List;\\nimport org.springframework.context.ApplicationEventPublisher;\\nimport org.springframework.stereotype.Service;\\nimport org.springframework.transaction.annotation.Transactional;\\n\\n@Service\\npublic class CouponEligibilityService {\\n\\n    private final CouponRepository couponRepository;\\n    private final CouponUsageReservationRepository reservationRepository;\\n    private final CouponRedemptionRepository redemptionRepository;\\n    private final CartSnapshotReader cartSnapshotReader;\\n    private final SlotSummaryReader slotSummaryReader;\\n    private final ApplicationEventPublisher eventPublisher;\\n\\n    public CouponEligibilityService(\\n        CouponRepository couponRepository,\\n        CouponUsageReservationRepository reservationRepository,\\n        CouponRedemptionRepository redemptionRepository,\\n        CartSnapshotReader cartSnapshotReader,\\n        SlotSummaryReader slotSummaryReader,\\n        ApplicationEventPublisher eventPublisher\\n    ) {\\n        this.couponRepository = couponRepository;\\n        this.reservationRepository = reservationRepository;\\n        this.redemptionRepository = redemptionRepository;\\n        this.cartSnapshotReader = cartSnapshotReader;\\n        this.slotSummaryReader = slotSummaryReader;\\n        this.eventPublisher = eventPublisher;\\n    }\\n\\n    @Transactional\\n    public DiscountBreakdownResponse validateAndApply(Long userId, CouponValidateRequest request) {\\n        CartSummaryDto cartSummary = cartSnapshotReader.getCartSummary(request.cartId());\\n        if (!cartSummary.expiresAt().isAfter(Instant.now())) {\\n            throw new BusinessRuleException(\\\"Cart expired\\\", \\\"CART_EXPIRED\\\");\\n        }\\n\\n        Coupon coupon = couponRepository.findByCodeIgnoreCaseAndOrgId(request.couponCode(), cartSummary.orgId())\\n            .orElseThrow(() -> new CouponNotFoundException(request.couponCode()));\\n\\n        if (!coupon.getOrgId().equals(cartSummary.orgId())) {\\n            throw new CouponOrgMismatchException();\\n        }\\n\\n        if (coupon.getStatus() != CouponStatus.ACTIVE) {\\n            throw new CouponInactiveException(coupon.getCode());\\n        }\\n\\n        Promotion promotion = coupon.getPromotion();\\n        Instant now = Instant.now();\\n        if (now.isAfter(promotion.getValidUntil())) {\\n            throw new CouponExpiredException(coupon.getCode());\\n        }\\n        if (now.isBefore(promotion.getValidFrom())) {\\n            throw new CouponNotYetValidException(coupon.getCode());\\n        }\\n\\n        if (promotion.getScope() == PromotionScope.EVENT_SCOPED) {\\n            SlotSummaryDto slot = slotSummaryReader.getSlotSummary(cartSummary.slotId());\\n            if (slot == null || slot.ebEventId() == null || !slot.ebEventId().equals(promotion.getEbEventId())) {\\n                throw new CouponEventMismatchException();\\n            }\\n        }\\n\\n        long activeReservations = reservationRepository.countActiveByCouponId(coupon.getId(), now);\\n        if (promotion.getMaxUsageLimit() != null\\n            && coupon.getRedemptionCount() + activeReservations >= promotion.getMaxUsageLimit()) {\\n            throw new CouponUsageLimitReachedException();\\n        }\\n\\n        if (promotion.getPerUserCap() != null\\n            && redemptionRepository.countByCouponIdAndUserIdAndVoidedFalse(coupon.getId(), userId) >= promotion.getPerUserCap()) {\\n            throw new CouponPerUserCapReachedException();\\n        }\\n\\n        reservationRepository.findActiveByCouponIdAndCartId(coupon.getId(), request.cartId(), now)\\n            .ifPresentOrElse(\\n                existing -> {},\\n                () -> reservationRepository.save(new CouponUsageReservation(coupon, request.cartId(), userId, cartSummary.expiresAt()))\\n            );\\n\\n        DiscountCalculationResult result = calculateDiscount(coupon, cartSummary.currency(), request.cartId());\\n        eventPublisher.publishEvent(new CouponValidatedEvent(\\n            request.cartId(),\\n            coupon.getCode(),\\n            result.discountAmountInSmallestUnit(),\\n            result.currency(),\\n            userId\\n        ));\\n        eventPublisher.publishEvent(new CouponAppliedEvent(\\n            request.cartId(),\\n            coupon.getCode(),\\n            result.discountAmountInSmallestUnit(),\\n            result.currency(),\\n            userId\\n        ));\\n\\n        return new DiscountBreakdownResponse(\\n            result.couponCode(),\\n            result.discountType(),\\n            result.discountAmountInSmallestUnit(),\\n            result.adjustedTotalInSmallestUnit(),\\n            result.currency()\\n        );\\n    }\\n\\n    @Transactional\\n    public void removeCouponFromCart(Long userId, Long cartId) {\\n        int released = reservationRepository.releaseByCartIdAndUserId(cartId, userId);\\n        if (released < 1) {\\n            throw new CouponNotFoundException(\\\"cart=\\\" + cartId);\\n        }\\n    }\\n\\n    @Transactional(readOnly = true)\\n    public DiscountCalculationResult calculateDiscount(Coupon coupon, String currency, Long cartId) {\\n        List<CartItemSnapshotDto> items = cartSnapshotReader.getCartItems(cartId);\\n        long subtotal = items.stream()\\n            .mapToLong(i -> {\\n                int qty = i.quantity() == null || i.quantity() < 1 ? 1 : i.quantity();\\n                return i.unitPrice() * qty;\\n            })\\n            .sum();\\n\\n        long discount;\\n        if (coupon.getPromotion().getDiscountType() == com.eventplatform.promotions.domain.enums.DiscountType.PERCENT_OFF) {\\n            BigDecimal value = BigDecimal.valueOf(subtotal)\\n                .multiply(coupon.getPromotion().getDiscountValue())\\n                .divide(BigDecimal.valueOf(100), 0, RoundingMode.FLOOR);\\n            discount = value.longValue();\\n        } else {\\n            long amountOff = coupon.getPromotion().getDiscountValue()\\n                .multiply(BigDecimal.valueOf(100))\\n                .setScale(0, RoundingMode.HALF_UP)\\n                .longValue();\\n            discount = Math.min(amountOff, subtotal);\\n        }\\n\\n        long adjusted = Math.max(0L, subtotal - discount);\\n        return new DiscountCalculationResult(\\n            coupon.getCode(),\\n            coupon.getPromotion().getDiscountType(),\\n            discount,\\n            adjusted,\\n            currency.toLowerCase()\\n        );\\n    }\\n}\\nEOF\\n\\ncat > promotions/src/main/java/com/eventplatform/promotions/service/CouponRedemptionService.java <<'EOF'\\npackage com.eventplatform.promotions.service;\\n\\nimport com.eventplatform.promotions.domain.Coupon;\\nimport com.eventplatform.promotions.domain.CouponRedemption;\\nimport com.eventplatform.promotions.domain.CouponUsageReservation;\\nimport com.eventplatform.promotions.domain.enums.EbSyncStatus;\\nimport com.eventplatform.promotions.repository.CouponRedemptionRepository;\\nimport com.eventplatform.promotions.repository.CouponRepository;\\nimport com.eventplatform.promotions.repository.CouponUsageReservationRepository;\\nimport com.eventplatform.shared.common.dto.CartSummaryDto;\\nimport com.eventplatform.shared.common.service.CartSnapshotReader;\\nimport java.math.BigDecimal;\\nimport org.slf4j.Logger;\\nimport org.slf4j.LoggerFactory;\\nimport org.springframework.stereotype.Service;\\nimport org.springframework.transaction.annotation.Transactional;\\n\\n@Service\\npublic class CouponRedemptionService {\\n\\n    private static final Logger log = LoggerFactory.getLogger(CouponRedemptionService.class);\\n\\n    private final CouponRepository couponRepository;\\n    private final CouponRedemptionRepository redemptionRepository;\\n    private final CouponUsageReservationRepository reservationRepository;\\n    private final CouponEligibilityService eligibilityService;\\n    private final CartSnapshotReader cartSnapshotReader;\\n    private final DiscountSyncOrchestrator discountSyncOrchestrator;\\n\\n    public CouponRedemptionService(\\n        CouponRepository couponRepository,\\n        CouponRedemptionRepository redemptionRepository,\\n        CouponUsageReservationRepository reservationRepository,\\n        CouponEligibilityService eligibilityService,\\n        CartSnapshotReader cartSnapshotReader,\\n        DiscountSyncOrchestrator discountSyncOrchestrator\\n    ) {\\n        this.couponRepository = couponRepository;\\n        this.redemptionRepository = redemptionRepository;\\n        this.reservationRepository = reservationRepository;\\n        this.eligibilityService = eligibilityService;\\n        this.cartSnapshotReader = cartSnapshotReader;\\n        this.discountSyncOrchestrator = discountSyncOrchestrator;\\n    }\\n\\n    @Transactional\\n    public void onBookingConfirmed(Long bookingId, Long cartId, Long userId) {\\n        CouponUsageReservation reservation = reservationRepository.findOpenByCartId(cartId).orElse(null);\\n        if (reservation == null) {\\n            return;\\n        }\\n\\n        Coupon coupon = couponRepository.findByIdForUpdate(reservation.getCoupon().getId()).orElse(null);\\n        if (coupon == null) {\\n            reservation.release();\\n            reservationRepository.save(reservation);\\n            return;\\n        }\\n\\n        if (redemptionRepository.existsByCouponIdAndBookingIdAndVoidedFalse(coupon.getId(), bookingId)) {\\n            reservation.release();\\n            reservationRepository.save(reservation);\\n            return;\\n        }\\n\\n        DiscountCalculationResult calc = eligibilityService.calculateDiscount(coupon, coupon.getPromotion().getDiscountValue().toString(), cartId);\\n        BigDecimal discountMajor = BigDecimal.valueOf(calc.discountAmountInSmallestUnit())\\n            .divide(BigDecimal.valueOf(100));\\n\\n        redemptionRepository.save(new CouponRedemption(\\n            coupon,\\n            userId,\\n            bookingId,\\n            cartId,\\n            discountMajor,\\n            calc.currency()\\n        ));\\n\\n        coupon.recordRedemption(coupon.getPromotion().getMaxUsageLimit());\\n        reservation.release();\\n        couponRepository.save(coupon);\\n        reservationRepository.save(reservation);\\n\\n        if (coupon.getStatus() == com.eventplatform.promotions.domain.enums.CouponStatus.EXHAUSTED) {\\n            discountSyncOrchestrator.guardedDelete(coupon.getId());\\n        }\\n    }\\n\\n    @Transactional\\n    public void onBookingCancelled(Long bookingId) {\\n        CouponRedemption redemption = redemptionRepository.findByBookingIdAndVoidedFalse(bookingId).orElse(null);\\n        if (redemption == null) {\\n            return;\\n        }\\n\\n        Coupon coupon = couponRepository.findByIdForUpdate(redemption.getCoupon().getId()).orElse(null);\\n        if (coupon == null) {\\n            return;\\n        }\\n\\n        redemption.voidRedemption();\\n        coupon.voidRedemption();\\n        redemptionRepository.save(redemption);\\n        couponRepository.save(coupon);\\n\\n        if (coupon.getEbSyncStatus() == EbSyncStatus.DELETE_BLOCKED || coupon.getEbSyncStatus() == EbSyncStatus.EB_DELETED_EXTERNALLY) {\\n            log.info(\\\"Skipping EB recreate for couponId={} due to syncStatus={}\\\", coupon.getId(), coupon.getEbSyncStatus());\\n        }\\n    }\\n\\n    @Transactional\\n    public void onPaymentFailed(Long cartId, Long userId) {\\n        reservationRepository.releaseByCartIdAndUserId(cartId, userId);\\n    }\\n\\n    @Transactional\\n    public void onCartAssembled(Long cartId, Long userId) {\\n        CartSummaryDto summary = cartSnapshotReader.getCartSummary(cartId);\\n        String couponCode = summary.couponCode();\\n        if (couponCode == null || couponCode.isBlank()) {\\n            return;\\n        }\\n\\n        Coupon coupon = couponRepository.findByCodeIgnoreCaseAndOrgId(couponCode, summary.orgId()).orElse(null);\\n        if (coupon == null) {\\n            return;\\n        }\\n\\n        DiscountCalculationResult result = eligibilityService.calculateDiscount(coupon, summary.currency(), cartId);\\n        // Event republish ensures booking-inventory cart discount stays up to date right before payment.\\n        discountSyncOrchestrator.createSync(coupon.getId());\\n        log.debug(\\\"Cart assembled coupon check done cartId={} discount={}\\\", cartId, result.discountAmountInSmallestUnit());\\n    }\\n}\\nEOF\\n\\ncat > promotions/src/main/java/com/eventplatform/promotions/service/DiscountReconciliationService.java <<'EOF'\\npackage com.eventplatform.promotions.service;\\n\\nimport com.eventplatform.promotions.api.dto.response.DiscountReconciliationLogResponse;\\nimport com.eventplatform.promotions.domain.Coupon;\\nimport com.eventplatform.promotions.domain.DiscountReconciliationLog;\\nimport com.eventplatform.promotions.domain.OrphanEbDiscount;\\nimport com.eventplatform.promotions.domain.enums.EbSyncStatus;\\nimport com.eventplatform.promotions.repository.CouponRepository;\\nimport com.eventplatform.promotions.repository.DiscountReconciliationLogRepository;\\nimport com.eventplatform.promotions.repository.OrphanEbDiscountRepository;\\nimport com.eventplatform.shared.eventbrite.dto.response.EbDiscountResponse;\\nimport com.eventplatform.shared.eventbrite.service.EbDiscountSyncService;\\nimport java.util.List;\\nimport java.util.Map;\\nimport java.util.function.Function;\\nimport java.util.stream.Collectors;\\nimport org.slf4j.Logger;\\nimport org.slf4j.LoggerFactory;\\nimport org.springframework.stereotype.Service;\\nimport org.springframework.transaction.annotation.Transactional;\\n\\n@Service\\npublic class DiscountReconciliationService {\\n\\n    private static final Logger log = LoggerFactory.getLogger(DiscountReconciliationService.class);\\n\\n    private final CouponRepository couponRepository;\\n    private final OrphanEbDiscountRepository orphanRepository;\\n    private final DiscountReconciliationLogRepository logRepository;\\n    private final EbDiscountSyncService ebDiscountSyncService;\\n\\n    public DiscountReconciliationService(\\n        CouponRepository couponRepository,\\n        OrphanEbDiscountRepository orphanRepository,\\n        DiscountReconciliationLogRepository logRepository,\\n        EbDiscountSyncService ebDiscountSyncService\\n    ) {\\n        this.couponRepository = couponRepository;\\n        this.orphanRepository = orphanRepository;\\n        this.logRepository = logRepository;\\n        this.ebDiscountSyncService = ebDiscountSyncService;\\n    }\\n\\n    @Transactional\\n    public void reconcileAllOrgs() {\\n        List<Long> orgIds = couponRepository.findDistinctOrgIdByEbSyncStatus(EbSyncStatus.SYNCED);\\n        for (Long orgId : orgIds) {\\n            reconcileOrg(orgId);\\n        }\\n    }\\n\\n    @Transactional\\n    public null;\\n\\n        try {\\n            List<EbDiscountResponse> ebDiscounts = ebDiscountSyncService.listDiscounts(String.valueOf(orgId));\\n            Map<String, EbDiscountResponse> byId = ebDiscounts.stream()\\n                .filter(d -> d.id() != null)\\n                .collect(Collectors.toMap(EbDiscountResponse::id, Function.identity(), (a, b) -> a));\\n\\n            List<Coupon> syncedCoupons = couponRepository.findByOrgIdAndEbSyncStatus(orgId, EbSyncStatus.SYNCED);\\n            checked = syncedCoupons.size();\\n\\n            for (Coupon coupon : syncedCoupons) coupon.markExternallyDeleted();\\n                    couponRepository.save(coupon);\\n                    deleted++;\\n                    continue;\\n                }\\n\\n                int ebQuantity = eb.quantitySold() == null ? 0 : eb.quantitySold();\\n                if (ebQuantity > coupon.getRedemptionCount()) {\\n                    coupon.updateRedemptionCountFromEb(ebQuantity);\\n                    couponRepository.save(coupon);\\n                }\\n\\n                boolean drift = (eb.code() != null && !eb.code().equalsIgnoreCase(coupon.getCode()));\\n                if (drift) {\\n                    coupon.markDriftDetected(ebQuantity);\\n                    couponRepository.save(coupon);\\n .collect(Collectors.toMap(Coupon::getEbDiscountId, Function.identity(), (a, b) -> a));\\n\\n            for (EbDiscountResponse eb : ebDiscounts) {\\n                if (eb.id() != null && drifts, orphans, deleted, summary, error));\\n    }\\n\\n    @Transactional(readOnly = true)\\n    public DiscountReconciliationLogResponse latestLog(Long orgId) {\\n        DiscountReconciliationLog \\\"CART_EXPIRED\\\");\\n        }\\n\\n        Coupon coupon = couponRepository.findByCodeIgnoreCaseAndOrgId(request.couponCode(), cartSummary.orgId())\\n            .orElseThrow(() -> new now = Instant.now();\\n        if (now.isAfter(promotion.getValidUntil())) {\\n            throw new CouponExpiredException(coupon.getCode());\\n        }\\n        if (now.isBefore(promotion.getValidFrom())) {\\n            throw new CouponNotYetValidException(coupon.getCode());\\n        }\\n\\n        if (promotion.getScope() == PromotionScope.EVENT_SCOPED) {\\n            SlotSummaryDto slot = slotSummaryReader.getSlotSummary(cartSummary.slotId());\\n            if (slot == null || slot.ebEventId() == null || !slot.ebEventId().equals(promotion.getEbEventId())) {\\n                throw new CouponEventMismatchException();\\n            }\\n        }\\n\\n        long activeReservations = reservationRepository.countActiveByCouponId(coupon.getId(), now);\\n        if (promotion.getMaxUsageLimit() != null\\n            && coupon.getRedemptionCount() + activeReservations >= promotion.getMaxUsageLimit()) {\\n            throw new CouponUsageLimitReachedException();\\n        }\\n\\n        if (promotion.getPerUserCap() != null\\n            && redemptionRepository.countByCouponIdAndUserIdAndVoidedFalse(coupon.getId(), userId) >= promotion.getPerUserCap()) {\\n            throw new CouponPerUserCapReachedException();\\n        }\\n\\n calculateDiscount(coupon, cartSummary.currency(), request.cartId());\\n        eventPublisher.publishEvent(new CouponValidatedEvent(\\n            request.cartId(),\\n            coupon.getCode(),\\n            result.discountAmountInSmallestUnit(),\\n            result.currency(),\\n            userId\\n        ));\\n        eventPublisher.publishEvent(new CouponAppliedEvent(\\n            request.cartId(),\\n            coupon.getCode(),\\n            result.discountAmountInSmallestUnit(),\\n            result.currency(),\\n            userId\\n        ));\\n\\n        return new DiscountBreakdownResponse(\\n            result.couponCode(),\\n            result.discountType(),\\n            result.discountAmountInSmallestUnit(),\\n            result.adjustedTotalInSmallestUnit(),\\n            result.currency()\\n        );\\n    }\\n\\n    @Transactional\\n    public void removeCouponFromCart(Long userId, Long cartId) {\\n        int released = reservationRepository.releaseByCartIdAndUserId(cartId, userId);\\n        if (released < 1) {\\n            throw new CouponNotFoundException(\\\"cart=\\\" + cartId);\\n        }\\n    }\\n\\n    @Transactional(readOnly = true)\\n    public DiscountCalculationResult calculateDiscount(Coupon coupon, String currency, Long cartId) {\\n        List<CartItemSnapshotDto> items = cartSnapshotReader.getCartItems(cartId);\\n        long subtotal = items.stream()\\n            .mapToLong(i -> {\\n                int qty = i.quantity() == null || i.quantity() < 1 ? 1 : i.quantity();\\n                return i.unitPrice() * qty;\\n            })\\n            .sum();\\n\\n        long discount;\\n        if (coupon.getPromotion().getDiscountType() == com.eventplatform.promotions.domain.enums.DiscountType.PERCENT_OFF) {\\n            BigDecimal value = BigDecimal.valueOf(subtotal)\\n                .multiply(coupon.getPromotion().getDiscountValue())\\n                .divide(BigDecimal.valueOf(100), 0, RoundingMode.FLOOR);\\n            discount = value.longValue();\\n        } else {\\n .longValue();\\n            discount = Math.min(amountOff, subtotal);\\n        }\\n\\n        long adjusted = Math.max(0L, subtotal - discount);\\n        return new DiscountCalculationResult(\\n     }\\n\\n        Coupon coupon = couponRepository.findByIdForUpdate(reservation.getCoupon().getId()).orElse(null);\\n        if (coupon == null) {\\n            reservation.release();\\n            reservationRepository.save(reservation);\\n            return;\\n        }\\n\\n        if (redemptionRepository.existsByCouponIdAndBookingIdAndVoidedFalse(coupon.getId(), bookingId)) {\\n            reservation.release();\\n            reservationRepository.save(reservation);\\n            return;\\n        }\\n\\n        DiscountCalculationResult calc = eligibilityService.calculateDiscount(coupon, coupon.getPromotion().getDiscountValue().toString(), cartId);\\n        BigDecimal discountMajor = BigDecimal.valueOf(calc.discountAmountInSmallestUnit())\\n            .divide(BigDecimal.valueOf(100));\\n\\n        redemptionRepository.save(new CouponRedemption(\\n            coupon,\\n            userId,\\n            bookingId,\\n            cartId,\\n            discountMajor,\\n            calc.currency()\\n        ));\\n\\n        coupon.recordRedemption(coupon.getPromotion().getMaxUsageLimit());\\n        reservation.release();\\n        couponRepository.save(coupon);\\n        reservationRepository.save(reservation);\\n\\n        if (coupon.getStatus() == com.eventplatform.promotions.domain.enums.CouponStatus.EXHAUSTED) {\\n            discountSyncOrchestrator.guardedDelete(coupon.getId());\\n        }\\n    }\\n\\n    @Transactional\\n    public void onBookingCancelled(Long bookingId) {\\n        CouponRedemption redemption = redemptionRepository.findByBookingIdAndVoidedFalse(bookingId).orElse(null);\\n        if (redemption == null) {\\n            return;\\n        }\\n\\n        Coupon coupon = couponRepository.findByIdForUpdate(redemption.getCoupon().getId()).orElse(null);\\n        if (coupon == null) {\\n            return;\\n        }\\n\\n        redemption.voidRedemption();\\n        coupon.voidRedemption();\\n        redemptionRepository.save(redemption);\\n        couponRepository.save(coupon);\\n\\n        if (coupon.getEbSyncStatus() == EbSyncStatus.DELETE_BLOCKED || coupon.getEbSyncStatus() == EbSyncStatus.EB_DELETED_EXTERNALLY) {\\n couponCode.isBlank()) {\\n            return;\\n        }\\n\\n        Coupon coupon = couponRepository.findByCodeIgnoreCaseAndOrgId(couponCode, summary.orgId()).orElse(null);\\n        if (coupon == java.util.List;\\nimport org.slf4j.Logger;\\nimport org.slf4j.LoggerFactory;\\nimport org.springframework.scheduling.annotation.Scheduled;\\nimport org.springframework.stereotype.Component;\\nimport org.springframework.transaction.annotation.Transactional;\\n\\n@Component\\npublic class CouponExpiryJob {\\n\\n    private static final Logger log = LoggerFactory.getLogger(CouponExpiryJob.class);\\n\\n    private final CouponRepository couponRepository;\\n    private final CouponUsageReservationRepository reservationRepository;\\n    private final DiscountSyncOrchestrator discountSyncOrchestrator;\\n\\n    public CouponExpiryJob(\\n        CouponRepository couponRepository,\\n        CouponUsageReservationRepository reservationRepository,\\n        DiscountSyncOrchestrator discountSyncOrchestrator\\n    ) {\\n        this.couponRepository = couponRepository;\\n        this.reservationRepository = reservationRepository;\\n        this.discountSyncOrchestrator = discountSyncOrchestrator;\\n    }\\n\\n    @Scheduled(cron = \\\"${promotions.jobs.coupon-expiry-cron:0 0 * * * *}\\\")\\n ## Entry 281
```
**Timestamp:** 2026-03-04T21:44:58.784Z
**Role/Type:** response_item
**Content:**
```json
{
  "timestamp": "2026-03-04T21:44:58.784Z",
  "type": "response_item",
  "payload": {
    "type": "function_call",
    "name": "exec_command",
    "arguments": "{\"cmd\":\"cat > booking-inventory/src/main/java/com/eventplatform/bookinginventory/event/listener/CouponAppliedListener.java <<'EOF'\\npackage com.eventplatform.bookinginventory.event.listener;\\n\\nimport com.eventplatform.bookinginventory.repository.CartRepository;\\nimport com.eventplatform.shared.common.event.published.CouponAppliedEvent;\\nimport java.math.BigDecimal;\\nimport org.slf4j.Logger;\\nimport org.slf4j.LoggerFactory;\\nimport org.springframework.stereotype.Component;\\nimport org.springframework.transaction.event.TransactionPhase;\\nimport org.springframework.transaction.event.TransactionalEventListener;\\n\\n@Component\\npublic class CouponAppliedListener {\\n\\n    private static final Logger log = LoggerFactory.getLogger(CouponAppliedListener.class);\\n\\n    private final CartRepository cartRepository;\\n\\n    public CouponAppliedListener(CartRepository cartRepository) {\\n        this.cartRepository = cartRepository;\\n    }\\n\\n    @TransactionalEventListener(phase = TransactionPhase.AFTER_COMMIT)\\n    public void onCouponApplied(CouponAppliedEvent event) {\\n        cartRepository.findById(event.cartId()).ifPresent(cart -> {\\n            if (!cart.getUserId().equals(event.userId())) {\\n                return;\\n            }\\n            BigDecimal amount = BigDecimal.valueOf(event.discountAmountInSmallestUnit())\\n                .divide(BigDecimal.valueOf(100));\\n            cart.setCouponCode(event.couponCode());\\n            cart.setCouponDiscountAmount(amount);\\n            cartRepository.save(cart);\\n            log.debug(\\\"Applied coupon discount to cart. cartId={} couponCode={} amount={}\\\",\\n                event.cartId(), event.couponCode(), amount);\\n        });\\n    }\\n}\\nEOF\"}",
    "call_id": "call_VaYiVSURgvUtqzM8OEa1TeDh"
  }
}
```

```json
    "call_id": "call_VaYiVSURgvUtqzM8OEa1TeDh"

}
```

```json
    "input": "*** Begin Patch\n*** Update File: promotions/src/main/java/com/eventplatform/promotions/service/CouponAdminService.java\n@@\n         Coupon coupon = couponRepository.findByCodeIgnoreCaseAndOrgId(couponCode, orgId)\n             .orElseThrow(() -> new CouponNotFoundException(couponCode));\n-        if (couponRedemptionRepository.existsByCouponIdAndBookingIdAndVoidedFalse(coupon.getId(), -1L)) {\n+        if (couponRedemptionRepository.existsByCouponIdAndVoidedFalse(coupon.getId())) {\n             throw new CouponHasActiveRedemptionsException(couponCode);\n         }\n*** End Patch\n"
```

```json
{
```

```json
  "type": "response_item",
  "payload": {
```
```json
    "type": "custom_tool_call",
    "status": "completed",
```
```json
    "call_id": "call_FlCp5QCzkUpPOt1VpByM2Jnu",
    "name": "apply_patch",
    "input": "*** Begin Patch\n*** Update File: promotions/src/main/java/com/eventplatform/promotions/service/CouponRedemptionService.java\n@@\n import com.eventplatform.promotions.repository.CouponUsageReservationRepository;\n import com.eventplatform.shared.common.dto.CartSummaryDto;\n+import com.eventplatform.shared.common.event.published.CouponAppliedEvent;\n import com.eventplatform.shared.common.service.CartSnapshotReader;\n import java.math.BigDecimal;\n import org.slf4j.Logger;\n import org.slf4j.LoggerFactory;\n+import org.springframework.context.ApplicationEventPublisher;\n import org.springframework.stereotype.Service;\n import org.springframework.transaction.annotation.Transactional;\n@@\n     private final CouponEligibilityService eligibilityService;\n     private final CartSnapshotReader cartSnapshotReader;\n     private final DiscountSyncOrchestrator discountSyncOrchestrator;\n+    private final ApplicationEventPublisher eventPublisher;\n@@\n         CouponEligibilityService eligibilityService,\n         CartSnapshotReader cartSnapshotReader,\n-        DiscountSyncOrchestrator discountSyncOrchestrator\n+        DiscountSyncOrchestrator discountSyncOrchestrator,\n+        ApplicationEventPublisher eventPublisher\n     ) {\n         this.couponRepository = couponRepository;\n         this.redemptionRepository = redemptionRepository;\n         this.reservationRepository = reservationRepository;\n         this.eligibilityService = eligibilityService;\n         this.cartSnapshotReader = cartSnapshotReader;\n         this.discountSyncOrchestrator = discountSyncOrchestrator;\n+        this.eventPublisher = eventPublisher;\n@@\n-        DiscountCalculationResult calc = eligibilityService.calculateDiscount(coupon, coupon.getPromotion().getDiscountValue().toString(), cartId);\n+        CartSummaryDto summary = cartSnapshotReader.getCartSummary(cartId);\n+        DiscountCalculationResult calc = eligibilityService.calculateDiscount(coupon, summary.currency(), cartId);\n@@\n     public void onCartAssembled(Long cartId, Long userId) {\n         CartSummaryDto summary = cartSnapshotReader.getCartSummary(cartId);\n         String couponCode = summary.couponCode();\n@@\n         if (coupon == null) {\n             return;\n         }\n \n         DiscountCalculationResult result = eligibilityService.calculateDiscount(coupon, summary.currency(), cartId);\n-        // Event republish ensures booking-inventory cart discount stays up to date right before payment.\n-        discountSyncOrchestrator.createSync(coupon.getId());\n+        eventPublisher.publishEvent(new CouponAppliedEvent(\n+            cartId,\n+            couponCode,\n+            result.discountAmountInSmallestUnit(),\n+            result.currency(),\n+            userId\n+        ));\n         log.debug(\"Cart assembled coupon check done cartId={} discount={}\", cartId, result.discountAmountInSmallestUnit());\n     }\n }\n*** End Patch\n"
  }
}
```

```json
{
  "timestamp": "2026-03-04T21:46:48.046Z",
  "type": "event_msg",
  "payload": {
    "type": "agent_message",
    "message": "Implemented FR7 from `POQ/Coupon/SPEC_7.md` (production code only, no tests added), aligned to `agents/CODING_AGENT.md` and your pre-fix baseline.\n\n**What I added**\n\n1. `promotions` module full implementation (domain, API, services, events, schedulers):\n- Entities + enums + repositories for promotions/coupons/redemptions/reservations/reconciliation/orphans.\n- Admin APIs:\n  - `POST/GET/GET{id}/PATCH/DELETE /api/v1/promotions`\n  - `POST/GET /api/v1/promotions/{promotionId}/coupons`\n  - `GET /api/v1/promotions/coupons/{couponCode}/usage`\n  - `DELETE /api/v1/promotions/coupons/{couponCode}`\n  - `POST /api/v1/promotions/coupons/{couponCode}/sync`\n  - `GET /api/v1/promotions/reconciliation/latest`\n  - `POST /api/v1/promotions/reconciliation/trigger`\n- User APIs:\n  - `POST /api/v1/promotions/validate`\n  - `DELETE /api/v1/promotions/cart/{cartId}/coupon`\n- Event listeners:\n  - `BookingConfirmedEvent`, `BookingCancelledEvent`, `PaymentFailedEvent`, `CartAssembledEvent`\n- Jobs:\n  - hourly coupon expiry/retry\n  - 4-hour reconciliation job\n- Key files:\n  - [PromotionService.java](/home/dell/Multi-City-Event-Booking/promotions/src/main/java/com/eventplatform/promotions/service/PromotionService.java)\n  - [CouponEligibilityService.java](/home/dell/Multi-City-Event-Booking/promotions/src/main/java/com/eventplatform/promotions/service/CouponEligibilityService.java)\n  - [CouponRedemptionService.java](/home/dell/Multi-City-Event-Booking/promotions/src/main/java/com/eventplatform/promotions/service/CouponRedemptionService.java)\n  - [CouponAdminController.java](/home/dell/Multi-City-Event-Booking/promotions/src/main/java/com/eventplatform/promotions/api/controller/CouponAdminController.java)\n  - [CouponUserController.java](/home/dell/Multi-City-Event-Booking/promotions/src/main/java/com/eventplatform/promotions/api/controller/CouponUserController.java)\n\n2. Eventbrite discount ACL facade in `shared` (missing before):\n- Added:\n  - [EbDiscountSyncService.java](/home/dell/Multi-City-Event-Booking/shared/src/main/java/com/eventplatform/shared/eventbrite/service/EbDiscountSyncService.java)\n  - [DefaultEbDiscountSyncService.java](/home/dell/Multi-City-Event-Booking/shared/src/main/java/com/eventplatform/shared/eventbrite/service/DefaultEbDiscountSyncService.java)\n  - [EbDiscountCreateRequest.java](/home/dell/Multi-City-Event-Booking/shared/src/main/java/com/eventplatform/shared/eventbrite/dto/request/EbDiscountCreateRequest.java)\n  - [EbDiscountResponse.java](/home/dell/Multi-City-Event-Booking/shared/src/main/java/com/eventplatform/shared/eventbrite/dto/response/EbDiscountResponse.java)\n\n3. Booking-inventory coupon application consumer:\n- Added [CouponAppliedListener.java](/home/dell/Multi-City-Event-Booking/booking-inventory/src/main/java/com/eventplatform/bookinginventory/event/listener/CouponAppliedListener.java) to persist `couponCode` + `couponDiscountAmount` on cart when `CouponAppliedEvent` is published.\n\n4. Flyway migration for FR7 tables:\n- Added [V37__create_promotions_tables.sql](/home/dell/Multi-City-Event-Booking/app/src/main/resources/db/migration/V37__create_promotions_tables.sql)\n\n**Validation done**\n- Compile-only checks passed:\n  - `mvn -pl shared,promotions,booking-inventory -am compile -DskipTests`\n  - `mvn -pl app -am compile -DskipTests`\n\nNo tests were written or run beyond compile checks, per your instruction.",
    "phase": "final_answer"
  }
}
```

```json
{
  "timestamp": "2026-03-04T21:46:48.055Z",

  "payload": {
    "type": "task_complete",
    "turn_id": "019cbac7-05f4-7850-9df6-294d1d9e33d6",
    "last_agent_message": "Implemented FR7 from `POQ/Coupon/SPEC_7.md` (production code only, no tests added), aligned to `agents/CODING_AGENT.md` and your pre-fix baseline.\n\n**What I added**\n\n1. `promotions` module full implementation (domain, API, services, events, schedulers):\n- Entities + enums + repositories for promotions/coupons/redemptions/reservations/reconciliation/orphans.\n- Admin APIs:\n  - `POST/GET/GET{id}/PATCH/DELETE /api/v1/promotions`\n  - `POST/GET /api/v1/promotions/{promotionId}/coupons`\n  - `GET /api/v1/promotions/coupons/{couponCode}/usage`\n  - `DELETE /api/v1/promotions/coupons/{couponCode}`\n  - `POST /api/v1/promotions/coupons/{couponCode}/sync`\n  - `GET /api/v1/promotions/reconciliation/latest`\n  - `POST /api/v1/promotions/reconciliation/trigger`\n- User APIs:\n  - `POST /api/v1/promotions/validate`\n  - `DELETE /api/v1/promotions/cart/{cartId}/coupon`\n- Event listeners:\n  - `BookingConfirmedEvent`, `BookingCancelledEvent`, `PaymentFailedEvent`, `CartAssembledEvent`\n- Jobs:\n  - hourly coupon expiry/retry\n  - 4-hour reconciliation job\n- Key files:\n  - [PromotionService.java](/home/dell/Multi-City-Event-Booking/promotions/src/main/java/com/eventplatform/promotions/service/PromotionService.java)\n  - [CouponEligibilityService.java](/home/dell/Multi-City-Event-Booking/promotions/src/main/java/com/eventplatform/promotions/service/CouponEligibilityService.java)\n  - [CouponRedemptionService.java](/home/dell/Multi-City-Event-Booking/promotions/src/main/java/com/eventplatform/promotions/service/CouponRedemptionService.java)\n  - [CouponAdminController.java](/home/dell/Multi-City-Event-Booking/promotions/src/main/java/com/eventplatform/promotions/api/controller/CouponAdminController.java)\n  - [CouponUserController.java](/home/dell/Multi-City-Event-Booking/promotions/src/main/java/com/eventplatform/promotions/api/controller/CouponUserController.java)\n\n2. Eventbrite discount ACL facade in `shared` (missing before):\n- Added:\n  - [EbDiscountSyncService.java](/home/dell/Multi-City-Event-Booking/shared/src/main/java/com/eventplatform/shared/eventbrite/service/EbDiscountSyncService.java)\n  - [DefaultEbDiscountSyncService.java](/home/dell/Multi-City-Event-Booking/shared/src/main/java/com/eventplatform/shared/eventbrite/service/DefaultEbDiscountSyncService.java)\n  - [EbDiscountCreateRequest.java](/home/dell/Multi-City-Event-Booking/shared/src/main/java/com/eventplatform/shared/eventbrite/dto/request/EbDiscountCreateRequest.java)\n  - [EbDiscountResponse.java](/home/dell/Multi-City-Event-Booking/shared/src/main/java/com/eventplatform/shared/eventbrite/dto/response/EbDiscountResponse.java)\n\n3. Booking-inventory coupon application consumer:\n- Added [CouponAppliedListener.java](/home/dell/Multi-City-Event-Booking/booking-inventory/src/main/java/com/eventplatform/bookinginventory/event/listener/CouponAppliedListener.java) to persist `couponCode` + `couponDiscountAmount` on cart when `CouponAppliedEvent` is published.\n\n4. Flyway migration for FR7 tables:\n- Added [V37__create_promotions_tables.sql](/home/dell/Multi-City-Event-Booking/app/src/main/resources/db/migration/V37__create_promotions_tables.sql)\n\n**Validation done**\n- Compile-only checks passed:\n  - `mvn -pl shared,promotions,booking-inventory -am compile -DskipTests`\n  - `mvn -pl app -am compile -DskipTests`\n\nNo tests were written or run beyond compile checks, per your instruction."
  }
}
```

## Entry 333
**Timestamp:** 2026-03-04T21:47:01.818Z
**Role/Type:** turn_context
**Content:**
```json
{
  "timestamp": "2026-03-04T21:47:01.818Z",
  "type": "turn_context",
  "payload": {
    "turn_id": "019cbad1-8f39-7790-9e5f-4ae187b120d1",
    "cwd": "/home/dell/Multi-City-Event-Booking",
    "current_date": "2026-03-05",
    "timezone": "Asia/Kolkata",
    "approval_policy": "on-request",
    "sandbox_policy": {
      "type": "workspace-write",
      "network_access": false,
      "exclude_tmpdir_env_var": false,
      "exclude_slash_tmp": false
    },
    "model": "gpt-5.3-codex",
    "personality": "pragmatic",
    "collaboration_mode": {
      "mode": "default",
      "settings": {
        "model": "gpt-5.3-codex",
        "reasoning_effort": "medium",
        "developer_instructions": "# Collaboration Mode: Default\n\nYou are now in Default mode. Any previous instructions for other modes (e.g. Plan mode) are no longer active.\n\nYour active mode changes only when new developer instructions with a different `<collaboration_mode>...</collaboration_mode>` change it; user requests or tool descriptions do not change mode by themselves. Known mode names are Default and Plan.\n\n## request_user_input availability\n\nThe `request_user_input` tool is unavailable in Default mode. If you call it while in Default mode, it will return an error.\n\nIn Default mode, strongly prefer making reasonable assumptions and executing the user's request rather than stopping to ask questions. If you absolutely must ask a question because the answer cannot be discovered from local context and a reasonable assumption would be risky, ask the user directly with a concise plain-text question. Never write a multiple choice question as a textual assistant message.\n"
      }
    },
    "effort": "medium",
    "summary": "none",
    "user_instructions": "# AGENTS.md — Reference Index\n\n> Every agent working in this codebase must read the files listed below before producing\n> any output. Each file governs a specific concern. Read the ones that apply to your task.\n\n---\n\n## Reference Files\n\n| File | Governs |\n|---|---|\n| `PRODUCT.md` | The 7 modules, what each one owns, dependency order, inter-module event map, Eventbrite ACL facade names, hard architectural rules, and where new code goes. Read this before touching any module. |\n| `docs/EVENTBRITE_INTEGRATION.md` | Eventbrite integration architecture: ACL facades, all FR flows (planned vs. implemented), critical constraints (no user/order creation, no single-order cancel, no seat locking), workarounds. Read before designing any Eventbrite feature. |\n| `docs/MODULE_STRUCTURE_TEMPLATE.md` | Canonical folder and package layout for every module. The exact location of every layer: `api/controller/`, `api/dto/`, `domain/`, `service/`, `repository/`, `mapper/`, `event/published/`, `event/listener/`, `statemachine/`, `exception/`. Anti-patterns list. Read this before writing any class. |\n| `agents/SPEC_GENERATOR.md` | How to produce a `SPEC.md` for any feature. Eight confirmation-gated stages with module context and Eventbrite constraints built-in. Requirements → Domain Model → Architecture & File Structure → DB Schema → API → Business Logic → Error Handling → Tests. Read this before speccing any feature. |\n| `agents/CODING_AGENT.md` | Spring Boot 3.5.11 / Java 21 coding standards. Domain behaviour, service orchestration, mapper rules, controller rules, event rules, 10 Eventbrite ACL facades, inter-module communication (REST + Spring Events), admin/ special rules, state machine, Spring AI. Read this before writing any production code. |\n| `agents/TEST_AGENT.md` | Test agent responsibilities and best practices. Builds tests from `SPEC_*.md` Stage 8, executes tests, fixes test/code issues caused by behavior mismatches, and writes timestamped logs under `test_result_folder/`. Read this before writing or running tests. |\n| `docs/TESTING_GUIDE.md` | Four-layer test structure: `domain/` (unit), `service/` (Mockito), `api/` (@WebMvcTest), `arch/` (ArchUnit enforcing 10 hard rules + Eventbrite constraints). All rule examples, happy path, negative path, exception patterns. Read before writing any test. |\n| `mock-eventbrite-api/README.md` | **Mock Eventbrite Service:** Python FastAPI in-memory mock of Eventbrite API v3. Used for local development and testing. Exposes all 10 ACL facade endpoints without hitting production Eventbrite. See setup instructions below. |\n\n---\n\n## Module Quick Reference\n\nFull detail for each module is in `PRODUCT.md`. This table is a lookup only.\n\n| Module | Owns | External ACL Facades Used |\n|---|---|---|\n| `discovery-catalog` | Events, Venues, Cities, catalog sync | `EbEventSyncService`, `EbTicketService` |\n| `scheduling` | Show slots, conflict validation | `EbEventSyncService` |\n| `identity` | Users, JWT, profiles, preferences, wallet | — |\n| `booking-inventory` | Seats, SeatMap, Cart, Pricing, Seat Lock State Machine | `EbTicketService` |\n| `payments-ticketing` | Bookings, Payments, E-Tickets, Cancellations, Refunds, Wallet | `StripePaymentService`, `StripeRefundService`, `StripeWebhookHandler` |\n| `promotions` | Coupons, Promotions, Eligibility rules | `EbDiscountSyncService` |\n| `engagement` | Reviews, Moderation, AI Chatbot (`service/chatbot/`), RAG pipeline | `EbEventSyncService`, `EbAttendeeService` |\n| `admin/` | No domain ownership. Orchestration and aggregation only. | — |\n| `shared/` | All external ACL facades, JWT, base classes, common DTOs, configs | — |\n\n---\n\n## Hard Rules — Never Violate\n\nCanonical numbering and wording are owned by `PRODUCT.md` Section 9. These shorthand rules apply to every task without exception.\n\n1. No module imports another module's `@Service`, `@Entity`, or `@Repository`.\n  - Exception: `admin/` MAY import module `@Service` beans for READ operations only; all writes MUST go through the owning module REST API.\n2. No module calls Eventbrite, Stripe, or OpenAI HTTP directly — only through `shared/` ACL facades.\n3. ACL facade names are exactly as listed below — never invent new ones.\n4. Spring Events carry only primitives, IDs, enums, and value objects — never `@Entity` objects.\n5. One `GlobalExceptionHandler` in `shared/common/exception/` — never `@ControllerAdvice` in a module.\n6. All field mapping goes in `mapper/` using MapStruct — never inside a service or controller.\n7. `admin/` owns no `@Entity` and no database table.\n8. `shared/` has no dependency on any module.\n9. `app/` has zero business logic.\n10. Dependency direction is strictly downward — no circular imports between modules.\n\n---\n\n## Eventbrite ACL Facade Names (HARD RULE #3)\nRead the docs/eventbriteapiv3public.apib for detail API Endpoint with schema, Response, Request and errors\n\nAll 10 facades are in `shared/eventbrite/service/`. These are the ONLY things modules call for Eventbrite:\n\n1. **EbEventSyncService** — Create, update, publish, cancel events; pull org event catalog\n2. **EbVenueService** — Create and update venues; list org venues\n3. **EbScheduleService** — Create recurring event schedules and occurrences\n4. **EbTicketService** — Create/update ticket classes; manage inventory; check availability\n5. **EbCapacityService** — Retrieve and update event capacity tiers\n6. **EbOrderService** — Read orders post-checkout (admin/ reporting only — NOT used in FR5/FR6 payment flows; JS SDK widget only creates orders)\n7. **EbAttendeeService** — List attendees; verify attendance for reviews (engagement only — FR8 attendance verification)\n8. **EbDiscountSyncService** — Create, update, delete discount codes\n9. **EbRefundService** — INACTIVE for payments — all refunds go through `StripeRefundService`; original EB refund read-only API has no submission endpoint\n10. **EbWebhookService** — Mock/testing only; not used in production registration flow\n\n**See `docs/EVENTBRITE_INTEGRATION.md` for which module uses which facade and what gaps exist.**\n\n---\n\n## Stripe ACL Facades (payments-ticketing only)\n\nAll 3 facades are in `shared/stripe/service/`. Only `payments-ticketing` calls these:\n\n1. **StripePaymentService** — Create PaymentIntents; confirm and capture payments\n2. **StripeRefundService** — Submit refunds; query refund status\n3. **StripeWebhookHandler** — Verify webhook signatures; parse `payment_intent.succeeded` / `payment_intent.payment_failed` / `charge.refunded` events\n\n**Hard Rule:** Never call `com.stripe.*` SDK classes directly from a module service — always delegate to the facade in `shared/stripe/service/`.\n\n---\n\n## Module Dependency Order (HARD RULE #10)\n\n```\nshared/               <- foundational; no dependencies\n  |\n  v\ndiscovery-catalog    <- depends on shared only\n  |\n  v\nscheduling           <- depends on shared + discovery-catalog (REST reads)\nidentity             <- depends on shared only\n  |\n  v\nbooking-inventory    <- depends on shared + discovery-catalog (REST reads)\n  |\n  v\npayments-ticketing   <- depends on shared + booking-inventory + identity (REST)\n  |\n  v\npromotions           <- depends on shared + booking-inventory + identity (REST)\n  |\n  v\nengagement           <- depends on shared + payments-ticketing + identity (REST)\n  |\n  v\nadmin/               <- thin orchestration; reads from all, writes via REST APIs\n  |\n  v\napp/                 <- entry point only; zero business logic\n```\n\n**Golden Rule:** Module at level N can depend on level N-1 or lower (or `shared/`) only. Never import from sibling or downstream modules.\n\n**See `PRODUCT.md` Section 2 for detailed rationale.**\n\n\n## Skills\nA skill is a set of local instructions to follow that is stored in a `SKILL.md` file. Below is the list of skills that can be used. Each entry includes a name, description, and file path so you can open the source for full instructions when using a specific skill.\n### Available skills\n- find-skills: Helps users discover and install agent skills when they ask questions like \"how do I do X\", \"find a skill for X\", \"is there a skill that can...\", or express interest in extending capabilities. This skill should be used when the user is looking for functionality that might exist as an installable skill. (file: /home/dell/.agents/skills/find-skills/SKILL.md)\n- skill-creator: Guide for creating effective skills. This skill should be used when users want to create a new skill (or update an existing skill) that extends Codex's capabilities with specialized knowledge, workflows, or tool integrations. (file: /home/dell/.codex/skills/.system/skill-creator/SKILL.md)\n- skill-installer: Install Codex skills into $CODEX_HOME/skills from a curated list or a GitHub repo path. Use when a user asks to list installable skills, install a curated skill, or install a skill from another repo (including private repos). (file: /home/dell/.codex/skills/.system/skill-installer/SKILL.md)\n### How to use skills\n- Discovery: The list above is the skills available in this session (name + description + file path). Skill bodies live on disk at the listed paths.\n- Trigger rules: If the user names a skill (with `$SkillName` or plain text) OR the task clearly matches a skill's description shown above, you must use that skill for that turn. Multiple mentions mean use them all. Do not carry skills across turns unless re-mentioned.\n- Missing/blocked: If a named skill isn't in the list or the path can't be read, say so briefly and continue with the best fallback.\n- How to use a skill (progressive disclosure):\n  1) After deciding to use a skill, open its `SKILL.md`. Read only enough to follow the workflow.\n  2) When `SKILL.md` references relative paths (e.g., `scripts/foo.py`), resolve them relative to the skill directory listed above first, and only consider other paths if needed.\n  3) If `SKILL.md` points to extra folders such as `references/`, load only the specific files needed for the request; don't bulk-load everything.\n  4) If `scripts/` exist, prefer running or patching them instead of retyping large code blocks.\n  5) If `assets/` or templates exist, reuse them instead of recreating from scratch.\n- Coordination and sequencing:\n  - If multiple skills apply, choose the minimal set that covers the request and state the order you'll use them.\n  - Announce which skill(s) you're using and why (one short line). If you skip an obvious skill, say why.\n- Context hygiene:\n  - Keep context small: summarize long sections instead of pasting them; only load extra files when needed.\n  - Avoid deep reference-chasing: prefer opening only files directly linked from `SKILL.md` unless you're blocked.\n  - When variants exist (frameworks, providers, domains), pick only the relevant reference file(s) and note that choice.\n- Safety and fallback: If a skill can't be applied cleanly (missing files, unclear instructions), state the issue, pick the next-best approach, and continue.",
    "truncation_policy": {
      "mode": "tokens",
      "limit": 10000
    }
  }
}
```

Read this before writing any production code. |\n| `agents/TEST_AGENT.md` | Test agent responsibilities and best practices. Builds tests from `SPEC_*.md` Stage 8, executes tests, fixes test/code issues caused by behavior mismatches, and writes timestamped logs under `test_result_folder/`. Read this before writing or running tests. |\n| `docs/TESTING_GUIDE.md` | Four-layer test structure: `domain/` (unit), `service/` (Mockito), `api/` (@WebMvcTest), `arch/` (ArchUnit enforcing 10 hard rules + Eventbrite constraints). All rule examples, happy path, negative path, exception patterns. Read before writing any test. |\n| `mock-eventbrite-api/README.md` | **Mock Eventbrite Service:** Python FastAPI in-memory mock of Eventbrite API v3. Used for local development and testing. Exposes all 10 ACL facade endpoints without hitting production Eventbrite. See setup instructions below. |\n\n---\n\n## Module Quick Reference\n\nFull detail for each module is in `PRODUCT.md`. This table is a lookup only.\n\n| Module | Owns | External ACL Facades Used |\n|---|---|---|\n| `discovery-catalog` | Events, Venues, Cities, catalog sync | `EbEventSyncService`, `EbTicketService` |\n| `scheduling` | Show slots, conflict validation | `EbEventSyncService` |\n| `identity` | Users, JWT, profiles, preferences, wallet | — |\n| `booking-inventory` | Seats, SeatMap, Cart, Pricing, Seat Lock State Machine | `EbTicketService` |\n| `payments-ticketing` | Bookings, Payments, E-Tickets, Cancellations, Refunds, Wallet | `StripePaymentService`, `StripeRefundService`, `StripeWebhookHandler` |\n| `promotions` | Coupons, Promotions, Eligibility rules | `EbDiscountSyncService` |\n| `engagement` | Reviews, Moderation, AI Chatbot (`service/chatbot/`), RAG pipeline | `EbEventSyncService`, `EbAttendeeService` |\n| `admin/` | No domain ownership. Orchestration and aggregation only. | — |\n| `shared/` | All external ACL facades, JWT, base classes, common DTOs, configs | — |\n\n---\n\n## Hard Rules — Never Violate\n\nCanonical numbering and wording are owned by `PRODUCT.md` Section 9. These shorthand rules apply to every task without exception.\n\n1. No module imports another module's `@Service`, `@Entity`, or `@Repository`.\n  - Exception: `admin/` MAY import module `@Service` beans for READ operations only; all writes MUST go through the owning module REST API.\n2. No module calls Eventbrite, Stripe, or OpenAI HTTP directly — only through `shared/` ACL facades.\n3. ACL facade names are exactly as listed below — never invent new ones.\n4. Spring Events carry only primitives, IDs, enums, and value objects — never `@Entity` objects.\n5. One `GlobalExceptionHandler` in `shared/common/exception/` — never `@ControllerAdvice` in a module.\n6. All field mapping goes in `mapper/` using MapStruct — never inside a service or controller.\n7. `admin/` owns no `@Entity` and no database table.\n8. `shared/` has no dependency on any module.\n9. `app/` has zero business logic.\n10. Dependency direction is strictly downward — no circular imports between modules.\n\n---\n\n## Eventbrite ACL Facade Names (HARD RULE #3)\nRead the docs/eventbriteapiv3public.apib for detail API Endpoint with schema, Response, Request and errors\n\nAll 10 facades are in `shared/eventbrite/service/`. These are the ONLY things modules call for Eventbrite:\n\n1. **EbEventSyncService** — Create, update, publish, cancel events; pull org event catalog\n2. **EbVenueService** — Create and update venues; list org venues\n3. **EbScheduleService** — Create recurring event schedules and occurrences\n4. **EbTicketService** — Create/update ticket classes; manage inventory; check availability\n5. **EbCapacityService** — Retrieve and update event capacity tiers\n6. **EbOrderService** — Read orders post-checkout (admin/ reporting only — NOT used in FR5/FR6 payment flows; JS SDK widget only creates orders)\n7. **EbAttendeeService** — List attendees; verify attendance for reviews (engagement only — FR8 attendance verification)\n8. **EbDiscountSyncService** — Create, update, delete discount codes\n9. **EbRefundService** — INACTIVE for payments — all refunds go through `StripeRefundService`; original EB refund read-only API has no submission endpoint\n10. **EbWebhookService** — Mock/testing only; not used in production registration flow\n\n**See `docs/EVENTBRITE_INTEGRATION.md` for which module uses which facade and what gaps exist.**\n\n---\n\n## Stripe ACL Facades (payments-ticketing only)\n\nAll 3 facades are in `shared/stripe/service/`. Only `payments-ticketing` calls these:\n\n1. **StripePaymentService** — Create PaymentIntents; confirm and capture payments\n2. **StripeRefundService** — Submit refunds; query refund status\n3. **StripeWebhookHandler** — Verify webhook signatures; parse `payment_intent.succeeded` / `payment_intent.payment_failed` / `charge.refunded` events\n\n**Hard Rule:** Never call `com.stripe.*` SDK classes directly from a module service — always delegate to the facade in `shared/stripe/service/`.\n\n---\n\n## Module Dependency Order (HARD RULE #10)\n\n```\nshared/               <- foundational; no dependencies\n  |\n  v\ndiscovery-catalog    <- depends on shared only\n  |\n  v\nscheduling           <- depends on shared + discovery-catalog (REST reads)\nidentity             <- depends on shared only\n  |\n  v\nbooking-inventory    <- depends on shared + discovery-catalog (REST reads)\n  |\n  v\npayments-ticketing   <- depends on shared + booking-inventory + identity (REST)\n  |\n  v\npromotions           <- depends on shared + booking-inventory + identity (REST)\n  |\n  v\nengagement           <- depends on shared + payments-ticketing + identity (REST)\n  |\n  v\nadmin/               <- thin orchestration; reads from all, writes via REST APIs\n  |\n  v\napp/                 <- entry point only; zero business logic\n```\n\n**Golden Rule:** Module at level N can depend on level N-1 or lower (or `shared/`) only. Never import from sibling or downstream modules.\n\n**See `PRODUCT.md` Section 2 for detailed rationale.**\n\n\n## Skills\nA skill is a set of local instructions to follow that is stored in a `SKILL.md` file. Below is the list of skills that can be used. Each entry includes a name, description, and file path so you can open the source for full instructions when using a specific skill.\n### Available skills\n- find-skills: Helps users discover and install agent skills when they ask questions like \"how do I do X\", \"find a skill for X\", \"is there a skill that can...\", or express interest in extending capabilities. This skill should be used when the user is looking for functionality that might exist as an installable skill. (file: /home/dell/.agents/skills/find-skills/SKILL.md)\n- skill-creator: Guide for creating effective skills. This skill should be used when users want to create a new skill (or update an existing skill) that extends Codex's capabilities with specialized knowledge, workflows, or tool integrations. (file: /home/dell/.codex/skills/.system/skill-creator/SKILL.md)\n- skill-installer: Install Codex skills into $CODEX_HOME/skills from a curated list or a GitHub repo path. Use when a user asks to list installable skills, install a curated skill, or install a skill from another repo (including private repos). (file: /home/dell/.codex/skills/.system/skill-installer/SKILL.md)\n### How to use skills\n- Discovery: The list above is the skills available in this session (name + description + file path). Skill bodies live on disk at the listed paths.\n- Trigger rules: If the user names a skill (with `$SkillName` or plain text) OR the task clearly matches a skill's description shown above, you must use that skill for that turn. Multiple mentions mean use them all. Do not carry skills across turns unless re-mentioned.\n- Missing/blocked: If a named skill isn't in the list or the path can't be read, say so briefly and continue with the best fallback.\n- How to use a skill (progressive disclosure):\n  1) After deciding to use a skill, open its `SKILL.md`. Read only enough to follow the workflow.\n  2) When `SKILL.md` references relative paths (e.g., `scripts/foo.py`), resolve them relative to the skill directory listed above first, and only consider other paths if needed.\n  3) If `SKILL.md` points to extra folders such as `references/`, load only the specific files needed for the request; don't bulk-load everything.\n  4) If `scripts/` exist, prefer running or patching them instead of retyping large code blocks.\n  5) If `assets/` or templates exist, reuse them instead of recreating from scratch.\n- Coordination and sequencing:\n  - If multiple skills apply, choose the minimal set that covers the request and state the order you'll use them.\n  - Announce which skill(s) you're using and why (one short line). If you skip an obvious skill, say why.\n- Context hygiene:\n  - Keep context small: summarize long sections instead of pasting them; only load extra files when needed.\n  - Avoid deep reference-chasing: prefer opening only files directly linked from `SKILL.md` unless you're blocked.\n  - When variants exist (frameworks, providers, domains), pick only the relevant reference file(s) and note that choice.\n- Safety and fallback: If a skill can't be applied cleanly (missing files, unclear instructions), state the issue, pick the next-best approach, and continue.",
```json
    "truncation_policy": {
      "mode": "tokens",
      "limit": 10000
    }
  }
}
```

## Entry 364
**Timestamp:** 2026-03-04T21:47:55.649Z
**Role/Type:** turn_context
**Content:**
```json
{
  "timestamp": "2026-03-04T21:47:55.649Z",
  "type": "turn_context",
  "payload": {
    "turn_id": "019cbad2-6180-71f3-92b3-da68d704110f",
    "cwd": "/home/dell/Multi-City-Event-Booking",
    "current_date": "2026-03-05",
    "timezone": "Asia/Kolkata",
    "approval_policy": "on-request",
    "sandbox_policy": {
      "type": "workspace-write",
      "network_access": false,
      "exclude_tmpdir_env_var": false,
      "exclude_slash_tmp": false
    },
    "model": "gpt-5.3-codex",
    "personality": "pragmatic",
    "collaboration_mode": {
      "mode": "default",
      "settings": {
        "model": "gpt-5.3-codex",
        "reasoning_effort": "medium",
        "developer_instructions": "# Collaboration Mode: Default\n\nYou are now in Default mode. Any previous instructions for other modes (e.g. Plan mode) are no longer active.\n\nYour active mode changes only when new developer instructions with a different `<collaboration_mode>...</collaboration_mode>` change it; user requests or tool descriptions do not change mode by themselves. Known mode names are Default and Plan.\n\n## request_user_input availability\n\nThe `request_user_input` tool is unavailable in Default mode. If you call it while in Default mode, it will return an error.\n\nIn Default mode, strongly prefer making reasonable assumptions and executing the user's request rather than stopping to ask questions. If you absolutely must ask a question because the answer cannot be discovered from local context and a reasonable assumption would be risky, ask the user directly with a concise plain-text question. Never write a multiple choice question as a textual assistant message.\n"
      }
    },
    "effort": "medium",
    "summary": "none",
    "user_instructions": "# AGENTS.md — Reference Index\n\n> Every agent working in this codebase must read the files listed below before producing\n> any output. Each file governs a specific concern. Read the ones that apply to your task.\n\n---\n\n## Reference Files\n\n| File | Governs |\n|---|---|\n| `PRODUCT.md` | The 7 modules, what each one owns, dependency order, inter-module event map, Eventbrite ACL facade names, hard architectural rules, and where new code goes. Read this before touching any module. |\n| `docs/EVENTBRITE_INTEGRATION.md` | Eventbrite integration architecture: ACL facades, all FR flows (planned vs. implemented), critical constraints (no user/order creation, no single-order cancel, no seat locking), workarounds. Read before designing any Eventbrite feature. |\n| `docs/MODULE_STRUCTURE_TEMPLATE.md` | Canonical folder and package layout for every module. The exact location of every layer: `api/controller/`, `api/dto/`, `domain/`, `service/`, `repository/`, `mapper/`, `event/published/`, `event/listener/`, `statemachine/`, `exception/`. Anti-patterns list. Read this before writing any class. |\n| `agents/SPEC_GENERATOR.md` | How to produce a `SPEC.md` for any feature. Eight confirmation-gated stages with module context and Eventbrite constraints built-in. Requirements → Domain Model → Architecture & File Structure → DB Schema → API → Business Logic → Error Handling → Tests. Read this before speccing any feature. |\n| `agents/CODING_AGENT.md` | Spring Boot 3.5.11 / Java 21 coding standards. Domain behaviour, service orchestration, mapper rules, controller rules, event rules, 10 Eventbrite ACL facades, inter-module communication (REST + Spring Events), admin/ special rules, state machine, Spring AI. Read this before writing any production code. |\n| `agents/TEST_AGENT.md` | Test agent responsibilities and best practices. Builds tests from `SPEC_*.md` Stage 8, executes tests, fixes test/code issues caused by behavior mismatches, and writes timestamped logs under `test_result_folder/`. Read this before writing or running tests. |\n| `docs/TESTING_GUIDE.md` | Four-layer test structure: `domain/` (unit), `service/` (Mockito), `api/` (@WebMvcTest), `arch/` (ArchUnit enforcing 10 hard rules + Eventbrite constraints). All rule examples, happy path, negative path, exception patterns. Read before writing any test. |\n| `mock-eventbrite-api/README.md` | **Mock Eventbrite Service:** Python FastAPI in-memory mock of Eventbrite API v3. Used for local development and testing. Exposes all 10 ACL facade endpoints without hitting production Eventbrite. See setup instructions below. |\n\n---\n\n## Module Quick Reference\n\nFull detail for each module is in `PRODUCT.md`. This table is a lookup only.\n\n| Module | Owns | External ACL Facades Used |\n|---|---|---|\n| `discovery-catalog` | Events, Venues, Cities, catalog sync | `EbEventSyncService`, `EbTicketService` |\n| `scheduling` | Show slots, conflict validation | `EbEventSyncService` |\n| `identity` | Users, JWT, profiles, preferences, wallet | — |\n| `booking-inventory` | Seats, SeatMap, Cart, Pricing, Seat Lock State Machine | `EbTicketService` |\n| `payments-ticketing` | Bookings, Payments, E-Tickets, Cancellations, Refunds, Wallet | `StripePaymentService`, `StripeRefundService`, `StripeWebhookHandler` |\n| `promotions` | Coupons, Promotions, Eligibility rules | `EbDiscountSyncService` |\n| `engagement` | Reviews, Moderation, AI Chatbot (`service/chatbot/`), RAG pipeline | `EbEventSyncService`, `EbAttendeeService` |\n| `admin/` | No domain ownership. Orchestration and aggregation only. | — |\n| `shared/` | All external ACL facades, JWT, base classes, common DTOs, configs | — |\n\n---\n\n## Hard Rules — Never Violate\n\nCanonical numbering and wording are owned by `PRODUCT.md` Section 9. These shorthand rules apply to every task without exception.\n\n1. No module imports another module's `@Service`, `@Entity`, or `@Repository`.\n  - Exception: `admin/` MAY import module `@Service` beans for READ operations only; all writes MUST go through the owning module REST API.\n2. No module calls Eventbrite, Stripe, or OpenAI HTTP directly — only through `shared/` ACL facades.\n3. ACL facade names are exactly as listed below — never invent new ones.\n4. Spring Events carry only primitives, IDs, enums, and value objects — never `@Entity` objects.\n5. One `GlobalExceptionHandler` in `shared/common/exception/` — never `@ControllerAdvice` in a module.\n6. All field mapping goes in `mapper/` using MapStruct — never inside a service or controller.\n7. `admin/` owns no `@Entity` and no database table.\n8. `shared/` has no dependency on any module.\n9. `app/` has zero business logic.\n10. Dependency direction is strictly downward — no circular imports between modules.\n\n---\n\n## Eventbrite ACL Facade Names (HARD RULE #3)\nRead the docs/eventbriteapiv3public.apib for detail API Endpoint with schema, Response, Request and errors\n\nAll 10 facades are in `shared/eventbrite/service/`. These are the ONLY things modules call for Eventbrite:\n\n1. **EbEventSyncService** — Create, update, publish, cancel events; pull org event catalog\n2. **EbVenueService** — Create and update venues; list org venues\n3. **EbScheduleService** — Create recurring event schedules and occurrences\n4. **EbTicketService** — Create/update ticket classes; manage inventory; check availability\n5. **EbCapacityService** — Retrieve and update event capacity tiers\n6. **EbOrderService** — Read orders post-checkout (admin/ reporting only — NOT used in FR5/FR6 payment flows; JS SDK widget only creates orders)\n7. **EbAttendeeService** — List attendees; verify attendance for reviews (engagement only — FR8 attendance verification)\n8. **EbDiscountSyncService** — Create, update, delete discount codes\n9. **EbRefundService** — INACTIVE for payments — all refunds go through `StripeRefundService`; original EB refund read-only API has no submission endpoint\n10. **EbWebhookService** — Mock/testing only; not used in production registration flow\n\n**See `docs/EVENTBRITE_INTEGRATION.md` for which module uses which facade and what gaps exist.**\n\n---\n\n## Stripe ACL Facades (payments-ticketing only)\n\nAll 3 facades are in `shared/stripe/service/`. Only `payments-ticketing` calls these:\n\n1. **StripePaymentService** — Create PaymentIntents; confirm and capture payments\n2. **StripeRefundService** — Submit refunds; query refund status\n3. **StripeWebhookHandler** — Verify webhook signatures; parse `payment_intent.succeeded` / `payment_intent.payment_failed` / `charge.refunded` events\n\n**Hard Rule:** Never call `com.stripe.*` SDK classes directly from a module service — always delegate to the facade in `shared/stripe/service/`.\n\n---\n\n## Module Dependency Order (HARD RULE #10)\n\n```\nshared/               <- foundational; no dependencies\n  |\n  v\ndiscovery-catalog    <- depends on shared only\n  |\n  v\nscheduling           <- depends on shared + discovery-catalog (REST reads)\nidentity             <- depends on shared only\n  |\n  v\nbooking-inventory    <- depends on shared + discovery-catalog (REST reads)\n  |\n  v\npayments-ticketing   <- depends on shared + booking-inventory + identity (REST)\n  |\n  v\npromotions           <- depends on shared + booking-inventory + identity (REST)\n  |\n  v\nengagement           <- depends on shared + payments-ticketing + identity (REST)\n  |\n  v\nadmin/               <- thin orchestration; reads from all, writes via REST APIs\n  |\n  v\napp/                 <- entry point only; zero business logic\n```\n\n**Golden Rule:** Module at level N can depend on level N-1 or lower (or `shared/`) only. Never import from sibling or downstream modules.\n\n**See `PRODUCT.md` Section 2 for detailed rationale.**\n\n\n## Skills\nA skill is a set of local instructions to follow that is stored in a `SKILL.md` file. Below is the list of skills that can be used. Each entry includes a name, description, and file path so you can open the source for full instructions when using a specific skill.\n### Available skills\n- find-skills: Helps users discover and install agent skills when they ask questions like \"how do I do X\", \"find a skill for X\", \"is there a skill that can...\", or express interest in extending capabilities. This skill should be used when the user is looking for functionality that might exist as an installable skill. (file: /home/dell/.agents/skills/find-skills/SKILL.md)\n- skill-creator: Guide for creating effective skills. This skill should be used when users want to create a new skill (or update an existing skill) that extends Codex's capabilities with specialized knowledge, workflows, or tool integrations. (file: /home/dell/.codex/skills/.system/skill-creator/SKILL.md)\n- skill-installer: Install Codex skills into $CODEX_HOME/skills from a curated list or a GitHub repo path. Use when a user asks to list installable skills, install a curated skill, or install a skill from another repo (including private repos). (file: /home/dell/.codex/skills/.system/skill-installer/SKILL.md)\n### How to use skills\n- Discovery: The list above is the skills available in this session (name + description + file path). Skill bodies live on disk at the listed paths.\n- Trigger rules: If the user names a skill (with `$SkillName` or plain text) OR the task clearly matches a skill's description shown above, you must use that skill for that turn. Multiple mentions mean use them all. Do not carry skills across turns unless re-mentioned.\n- Missing/blocked: If a named skill isn't in the list or the path can't be read, say so briefly and continue with the best fallback.\n- How to use a skill (progressive disclosure):\n  1) After deciding to use a skill, open its `SKILL.md`. Read only enough to follow the workflow.\n  2) When `SKILL.md` references relative paths (e.g., `scripts/foo.py`), resolve them relative to the skill directory listed above first, and only consider other paths if needed.\n  3) If `SKILL.md` points to extra folders such as `references/`, load only the specific files needed for the request; don't bulk-load everything.\n  4) If `scripts/` exist, prefer running or patching them instead of retyping large code blocks.\n  5) If `assets/` or templates exist, reuse them instead of recreating from scratch.\n- Coordination and sequencing:\n  - If multiple skills apply, choose the minimal set that covers the request and state the order you'll use them.\n  - Announce which skill(s) you're using and why (one short line).
```
