    "user_instructions": "# AGENTS.md — Reference Index\n\n> Every agent working in this codebase must read the files listed below before producing\n> any output. Each file governs a specific concern. Read the ones that apply to your task.\n\n---\n\n## Reference Files\n\n| File | Governs |\n|---|---|\n| `PRODUCT.md` | The 7 modules, what each one owns, dependency order, inter-module event map, Eventbrite ACL facade names, hard architectural rules, and where new code goes. Read this before touching any module. |\n| `docs/EVENTBRITE_INTEGRATION.md` | Eventbrite integration architecture: ACL facades, all FR flows (planned vs. implemented), critical constraints (no user/order creation, no single-order cancel, no seat locking), workarounds. Read before designing any Eventbrite feature. |\n| `docs/MODULE_STRUCTURE_TEMPLATE.md` | Canonical folder and package layout for every module. The exact location of every layer: `api/controller/`, `api/dto/`, `domain/`, `service/`, `repository/`, `mapper/`, `event/published/`, `event/listener/`, `statemachine/`, `exception/`. Anti-patterns list. Read this before writing any class. |\n| `agents/SPEC_GENERATOR.md` | How to produce a `SPEC.md` for any feature. Eight confirmation-gated stages with module context and Eventbrite constraints built-in. Requirements → Domain Model → Architecture & File Structure → DB Schema → API → Business Logic → Error Handling → Tests. Read this before speccing any feature. |\n| `agents/CODING_AGENT.md` | Spring Boot 3.5.11 / Java 21 coding standards. Domain behaviour, service orchestration, mapper rules, controller rules, event rules, 10 Eventbrite ACL facades, inter-module communication (REST + Spring Events), admin/ special rules, state machine, Spring AI. Read this before writing any production code. |\n| `agents/TEST_AGENT.md` | Test agent responsibilities and best practices. Builds tests from `SPEC_*.md` Stage 8, executes tests, fixes test/code issues caused by behavior mismatches, and writes timestamped logs under `test_result_folder/`. Read this before writing or running tests. |\n| `docs/TESTING_GUIDE.md` | Four-layer test structure: `domain/` (unit), `service/` (Mockito), `api/` (@WebMvcTest), `arch/` (ArchUnit enforcing 10 hard rules + Eventbrite constraints). All rule examples, happy path, negative path, exception patterns. Read before writing any test. |\n| `mock-eventbrite-api/README.md` | **Mock Eventbrite Service:** Python FastAPI in-memory mock of Eventbrite API v3. Used for local development and testing. Exposes all 10 ACL facade endpoints without hitting production Eventbrite. See setup instructions below. |\n\n---\n\n## Module Quick Reference\n\nFull detail for each module is in `PRODUCT.md`. This table is a lookup only.\n\n| Module | Owns | External ACL Facades Used |\n|---|---|---|\n| `discovery-catalog` | Events, Venues, Cities, catalog sync | `EbEventSyncService`, `EbTicketService` |\n| `scheduling` | Show slots, conflict validation | `EbEventSyncService` |\n| `identity` | Users, JWT, profiles, preferences, wallet | — |\n| `booking-inventory` | Seats, SeatMap, Cart, Pricing, Seat Lock State Machine | `EbTicketService` |\n| `payments-ticketing` | Bookings, Payments, E-Tickets, Cancellations, Refunds, Wallet | `StripePaymentService`, `StripeRefundService`, `StripeWebhookHandler` |\n| `promotions` | Coupons, Promotions, Eligibility rules | `EbDiscountSyncService` |\n| `engagement` | Reviews, Moderation, AI Chatbot (`service/chatbot/`), RAG pipeline | `EbEventSyncService`, `EbAttendeeService` |\n| `admin/` | No domain ownership. Orchestration and aggregation only. | — |\n| `shared/` | All external ACL facades, JWT, base classes, common DTOs, configs | — |\n\n---\n\n## Hard Rules — Never Violate\n\nCanonical numbering and wording are owned by `PRODUCT.md` Section 9. These shorthand rules apply to every task without exception.\n\n1. No module imports another module's `@Service`, `@Entity`, or `@Repository`.\n  - Exception: `admin/` MAY import module `@Service` beans for READ operations only; all writes MUST go through the owning module REST API.\n2. No module calls Eventbrite, Stripe, or OpenAI HTTP directly — only through `shared/` ACL facades.\n3. ACL facade names are exactly as listed below — never invent new ones.\n4. Spring Events carry only primitives, IDs, enums, and value objects — never `@Entity` objects.\n5. One `GlobalExceptionHandler` in `shared/common/exception/` — never `@ControllerAdvice` in a module.\n6. All field mapping goes in `mapper/` using MapStruct — never inside a service or controller.\n7. `admin/` owns no `@Entity` and no database table.\n8. `shared/` has no dependency on any module.\n9. `app/` has zero business logic.\n10. Dependency direction is strictly downward — no circular imports between modules.\n\n---\n\n## Eventbrite ACL Facade Names (HARD RULE #3)\nRead the docs/eventbriteapiv3public.apib for detail API Endpoint with schema, Response, Request and errors\n\nAll 10 facades are in `shared/eventbrite/service/`. These are the ONLY things modules call for Eventbrite:\n\n1. **EbEventSyncService** — Create, update, publish, cancel events; pull org event catalog\n2. **EbVenueService** — Create and update venues; list org venues\n3. **EbScheduleService** — Create recurring event schedules and occurrences\n4. **EbTicketService** — Create/update ticket classes; manage inventory; check availability\n5. **EbCapacityService** — Retrieve and update event capacity tiers\n6. **EbOrderService** — Read orders post-checkout (admin/ reporting only — NOT used in FR5/FR6 payment flows; JS SDK widget only creates orders)\n7. **EbAttendeeService** — List attendees; verify attendance for reviews (engagement only — FR8 attendance verification)\n8. **EbDiscountSyncService** — Create, update, delete discount codes\n9. **EbRefundService** — INACTIVE for payments — all refunds go through `StripeRefundService`; original EB refund read-only API has no submission endpoint\n10. **EbWebhookService** — Mock/testing only; not used in production registration flow\n\n**See `docs/EVENTBRITE_INTEGRATION.md` for which module uses which facade and what gaps exist.**\n\n---\n\n## Stripe ACL Facades (payments-ticketing only)\n\nAll 3 facades are in `shared/stripe/service/`. Only `payments-ticketing` calls these:\n\n1. **StripePaymentService** — Create PaymentIntents; confirm and capture payments\n2. **StripeRefundService** — Submit refunds; query refund status\n3. **StripeWebhookHandler** — Verify webhook signatures; parse `payment_intent.succeeded` / `payment_intent.payment_failed` / `charge.refunded` events\n\n**Hard Rule:** Never call `com.stripe.*` SDK classes directly from a module service — always delegate to the facade in `shared/stripe/service/`.\n\n---\n\n## Module Dependency Order (HARD RULE #10)\n\n```\nshared/               <- foundational; no dependencies\n  |\n  v\ndiscovery-catalog    <- depends on shared only\n  |\n  v\nscheduling           <- depends on shared + discovery-catalog (REST reads)\nidentity             <- depends on shared only\n  |\n  v\nbooking-inventory    <- depends on shared + discovery-catalog (REST reads)\n  |\n  v\npayments-ticketing   <- depends on shared + booking-inventory + identity (REST)\n  |\n  v\npromotions           <- depends on shared + booking-inventory + identity (REST)\n  |\n  v\nengagement           <- depends on shared + payments-ticketing + identity (REST)\n  |\n  v\nadmin/               <- thin orchestration; reads from all, writes via REST APIs\n  |\n  v\napp/                 <- entry point only; zero business logic\n```\n\n**Golden Rule:** Module at level N can depend on level N-1 or lower (or `shared/`) only. Never import from sibling or downstream modules.\n\n**See `PRODUCT.md` Section 2 for detailed rationale.**\n\n\n## Skills\nA skill is a set of local instructions to follow that is stored in a `SKILL.md` file. Below is the list of skills that can be used. Each entry includes a name, description, and file path so you can open the source for full instructions when using a specific skill.\n### Available skills\n- find-skills: Helps users discover and install agent skills when they ask questions like \"how do I do X\", \"find a skill for X\", \"is there a skill that can...\", or express interest in extending capabilities. This skill should be used when the user is looking for functionality that might exist as an installable skill. (file: /home/dell/.agents/skills/find-skills/SKILL.md)\n- skill-creator: Guide for creating effective skills. This skill should be used when users want to create a new skill (or update an existing skill) that extends Codex's capabilities with specialized knowledge, workflows, or tool integrations. (file: /home/dell/.codex/skills/.system/skill-creator/SKILL.md)\n- skill-installer: Install Codex skills into $CODEX_HOME/skills from a curated list or a GitHub repo path. Use when a user asks to list installable skills, install a curated skill, or install a skill from another repo (including private repos). (file: /home/dell/.codex/skills/.system/skill-installer/SKILL.md)\n### How to use skills\n- Discovery: The list above is the skills available in this session (name + description + file path). Skill bodies live on disk at the listed paths.\n- Trigger rules: If the user names a skill (with `$SkillName` or plain text) OR the task clearly matches a skill's description shown above, you must use that skill for that turn. Multiple mentions mean use them all. Do not carry skills across turns unless re-mentioned.\n- Missing/blocked: If a named skill isn't in the list or the path can't be read, say so briefly and continue with the best fallback.\n- How to use a skill (progressive disclosure):\n  1) After deciding to use a skill, open its `SKILL.md`. ## Entry 376
**Timestamp:** 2026-03-04T21:48:05.499Z
**Role/Type:** response_item
**Content:**
```json
{
  "timestamp": "2026-03-04T21:48:05.499Z",
  "type": "response_item",
  "payload": {
    "type": "function_call_output",
    "call_id": "call_LfhDpFkNYx6wKmTqx0YOcHOq",
    "output": "Chunk ID: ac5192\nWall time: 0.0505 seconds\nProcess exited with code 0\nOriginal token count: 1285\nOutput:\n# TEST_AGENT.md — Testing Standards & Execution Agent\n\n> Read this file before writing or running tests.\n> This agent is responsible for test code implementation, execution, failure fixing, and result logging.\n\n---\n\n## Purpose\n\nThis file defines the responsibilities of the **Test Agent**.\n\nThe **SPEC_GENERATOR** is the sole source of truth for what to test — it writes all test cases in Stage 8 of the `SPEC_*.md` file. The **TEST_AGENT does not decide what to test**. Its only job is to:\n\n- **Translate** the test cases written in `SPEC_*.md` Stage 8 into executable test code\n- **Run** those tests\n- **Fix** failures caused by new or changed code\n- **Log** results in a timestamped report in `test_result_folder/`\n\n---\n\n## Scope Ownership\n\n### Test Agent MUST\n\n- Read Stage 8 of the `SPEC_*.md` file and implement exactly those test cases — nothing more, nothing less\n- Write test code for all layers as specified in the test cases:\n  - `domain/` (pure unit)\n  - `service/` (Mockito orchestration)\n  - `api/` (`@WebMvcTest` HTTP contract)\n  - `arch/` (ArchUnit boundaries)\n- Run relevant tests after implementation\n- Fix failing tests and related test setup issues\n- Fix production code only when required to satisfy approved spec behavior\n- Log all found errors and all applied fixes in a test report file\n\n### Test Agent MUST NOT\n\n- Decide what test cases to write — that is SPEC_GENERATOR's job\n- Add, remove, or modify test cases from Stage 8\n- Introduce unapproved features not present in `SPEC_*.md`\n- Change module ownership or dependency direction rules\n- Add module-level `@ControllerAdvice`\n- Skip failed tests without documenting reason and impact\n\n---\n\n## Inputs (Required Before Writing Tests)\n\n1. Confirmed feature spec with Stage 8 test cases: `SPEC_*.md` ← **primary input**\n2. Module ownership and boundaries: `PRODUCT.md`\n3. Layer/package standards: `docs/MODULE_STRUCTURE_TEMPLATE.md`\n4. Test patterns/rules: `docs/TESTING_GUIDE.md`\n5. Coding constraints for compatibility: `agents/CODING_AGENT.md`\n\n---\n\n## Test Design Standards\n\n### AAA Format (Mandatory)\n\nAll tests must follow Arrange–Act–Assert.\n\n```java\n@Test\nvoid should_return_400_when_cityId_missing() {\n    // Arrange\n    MockHttpServletRequestBuilder request = get(\"/api/v1/catalog/venues\");\n\n    // Act\n    ResultActions result = mockMvc.perform(request);\n\n    // Assert\n    result.andExpect(status().isBadRequest());\n}\n```\n\n### Naming Convention (Mandatory)\n\n`should_[expected_behaviour]_when_[condition]`\n\nExamples:\n- `should_soft_delete_event_when_missing_from_org_sync`\n- `should_return_401_when_webhook_signature_invalid`\n- `should_not_query_db_when_cache_hit`\n\n### Layer Rules\n\n- `domain/`: no Spring context, no mocks for infra\n- `service/`: Mockito only (`@ExtendWith(MockitoExtension.class)`)\n- `api/`: `@WebMvcTest`, services/mappers mocked\n- `arch/`: ArchUnit boundary checks based on hard rules\n\n---\n\n## Execution Workflow\n\n1. Read Stage 8 test cases from the approved `SPEC_*.md` — do not interpret or expand them\n2. Implement each test case as code in the correct layer\n3. Run focused tests first (changed files only), then full module suite\n4. Capture failures\n5. Fix test or code issues\n6. Re-run until green (or blocked)\n7. Produce and save test report in `test_result_folder/`\n\n---\n\n## Failure Triage Rules\n\nWhen tests fail, classify and resolve in this order:\n\n1. **Test setup issue** (mock, fixture, context) → fix test\n2. **Contract mismatch** (spec vs endpoint/DTO) → fix code or test to match approved spec\n3. **Behavior bug** (business logic wrong) → fix production code\n4. **Architecture violation** (ArchUnit) → fix package/dependency layering\n5. **External/infra flake** → document as blocked with reproducible evidence\n\nDo not silently ignore failing tests.\n\n---\n\n## Required Result Logging\n\nAfter every test cycle, generate a result log file in:\n\n`test_result_folder/`\n\n### Naming Convention (Mandatory)\n\n`[feature_or_flow]_[yyyyMMdd_HHmmss].md`\n\nExamples:\n- `fr1_catalog_search_20260303_201530.md`\n- `payment_confirmation_flow_20260303_204012.md`\n\n### Log Template (Mandatory)\n\n```markdown\n# Test Result — [Feature/Flow]\n\n- Timestamp: [yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss]\n- Spec: [SPEC_*.md]\n- Module(s): [module list]\n- Commit/Working State: [hash or local]\n\n## Coverage of Stage 8 Cases\n- Total planned:\n- Implemented:\n- Passed:\n- Failed:\n- Skipped:\n\n## Failures Found\n1. [test name]\n   - Error:\n   - Root cause:\n   - Fix applied:\n\n## Code/Test Changes Applied\n- [file path] — [short change summary]\n\n## Final Status\n- [PASS | PARTIAL | BLOCKED]\n- Notes:\n```\n\n---\n\n## Completion Criteria\n\nTest Agent is complete only when:\n\n- All Stage 8 test cases from `SPEC_*.md` are implemented as code\n- All implemented tests are executed\n- Failures are fixed or explicitly documented as blocked\n- A timestamped result log is saved in `test_result_folder/`\n\n---\n\n## Handoff Contract\n\n- `SPEC_GENERATOR` defines what to test — writes all test cases in Stage 8\n- `CODING_AGENT` implements production code\n- `TEST_AGENT` writes test code for Stage 8 cases, runs them, fixes failures, and publishes the final test report"
  }
}
```

    "output": "Chunk ID: f4f5ac\nWall time: 0.0551 seconds\nProcess exited with code 0\nOriginal token count: 2788\nOutput:\n# Testing Guide — Modular Monolith\n\n> Tests are not optional. Every feature must have coverage across all four layers.\n> The `arch/` tests in particular are self-enforcing — they fail the build automatically\n> if anyone violates a module boundary. Never delete or weaken an arch test.\n\n---\n\n## Core Principle — Each Layer Tests One Thing\n\nThe most common testing mistake is putting the wrong test in the wrong layer.\nUse this rule: **each layer tests exactly one concern.**\n\n| Layer | Tests One Concern | Spring Context? | Key Annotation |\n|---|---|---|---|\n| `domain/` | Business rules on the domain object | None | Plain JUnit 5 |\n| `service/` | Orchestration — right calls in right order | None | `@ExtendWith(MockitoExtension.class)` |\n| `api/` | HTTP contract — status codes, JSON shape, validation | Web layer only | `@WebMvcTest` |\n| `arch/` | Architectural boundaries | None | `@AnalyzeClasses` |\n| `mapper/` | Field translation correctness | None | Plain JUnit 5 |\n\n---\n\n## Test Folder Structure\n\nEvery module must mirror its source structure exactly:\n\n```\n[module-name]/\n└── src/\n    ├── main/java/com/[org]/[module]/\n    │   ├── api/controller/\n    │   ├── domain/\n    │   ├── service/\n    │   ├── repository/\n    │   ├── mapper/\n    │   └── event/\n    └── test/java/com/[org]/[module]/\n        ├── domain/        ← Pure unit tests. No Spring. No infrastructure mocks.\n        ├── service/       ← Mockito only. Mocks repositories and ACL facades.\n        ├── api/           ← @WebMvcTest slice. Mocks service and mapper.\n        ├── arch/          ← ArchUnit. Enforces module boundary rules at build time.\n        └── mapper/        ← MapStruct translation tests. No Spring.\n```\n\n---\n\n## Test Naming Convention (Mandatory)\n\nAll test methods must follow this exact pattern:\n\n```\nshould_[expected_behaviour]_when_[condition]\n```\n\nThe name must be readable as a sentence describing the behaviour being verified.\nNever use vague names like `testConfirm()`, `test1()`, or `happyPath()`.\n\n**Good examples:**\n```\nshould_confirm_booking_when_status_is_pending\nshould_throw_BusinessRuleException_when_confirming_a_cancelled_booking\nshould_return_200_when_booking_is_found\nshould_return_400_when_seat_count_exceeds_maximum\nshould_return_404_when_booking_does_not_exist\nshould_publish_BookingConfirmedEvent_after_successful_confirmation\nshould_throw_BookingNotFoundException_when_booking_id_is_unknown\nshould_map_confirmed_booking_to_response_with_correct_status\n```\n\n**Bad examples (never use):**\n```\ntestConfirm()\ntest_happy_path()\nconfirmWorks()\nbooking_test_1()\n```\n\n---\n\n## Layer 1 — `domain/` Tests\n\n### Purpose\n\nVerify that the domain object enforces its own rules correctly.\nThese are the fastest tests in the suite — they must run in milliseconds.\n\n### What to Test Here\n\n- Valid state transitions succeed and produce the correct new state\n- Invalid state transitions throw `BusinessRuleException` with the correct message\n- Guard conditions (preconditions on methods) are enforced\n- Value object construction validates its invariants\n- Terminal states cannot be transitioned out of\n- Null or invalid inputs are rejected\n\n### What NOT to Test Here\n\n- Persistence (no repositories, no DB)\n- HTTP (no controllers, no MockMvc)\n- Spring beans (no `@SpringBootTest`, no `@ExtendWith(SpringExtension.class)`)\n- Mocks of infrastructure — if you need a mock here, the domain has an infrastructure\n  dependency. Fix the domain, not the test.\n\n### Annotations\n\nNone. Plain JUnit 5 only.\n\n```java\n// ✅ Correct — no annotations on the class\nclass BookingTest {\n    ...\n}\n\n// ❌ Wrong — domain tests never load Spring\n@SpringBootTest\nclass BookingTest { ... }\n\n// ❌ Wrong — if you need this, your domain imports infrastructure\n@ExtendWith(MockitoExtension.class)\nclass BookingTest { ... }\n```\n\n---\n\n### Happy Path Tests\n\nTest that the domain method succeeds and produces the correct outcome under valid conditions.\nCover every valid state transition defined in the spec's state machine.\n\n```java\nclass BookingTest {\n\n    // Happy path: valid transition succeeds\n    @Test\n    void should_confirm_booking_when_status_is_pending() {\n        // Arrange — set up the entity in a valid starting state\n        Booking booking = new Booking(UUID.randomUUID(), BookingStatus.PENDING);\n\n        // Act — call the domain method\n        booking.confirm();\n\n        // Assert — verify the expected outcome\n        assertThat(booking.getStatus()).isEqualTo(BookingStatus.CONFIRMED);\n    }\n\n    @Test\n    void should_cancel_booking_when_status_is_pending() {\n        Booking booking = new Booking(UUID.randomUUID(), BookingStatus.PENDING);\n\n        booking.cancel();\n\n        assertThat(booking.getStatus()).isEqualTo(BookingStatus.CANCELLED);\n    }\n\n    @Test\n    void should_cancel_booking_when_status_is_confirmed_and_event_is_more_than_48h_away() {\n        LocalDateTime eventTime = LocalDateTime.now().plusDays(3);\n        Booking booking = new Booking(UUID.randomUUID(), BookingStatus.CONFIRMED, eventTime);\n\n        booking.cancel();\n\n        assertThat(booking.getStatus()).isEqualTo(BookingStatus.CANCELLED);\n    }\n}\n```\n\n---\n\n### Negative Path Tests\n\nTest that invalid operations are rejected with the correct exception and message.\nCover every forbidden transition in the spec's state machine.\n\n```java\nclass BookingTest {\n\n    // Negative path: invalid transition throws BusinessRuleException\n    @Test\n    void should_throw_BusinessRuleException_when_confirming_a_cancelled_booking() {\n        Booking booking = new Booking(UUID.randomUUID(), BookingStatus.CANCELLED);\n\n        assertThatThrownBy(booking::confirm)\n            .isInstanceOf(BusinessRuleException.class)\n            .hasMessageContaining(\"Cannot confirm a cancelled booking\");\n    }\n\n    @Test\n    void should_throw_BusinessRuleException_when_confirming_an_already_confirmed_booking() {\n        Booking booking = new Booking(UUID.randomUUID(), BookingStatus.CONFIRMED);\n\n        assertThatThrownBy(booking::confirm)\n            .isInstanceOf(BusinessRuleException.class)\n            .hasMessageContaining(\"Booking is already confirmed\");\n    }\n\n    @Test\n    void should_throw_BusinessRuleException_when_cancelling_within_48h_of_event() {\n        LocalDateTime eventTime = LocalDateTime.now().plusHours(24); // inside the 48h window\n        Booking booking = new Booking(UUID.randomUUID(), BookingStatus.CONFIRMED, eventTime);\n\n        assertThatThrownBy(booking::cancel)\n            .isInstanceOf(BusinessRuleException.class)\n            .hasMessageContaining(\"Cannot cancel within 48 hours of the event\");\n    }\n}\n```\n\n---\n\n### Exception / Edge Case Tests\n\nTest boundary conditions, null inputs, minimum/maximum values, and terminal states.\n\n```java\nclass BookingTest {\n\n    @Test\n    void should_throw_when_booking_id_is_null() {\n        assertThatThrownBy(() -> new Booking(null, BookingStatus.PENDING))\n            .isInstanceOf(IllegalArgumentException.class);\n    }\n\n    @Test\n    void should_throw_when_seat_count_exceeds_maximum() {\n        assertThatThrownBy(() -> new Booking(UUID.randomUUID(), BookingStatus.PENDING, 9))\n            .isInstanceOf(BusinessRuleException.class)\n            .hasMessageContaining(\"Cannot book more than 8 seats\");\n    }\n\n    @Test\n    void should_throw_when_operating_on_a_terminal_cancelled_state() {\n        Booking booking = new Booking(UUID.randomUUID(), BookingStatus.CANCELLED);\n\n        // All operations on a terminal state must be rejected\n        assertThatThrownBy(booking::confirm).isInstanceOf(BusinessRuleException.class);\n        assertThatThrownBy(booking::cancel).isInstanceOf(BusinessRuleException.class);\n    }\n}\n```\n\n---\n\n## Layer 2 — `service/` Tests\n\n### Purpose\n\nVerify that the service correctly orchestrates domain objects, repositories, ACL facades,\nand event publishing. These tests prove the *use case* works — not the domain rule, not the\nHTTP contract.\n\n### What to Test Here\n\n- The correct repository method is called with the correct arguments\n- The correct ACL facade method is called when an external system is involved\n- `ApplicationEventPublisher.publishEvent()` is called with the correct event type and payload\n- `BookingNotFoundException` (or equivalent) is thrown when the entity is not found\n- `BusinessRuleException` propagates correctly when the domain rejects an operation\n- `[System]IntegrationException` is thrown (and compensation is triggered) when an external call fails\n- No event is published when the use case fails\n\n### What NOT to Test Here\n\n- Domain rules — those are tested in `domain/`. Do not re-test `booking.confirm()` logic here.\n- HTTP concerns — no MockMvc, no status codes.\n\n### Annotations\n\n```java\n@ExtendWith(MockitoExtension.class) // Mockito only — no Spring\nclass BookingServiceTest {\n\n    @Mock\n    private BookingRepository bookingRepository;     // Always mock the repository\n\n    @Mock\n    private ApplicationEventPublisher eventPublisher; // Always mock the event publisher\n\n    @Mock\n    private PaymentAclService paymentAclService;      // Mock ACL facades for external systems\n\n    @InjectMocks\n    private BookingService bookingService;            // The class under test — real instance\n}\n```\n\n---\n\n### Happy Path Tests\n\nTest the complete use case: entity is found, domain method succeeds, repository is saved,\nevent is published, ACL facade is called if required.\n\n```java\n@Test\nvoid should_confirm_booking_and_publish_event_when_booking_is_pending() {\n    // Arrange\n    UUID bookingId = UUID.randomUUID();\n    Booking booking = new Booking(bookingId, BookingStatus.PENDING);\n    when(bookingRepository.findById(bookingId)).thenReturn(Optional.of(booking));\n\n    // Act\n    bookingService.confirmBooking(bookingId);\n\n    // Assert — verify orchestration\n    verify(bookingRepository).save(booking);                               // saved\n    verify(eventPublisher).publishEvent(any(BookingConfirmedEvent.class)); // event fired\n}\n\n@Test\nvoid should_initiate_booking_and_call_payment_facade_when_request_is_valid() {\n    // Arrange\n    CreateBookingRequest request = new CreateBookingRequest(userId, seatIds, paymentMethodId);\n    when(paymentAclService.charge(any())).thenReturn(new PaymentResult(paymentIntentId));\n    when(bookingRepository.save(any())).thenAnswer(inv -> inv.getArgument(0));\n\n    // Act\n    Booking result = bookingService.initiateBooking(request);\n\n    // Assert\n    verify(paymentAclService).charge(any(ChargeRequest.class));           // external call made\n    verify(bookingRepository).save(any(Booking.class));                    // persisted\n    verify(eventPublisher).publishEvent(any(BookingInitiatedEvent.class)); // event fired\n    assertThat(result.getStatus()).isEqualTo(BookingStatus.PENDING);\n}\n```\n\n---\n\n### Negative Path Tests\n\n#### Entity Not Found\n\n```java\n@Test\nvoid should_throw_BookingNotFoundException_when_booking_does_not_exist() {\n    // Arrange\n    UUID bookingId = UUID.randomUUID();\n    when(bookingRepository.findById(bookingId)).thenReturn(Optional.empty());\n\n"
  }
}

`validate_should_throw_CouponOrgMismatchException_when_coupon_org_differs_from_cart_org`**\n```\nGiven:  Coupon.orgId=\"org-1\", cartSnapshot.orgId=\"org-2\"\nWhen:   validate called\nThen:   CouponOrgMismatchException thrown\n```\n\n**S5 — `validate_should_throw_CouponEventMismatchException_for_event_scoped_coupon_on_wrong_slot`**\n```\nGiven:  promotion.scope=EVENT_SCOPED, promotion.ebEventId=\"eb-event-1\"\n        cartSnapshot.slotId maps to ebEventId=\"eb-event-2\"\nWhen:   validate called\nThen:   CouponEventMismatchException thrown\n```\n\n**S6 — `validate_should_throw_CouponUsageLimitReachedException_when_count_plus_reservations_equals_max`**\n```\nGiven:  maxUsageLimit=5, redemptionCount=4, activeReservations=1\nWhen:   validate called\nThen:   CouponUsageLimitReachedException thrown\n```\n\n**S7 — `validate_should_throw_CouponPerUserCapReachedException_when_user_has_reached_per_user_cap`**\n```\nGiven:  perUserCap=1, user already has 1 non-voided redemption for this coupon\nWhen:   validate called\nThen:   CouponPerUserCapReachedException thrown\n```\n\n**S8 — `validate_should_return_idempotent_response_when_reservation_already_exists_for_same_cart`**\n```\nGiven:  Active CouponUsageReservation exists for (couponId, cartId)\nWhen:   validate called again with same cartId + couponCode\nThen:   Returns same DiscountBreakdownResponse\n        No second reservation created\n        No second event published\n```\n\n**S9 — `validate_should_create_CouponUsageReservation_with_expiresAt_matching_cart_expiry`**\n```\nGiven:  Cart expiresAt = T+30min\nWhen:   validate succeeds\nThen:   Reserved CouponUsageReservation.expiresAt == cart.expiresAt\n```\n\n#### `CouponRedemptionServiceTest`\n\n**S10 — `onBookingConfirmed_should_create_redemption_and_increment_count`**\n```\nGiven:  BookingConfirmedEvent(bookingId=91, cartId=500, ...) with active reservation for cartId=500\nWhen:   listener fires\nThen:   CouponRedemption record created with bookingId=91 and correct amounts\n        coupon.redemptionCount incremented by 1\n        reservation.released = true\n```\n\n**S11 — `onBookingConfirmed_should_mark_coupon_EXHAUSTED_and_trigger_guarded_delete_when_limit_reached`**\n```\nGiven:  Coupon maxUsageLimit=5, redemptionCount=4 before confirm\nWhen:   BookingConfirmedEvent fires\nThen:   coupon.status == EXHAUSTED\n        DiscountSyncOrchestrator.deleteSync() called\n```\n\n**S12 — `onBookingConfirmed_should_be_noop_when_no_coupon_in_cart_snapshot`**\n```\nGiven:  CartSnapshot.couponCode = null\nWhen:   BookingConfirmedEvent fires\nThen:   No CouponRedemption created\n        No exception thrown\n```\n\n**S13 — `onBookingCancelled_should_void_redemption_and_decrement_count`**\n```\nGiven:  Non-voided CouponRedemption exists for bookingId\nWhen:   BookingCancelledEvent fires\nThen:   redemption.voided = true\n        coupon.redemptionCount decremented by 1\n```\n\n**S14 — `onBookingCancelled_should_revert_EXHAUSTED_to_ACTIVE_and_not_recreate_on_EB`**\n```\nGiven:  Coupon was EXHAUSTED, eb_sync_status=DELETE_BLOCKED\nWhen:   BookingCancelledEvent fires\nThen:   coupon.status == ACTIVE\n        DiscountSyncOrchestrator NOT called (no EB re-create)\n```\n\n**S15 — `onPaymentFailed_should_release_open_usage_reservation_for_cart`**\n```\nGiven:  Active CouponUsageReservation for cartId\nWhen:   PaymentFailedEvent fires\nThen:   reservation.released = true\n```\n\n#### `DiscountSyncOrchestratorTest`\n\n**S16 — `createSync_should_call_EbDiscountSyncService_and_store_eb_discount_id_on_success`**\n```\nGiven:  Coupon with eb_sync_status=SYNC_PENDING\n        Idempotency guard returns no existing match\n        EbDiscountSyncService.createDiscount() returns \"eb_discount_abc\"\n        EbDiscountSyncService.getDiscount(\"eb_discount_abc\") returns valid response\nWhen:   createSync(coupon) called\nThen:   coupon.ebDiscountId == \"eb_discount_abc\"\n        coupon.ebSyncStatus == SYNCED\n```\n\n**S17 — `createSync_should_set_SYNC_FAILED_when_EB_create_returns_error_and_not_block_internal`**\n```\nGiven:  EbDiscountSyncService.createDiscount() throws EbDiscountSyncException\nWhen:   createSync(coupon) called\nThen:   coupon.ebSyncStatus == SYNC_FAILED\n        No exception propagated to caller\n```\n\n**S18 — `modifySync_should_delete_then_recreate_on_EB_when_quantity_sold_is_zero`**\n```\nGiven:  Coupon with ebDiscountId=\"old_id\", eb_quantity_sold_at_last_sync=0\n        EbDiscountSyncService.getDiscount(\"old_id\").quantitySold = 0\n        EbDiscountSyncService.deleteDiscount(\"old_id\") succeeds\n        EbDiscountSyncService.createDiscount() returns \"new_id\"\nWhen:   modifySync(coupon) called\nThen:   coupon.ebDiscountId == \"new_id\"\n        coupon.ebSyncStatus == SYNCED\n```\n\n**S19 — `modifySync_should_set_CANNOT_RESYNC_when_quantity_sold_is_greater_than_zero`**\n```\nGiven:  EbDiscountSyncService.getDiscount(ebDiscountId).quantitySold = 3\nWhen:   modifySync(coupon) called\nThen:   coupon.ebSyncStatus == CANNOT_RESYNC\n        No DELETE called on EB\n        Internal coupon change persisted\n```\n\n**S20 — `deleteSync_should_call_EB_delete_when_quantity_sold_is_zero`**\n```\nGiven:  Coupon with ebDiscountId=\"eb_123\", eb_quantity_sold_at_last_sync=0\n        EB GET returns quantitySold=0\nWhen:   deleteSync(coupon) called\nThen:   EbDiscountSyncService.deleteDiscount(\"eb_123\") called\n        coupon.ebDiscountId = null\n        coupon.ebSyncStatus = NOT_SYNCED\n```\n\n**S21 — `deleteSync_should_set_DELETE_BLOCKED_when_EB_responds_DISCOUNT_CANNOT_BE_DELETED`**\n```\nGiven:  EB GET returns quantitySold=2\nWhen:   deleteSync(coupon) called\nThen:   No DELETE call made\n        coupon.ebSyncStatus == DELETE_BLOCKED\n        No exception propagated\n```\n\n**S22 — `createSync_should_adopt_existing_eb_discount_id_when_idempotency_guard_finds_matching_code`**\n```\nGiven:  EbDiscountSyncService.listDiscounts(orgId) returns existing discount with same code\nWhen:   createSync(coupon) called\nThen:   coupon.ebDiscountId = existing eb_discount_id\n        coupon.ebSyncStatus == SYNCED\n        No POST /organizations/{org_id}/discounts/ called\n```\n\n**S23 — `createSync_should_skip_EB_and_log_warning_when_eb_event_id_is_null_on_event_scoped_coupon`**\n```\nGiven:  promotion.scope=EVENT_SCOPED, promotion.ebEventId=null\nWhen:   createSync(coupon) called\nThen:   No EB API calls made\n        coupon.ebSyncStatus == NOT_SYNCED\n```\n\n#### `DiscountReconciliationJobTest`\n\n**S24 — `reconciliation_should_update_internal_redemption_count_when_EB_quantity_sold_is_higher`**\n```\nGiven:  Internal coupon redemptionCount=2\n        EB returns same ebDiscountId with quantitySold=3\nWhen:   reconciliation job runs\nThen:   coupon.redemptionCount updated to 3\n        coupon.ebQuantitySoldAtLastSync = 3\n        DiscountReconciliationLog.driftsFound == 1\n```\n\n**S25 — `reconciliation_should_create_OrphanEbDiscount_when_no_internal_match_found`**\n```\nGiven:  EB returns discount with ebDiscountId=\"orphan_id\" — no internal coupon with this id\nWhen:   reconciliation job runs\nThen:   OrphanEbDiscount record created with eb_discount_id=\"orphan_id\"\n        DiscountReconciliationLog.orphansFound == 1\n```\n\n**S26 — `reconciliation_should_set_EB_DELETED_EXTERNALLY_when_synced_coupon_missing_from_EB_list`**\n```\nGiven:  Internal coupon with ebSyncStatus=SYNCED, ebDiscountId=\"eb_gone\"\n        EB list does not contain \"eb_gone\"\nWhen:   reconciliation job runs\nThen:   coupon.ebSyncStatus == EB_DELETED_EXTERNALLY\n        DiscountReconciliationLog.externallyDeletedFound == 1\n```\n\n**S27 — `reconciliation_should_set_DRIFT_DETECTED_when_EB_fields_differ_from_internal`**\n```\nGiven:  Internal coupon.code=\"SAVE10\", EB discount returns code=\"SAVE20\" for same ebDiscountId\nWhen:   reconciliation job runs\nThen:   coupon.ebSyncStatus == DRIFT_DETECTED\n        Internal coupon.code unchanged\n```\n\n**S28 — `reconciliation_should_skip_org_and_log_on_EB_list_call_failure_without_aborting_other_orgs`**\n```\nGiven:  2 orgs with SYNCED coupons\n        EB list call throws exception for org-1\nWhen:   reconciliation job runs\nThen:   org-2 still processed successfully\n        DiscountReconciliationLog for org-1 contains errorSummary\n        No exception propagated\n```\n\n#### `CouponExpiryJobTest`\n\n**S29 — `expiryJob_should_deactivate_expired_coupons_and_release_open_reservations`**\n```\nGiven:  Coupon with status=ACTIVE, promotion.validUntil=1 hour ago\n        2 open CouponUsageReservation rows for this coupon\nWhen:   expiryJob runs\nThen:   coupon.status == INACTIVE\n        Both reservations.released == true\n```\n\n**S30 — `expiryJob_should_trigger_guarded_EB_delete_for_expired_coupon_with_zero_quantity_sold`**\n```\nGiven:  Expired coupon, ebDiscountId=\"eb_exp\", ebQuantitySoldAtLastSync=0\nWhen:   expiryJob runs\nThen:   DiscountSyncOrchestrator.deleteSync(coupon) called\n```\n\n**S31 — `expiryJob_should_continue_processing_remaining_coupons_when_one_fails`**\n```\nGiven:  3 expired coupons; deleteSync throws exception for coupon-2\nWhen:   expiryJob runs\nThen:   coupon-1 and coupon-3 deactivated successfully\n        Exception logged; no rethrow\n```\n\n---\n\n### Layer 3 — API Tests (`promotions/src/test/java/.../api/`, @WebMvcTest)\n\n**A1 — `POST_promotions_should_return_201_with_promotion_id_for_ROLE_ADMIN`**\n```\nGiven:  Valid PromotionCreateRequest, ROLE_ADMIN JWT\nWhen:   POST /api/v1/promotions\nThen:   201 Created; body contains promotion.id and status=ACTIVE\n```\n\n**A2 — `POST_promotions_should_return_403_when_called_by_ROLE_USER`**\n```\nGiven:  Valid PromotionCreateRequest, ROLE_USER JWT\nWhen:   POST /api/v1/promotions\nThen:   403 Forbidden\n```\n\n**A3 — `POST_coupons_should_return_201_and_show_SYNC_PENDING_eb_sync_status`**\n```\nGiven:  Valid CouponCreateRequest under existing promotion, ROLE_ADMIN JWT\nWhen:   POST /api/v1/promotions/{promotionId}/coupons\nThen:   201 Created; body.ebSyncStatus == \"SYNC_PENDING\"\n```\n\n**A4 — `POST_coupons_should_return_409_on_duplicate_code_within_org`**\n```\nGiven:  Code \"SAVE10\" already exists for org\nWhen:   POST /api/v1/promotions/{promotionId}/coupons with code=\"SAVE10\"\nThen:   409 Conflict; errorCode == \"COUPON_CODE_CONFLICT\"\n```\n\n**A5 — `POST_promotions_validate_should_return_200_with_discount_breakdown_for_valid_coupon`**\n```\nGiven:  Active coupon, valid cart, ROLE_USER JWT\nWhen:   POST /api/v1/promotions/validate\nThen:   200 OK; body contains discountAmount, adjustedCartTotal, currency\n```\n\n**A6 — `POST_promotions_validate_should_return_410_when_coupon_is_INACTIVE`**\n```\nGiven:  Coupon with status=INACTIVE\nWhen:   POST /api/v1/promotions/validate\nThen:   410 Gone; errorCode == \"COUPON_INACTIVE\"\n```\n\n**A7 — `POST_promotions_validate_should_return_409_when_usage_limit_reached`**\n```\nGiven:  Coupon at maxUsageLimit\nWhen:   POST /api/v1/promotions/validate\nThen:   409 Conflict; errorCode == \"COUPON_USAGE_LIMIT_REACHED\"\n```\n\n**A8 — `DELETE_promotions_cart_coupon_should_return_204_and_release_reservation`**\n```\nGiven:  Active CouponUsageReservation for cartId; ROLE_USER JWT (owns cart)\nWhen:   DELETE /api/v1/promotions/cart/{cartId}/coupon\nThen:   204 No Content; reservation.released == true\n```\n\n**A9 — `POST_coupons_sync_should_return_200_with_updated_ebSyncStatus`**\n```\nGiven:  Coupon with ebSyncStatus=SYNC_FAILED; ROLE_ADMIN JWT\n        EB call succeeds on retry\nWhen:   POST /api/v1/promotions/coupons/{couponCode}/sync\nThen:   200 OK; body.ebSyncStatus == \"SYNCED\"\n```\n\n**A10 — `POST_reconciliation_trigger_should_return_202_accepted`**\n```\nGiven:  No in-flight reconciliation for org; ROLE_ADMIN JWT\nWhen:   POST /api/v1/promotions/reconciliation/trigger\nThen:   202 Accepted\n```\n\n---\n\n### Layer 4 — ArchUnit Tests (`promotions/src/test/java/.../arch/`)\n\n**AR1 — `promotions_module_should_not_import_any_other_module_service_or_repository`**\n```java\nnoClasses().that().resideInAPackage(\"..promotions..\")\n    .should().dependOnClassesThat()\n    .resideInAnyPackage(\n        \"..bookinginventory.service..\",\n        \"..bookinginventory.repository..\",\n        \"..paymentsticketing.service..\",\n        \"..paymentsticketing.repository..\",\n        \"..identity.service..\",\n        \"..scheduling.service..\"\n    )\n```\n\n**AR2 — `promotions_module_should_only_call_eventbrite_via_EbDiscountSyncService_facade`**\n```java\nnoClasses().that().resideInAPackage(\"..promotions..\")\n    .should().accessClassesThat()\n    .resideInAPackage(\"..shared.eventbrite..\")\n    .and().not().haveSimpleName(\"EbDiscountSyncService\")\n```\n\n**AR3 — `promotions_event_listeners_should_only_accept_shared_event_types`**\n```java\nmethods().that().areAnnotatedWith(EventListener.class)\n    .and().areDeclaredInClassesThat().resideInAPackage(\"..promotions.event.listener..\")\n    .should().haveRawParameterTypes(\n        BookingConfirmedEvent.class,\n        BookingCancelledEvent.class,\n        PaymentFailedEvent.class,\n        CartAssembledEvent.class\n    )\n```\n\n**AR4 — `CouponAppliedEvent_and_CouponValidatedEvent_should_reside_in_shared_module_only`**\n```java\nclasses().that().haveSimpleNameIn(\"CouponAppliedEvent\", \"CouponValidatedEvent\")\n    .should().resideInAPackage(\"..shared.common.event.published..\")\n```\n\n---\n\n## Open Questions\n\n1. **Currency handling for AMOUNT_OFF:** Should `discount_value` in `promotions` be stored in major currency unit (e.g. ₹50) or smallest unit (e.g. 5000 paise)? Recommendation: store in smallest unit, consistent with FR5 Stripe `amount` convention.\n\n2. **Multi-currency coupons:** Can a coupon be valid across events in different currencies, or is a coupon always scoped to a single currency? Recommendation: bind `Promotion.currency` to a single currency and reject cart if cart currency does not match.\n\n3. **Group vs coupon stacking:** Can a user apply both a coupon AND benefit from group discount (FR4 `groupDiscountPercent`) in the same cart? Recommendation: allow stacking — apply group discount first at pricing tier level, then apply coupon to the final cart total.\n   > **Note (GAP-3/GAP-4 resolution):** This stacking is now correctly implemented. `CartPricingService.recompute()` computes and stores `groupDiscountAmount` independently. `CartService.confirm()` then subtracts `couponDiscountAmount` from the post-group-discount total. The two discounts never overwrite each other.\n\n4. **ShedLock dependency:** Is ShedLock already on the classpath (added in FR6 for `CancellationPolicy` jobs)? If not, it must be added to `promotions/pom.xml`.\n\n5. **Admin JWT `orgId` extraction:** `ROLE_ADMIN` JWT must carry an `orgId` claim so that `CouponAdminController` can scope all operations correctly. Confirm this is already issued by `identity` for admin users.\n\n6. **`CouponAppliedListener` cart mutation pattern:** When `CouponAppliedEvent` is received by `booking-inventory.CouponAppliedListener`, the listener must call `cart.setCouponDiscountAmount(discountInMajorUnit)` (converting from `discountAmountInSmallestUnit / 100`). It must **not** call `cartPricingService.recompute()` — that would overwrite `groupDiscountAmount` with a cached stale value. The listener should only do: load cart → set coupon discount → save cart.\n\n7. **`CartSummaryDto` currency field source:** `CartSummaryDto.currency` is sourced from `cart.getGroupDiscountAmount().currency()` (the embedded `Money` field). This is always set at cart creation from the `currency` constructor argument. Confirmed correct.\n"
  }
}
```

           .haveSimpleNameEndingWith(\"SchedulingSlotClient\");\n\n    @ArchTest\n    static final ArchRule should_not_import_identity_entity_or_repository_in_booking_inventory =\n        noClasses()\n            .that().resideInAPackage(\"..bookinginventory..\")\n            .should().dependOnClassesThat()\n            .resideInAnyPackage(\n                \"..com.eventplatform.identity.domain..\",\n                \"..com.eventplatform.identity.repository..\"\n            );\n\n    @ArchTest\n    static final ArchRule should_not_import_payments_ticketing_in_booking_inventory =\n        noClasses()\n            .that().resideInAPackage(\"..bookinginventory..\")\n            .should().dependOnClassesThat()\n            .resideInAnyPackage(\"..com.eventplatform.paymentsticketing..\");\n\n    @ArchTest\n    static final ArchRule should_not_call_eventbrite_http_directly_from_booking_inventory_service =\n        noClasses()\n            .that().resideInAPackage(\"..bookinginventory.service..\")\n            .should().dependOnClassesThat()\n            .resideInAnyPackage(\"..com.eventplatform.shared.eventbrite.client..\");\n\n    @ArchTest\n    static final ArchRule should_not_declare_ControllerAdvice_in_booking_inventory =\n        classes()\n            .that().resideInAPackage(\"..bookinginventory..\")\n            .should().notBeAnnotatedWith(org.springframework.web.bind.annotation.ControllerAdvice.class)\n            .andShould().notBeAnnotatedWith(org.springframework.web.bind.annotation.RestControllerAdvice.class);\n\n    @ArchTest\n    static final ArchRule should_enforce_mapper_layer_for_all_domain_to_dto_conversions =\n        noClasses()\n            .that().resideInAPackage(\"..bookinginventory.api.controller..\")\n            .should().dependOnClassesThat()\n            .resideInAnyPackage(\"..bookinginventory.domain..\");\n\n    @Test\n    void should_not_publish_CartAssembledEvent_without_orgId_and_ebEventId() {\n        RecordComponent[] components = CartAssembledEvent.class.getRecordComponents();\n        assertThat(Arrays.stream(components).map(RecordComponent::getName))\n            .contains(\"orgId\", \"ebEventId\");\n    }\n\n    @Test\n    void should_only_publish_events_with_primitives_ids_enums_no_entities() {\n        RecordComponent[] components = CartAssembledEvent.class.getRecordComponents();\n        // CartAssembledEvent: cartId, slotId, userId, orgId (Long x4), ebEventId, couponCode,\n        // currency, userEmail (String x4), totalAmountInSmallestUnit (long primitive) — no entities\n        assertThat(Arrays.stream(components).map(c -> c.getType().getSimpleName()))\n            .containsOnly(\"Long\", \"long\", \"String\");\n    }\n\n    @Test\n    void should_only_save_audit_log_no_update_or_delete() {\n        assertThat(Arrays.stream(com.eventplatform.bookinginventory.repository.SeatLockAuditLogRepository.class.getDeclaredMethods())\n            .map(java.lang.reflect.Method::getName))\n            .noneMatch(name -> name.startsWith(\"delete\") || name.startsWith(\"update\"));\n    }\n}\n"
  }

{
  "timestamp": "2026-03-04T21:48:25.642Z",

    "output": "Chunk ID: a7b324\nWall time: 0.0510 seconds\nProcess exited with code 0\nOriginal token count: 1002\nOutput:\npackage com.eventplatform.shared.common.exception;\n\nimport org.springframework.http.HttpStatus;\n\npublic class BusinessRuleException extends BaseException {\n    public BusinessRuleException(String message, String errorCode) {\n        super(message, errorCode, HttpStatus.UNPROCESSABLE_ENTITY);\n    }\n\n    public BusinessRuleException(String message, String errorCode, Object details) {\n        super(message, errorCode, HttpStatus.UNPROCESSABLE_ENTITY, details);\n    }\n}\npackage com.eventplatform.shared.common.exception;\n\nimport org.springframework.http.HttpStatus;\n\npublic class ResourceNotFoundException extends BaseException {\n    public ResourceNotFoundException(String message, String errorCode) {\n        super(message, errorCode, HttpStatus.NOT_FOUND);\n    }\n}\npackage com.eventplatform.shared.security;\n\nimport jakarta.servlet.http.HttpServletResponse;\nimport org.springframework.context.annotation.Bean;\nimport org.springframework.context.annotation.Configuration;\nimport org.springframework.security.authentication.AuthenticationManager;\nimport org.springframework.security.config.annotation.authentication.configuration.AuthenticationConfiguration;\nimport org.springframework.security.config.annotation.method.configuration.EnableMethodSecurity;\nimport org.springframework.security.config.annotation.web.builders.HttpSecurity;\nimport org.springframework.security.config.http.SessionCreationPolicy;\nimport org.springframework.security.crypto.bcrypt.BCryptPasswordEncoder;\nimport org.springframework.security.crypto.password.PasswordEncoder;\nimport org.springframework.security.web.SecurityFilterChain;\nimport org.springframework.security.web.authentication.UsernamePasswordAuthenticationFilter;\n\n@Configuration\n@EnableMethodSecurity\npublic class SecurityConfig {\n\n    private final JwtAuthenticationFilter jwtAuthenticationFilter;\n\n    public SecurityConfig(JwtAuthenticationFilter jwtAuthenticationFilter) {\n        this.jwtAuthenticationFilter = jwtAuthenticationFilter;\n    }\n\n    @Bean\n    public SecurityFilterChain securityFilterChain(HttpSecurity http) throws Exception {\n        http\n            .csrf(csrf -> csrf.disable())\n            .sessionManagement(session -> session.sessionCreationPolicy(SessionCreationPolicy.STATELESS))\n            .exceptionHandling(ex -> ex\n                .authenticationEntryPoint((request, response, authException) ->\n                    response.sendError(HttpServletResponse.SC_UNAUTHORIZED, \"Unauthorized\"))\n                .accessDeniedHandler((request, response, accessDeniedException) ->\n                    response.sendError(HttpServletResponse.SC_FORBIDDEN, \"Forbidden\"))\n            )\n            .authorizeHttpRequests(auth -> auth\n                .requestMatchers(\n                    \"/api/v1/catalog/**\",\n                    \"/api/v1/booking/slots/*/seats\",          // public seat map view (no auth needed)\n                    \"/api/v1/booking/slots/*/availability\",   // public GA availability check\n                    \"/api/v1/admin/orgs/*/eventbrite/callback\",\n                    \"/admin/v1/webhooks/eventbrite\",\n                    \"/api/v1/webhooks/stripe\",\n                    \"/api/v1/auth/register\",\n                    \"/api/v1/auth/login\",\n                    \"/api/v1/auth/token/refresh\",\n                    \"/api/v1/auth/password/reset\",\n                    \"/api/v1/auth/password/reset/confirm\",\n                    \"/internal/**\"                            // server-to-server internal module calls\n                ).permitAll()\n                .anyRequest().authenticated()\n            )\n            .addFilterBefore(jwtAuthenticationFilter, UsernamePasswordAuthenticationFilter.class);\n        return http.build();\n    }\n\n    @Bean\n    public PasswordEncoder passwordEncoder() {\n        return new BCryptPasswordEncoder();\n    }\n\n    @Bean\n    public AuthenticationManager authenticationManager(AuthenticationConfiguration configuration) throws Exception {\n        return configuration.getAuthenticationManager();\n    }\n}\n"
  }
}
```

calls\n                ).permitAll()\n                .anyRequest().authenticated()\n            )\n            .addFilterBefore(jwtAuthenticationFilter, UsernamePasswordAuthenticationFilter.class);\n     "type": "custom_tool_call",
    "status": "completed",
    "call_id": "call_SICtXT4HN9gUew0RWrHckgUB",
    "name": "apply_patch",
    "input": "*** Begin Patch\n*** Update File: promotions/src/main/java/com/eventplatform/promotions/domain/Promotion.java\n@@\n     public void deactivate() {\n         this.status = PromotionStatus.INACTIVE;\n+        this.coupons.forEach(Coupon::deactivate);\n     }\n \n     public boolean isActiveAt(Instant now) {\n         return status == PromotionStatus.ACTIVE && !now.isBefore(validFrom) && !now.isAfter(validUntil);\n     }\n+\n+    public boolean isValid(Instant now) {\n+        return isActiveAt(now);\n+    }\n+\n+    public void addCoupon(Coupon coupon) {\n+        this.coupons.add(coupon);\n+    }\n*** End Patch\n"
  }
}
```

## Entry 421
**Timestamp:** 2026-03-04T21:49:19.195Z
**Role/Type:** response_item
**Content:**
```json
{
  "timestamp": "2026-03-04T21:49:19.195Z",
  "type": "response_item",
  "payload": {
    "type": "custom_tool_call",
    "status": "completed",
    "call_id": "call_kkJC6fvpMPTj9JAyl8YQarfD",
    "name": "apply_patch",
    "input": "*** Begin Patch\n*** Update File: promotions/src/main/java/com/eventplatform/promotions/service/CouponEligibilityService.java\n@@\n-        Coupon coupon = couponRepository.findByCodeIgnoreCaseAndOrgId(request.couponCode(), cartSummary.orgId())\n+        Coupon coupon = couponRepository.findTopByCodeIgnoreCase(request.couponCode())\n             .orElseThrow(() -> new CouponNotFoundException(request.couponCode()));\n@@\n-        reservationRepository.findActiveByCouponIdAndCartId(coupon.getId(), request.cartId(), now)\n-            .ifPresentOrElse(\n-                existing -> {},\n-                () -> reservationRepository.save(new CouponUsageReservation(coupon, request.cartId(), userId, cartSummary.expiresAt()))\n-            );\n+        boolean reservationCreated = reservationRepository\n+            .findActiveByCouponIdAndCartId(coupon.getId(), request.cartId(), now)\n+            .map(existing -> false)\n+            .orElseGet(() -> {\n+                reservationRepository.save(new CouponUsageReservation(coupon, request.cartId(), userId, cartSummary.expiresAt()));\n+                return true;\n+            });\n \n         DiscountCalculationResult result = calculateDiscount(coupon, cartSummary.currency(), request.cartId());\n-        eventPublisher.publishEvent(new CouponValidatedEvent(\n-            request.cartId(),\n-            coupon.getCode(),\n-            result.discountAmountInSmallestUnit(),\n-            result.currency(),\n-            userId\n-        ));\n-        eventPublisher.publishEvent(new CouponAppliedEvent(\n-            request.cartId(),\n-            coupon.getCode(),\n-            result.discountAmountInSmallestUnit(),\n-            result.currency(),\n-            userId\n-        ));\n+        if (reservationCreated) {\n+            eventPublisher.publishEvent(new CouponValidatedEvent(\n+                request.cartId(),\n+                coupon.getCode(),\n+                result.discountAmountInSmallestUnit(),\n+                result.currency(),\n+                userId\n+            ));\n+            eventPublisher.publishEvent(new CouponAppliedEvent(\n+                request.cartId(),\n+                coupon.getCode(),\n+                result.discountAmountInSmallestUnit(),\n+                result.currency(),\n+                userId\n+            ));\n+        }\n*** End Patch\n"
  }
}
```

## Entry 440
**Timestamp:** 2026-03-04T21:50:27.089Z
**Role/Type:** response_item
**Content:**
```json
{
  "timestamp": "2026-03-04T21:50:27.089Z",
  "type": "response_item",
  "payload": {
    "type": "function_call",
    "name": "exec_command",
    "arguments": "{\"cmd\":\"cat > promotions/src/test/java/com/eventplatform/promotions/domain/PromotionTest.java <<'EOF'\\npackage com.eventplatform.promotions.domain;\\n\\nimport static org.assertj.core.api.Assertions.assertThat;\\n\\nimport com.eventplatform.promotions.domain.enums.DiscountType;\\nimport com.eventplatform.promotions.domain.enums.PromotionScope;\\nimport com.eventplatform.promotions.domain.enums.PromotionStatus;\\nimport java.math.BigDecimal;\\nimport java.time.Instant;\\nimport org.junit.jupiter.api.Test;\\n\\nclass PromotionTest {\\n\\n    @Test\\n    void deactivate_should_cascade_inactive_status_to_all_linked_coupons() {\\n        Promotion promotion = promotion(Instant.now().minusSeconds(3600), Instant.now().plusSeconds(3600));\\n        Coupon c1 = new Coupon(promotion, 1L, \\\"SAVE10\\\");\\n        Coupon c2 = new Coupon(promotion, 1L, \\\"SAVE20\\\");\\n        promotion.addCoupon(c1);\\n        promotion.addCoupon(c2);\\n\\n        promotion.deactivate();\\n\\n        assertThat(promotion.getStatus()).isEqualTo(PromotionStatus.INACTIVE);\\n        assertThat(c1.getStatus()).isEqualTo(com.eventplatform.promotions.domain.enums.CouponStatus.INACTIVE);\\n        assertThat(c2.getStatus()).isEqualTo(com.eventplatform.promotions.domain.enums.CouponStatus.INACTIVE);\\n    }\\n\\n    @Test\\n    void isValid_should_return_false_when_validUntil_is_in_past() {\\n        Promotion promotion = promotion(Instant.now().minusSeconds(7200), Instant.now().minusSeconds(3600));\\n\\n        boolean valid = promotion.isValid(Instant.now());\\n\\n        assertThat(valid).isFalse();\\n    }\\n\\n    @Test\\n    void isValid_should_return_false_when_validFrom_is_in_future() {\\n        Promotion promotion = promotion(Instant.now().plusSeconds(3600), Instant.now().plusSeconds(7200));\\n\\n        boolean valid = promotion.isValid(Instant.now());\\n\\n        assertThat(valid).isFalse();\\n    }\\n\\n    private Promotion promotion(Instant from, Instant until) {\\n        return new Promotion(\\n            1L,\\n            \\\"Promo\\\",\\n            DiscountType.PERCENT_OFF,\\n            new BigDecimal(\\\"10\\\"),\\n            PromotionScope.ORG_WIDE,\\n            null,\\n            10,\\n            2,\\n            from,\\n            until\\n        );\\n    }\\n}\\nEOF\\n\\ncat > promotions/src/test/java/com/eventplatform/promotions/domain/CouponTest.java <<'EOF'\\npackage com.eventplatform.promotions.domain;\\n\\nimport static org.assertj.core.api.Assertions.assertThat;\\n\\nimport com.eventplatform.promotions.domain.enums.CouponStatus;\\nimport com.eventplatform.promotions.domain.enums.DiscountType;\\nimport com.eventplatform.promotions.domain.enums.PromotionScope;\\nimport java.math.BigDecimal;\\nimport java.time.Instant;\\nimport org.junit.jupiter.api.Test;\\n\\nclass CouponTest {\\n\\n    @Test\\n    void recordRedemption_should_transition_to_EXHAUSTED_when_count_reaches_max_usage_limit() {\\n        Coupon coupon = coupon();\\n        for (int i = 0; i < 4; i++) {\\n            coupon.recordRedemption(5);\\n        }\\n\\n        coupon.recordRedemption(5);\\n\\n        assertThat(coupon.getRedemptionCount()).isEqualTo(5);\\n        assertThat(coupon.getStatus()).isEqualTo(CouponStatus.EXHAUSTED);\\n    }\\n\\n    @Test\\n    void voidRedemption_should_revert_EXHAUSTED_to_ACTIVE() {\\n        Coupon coupon = coupon();\\n        for (int i = 0; i < 5; i++) {\\n            coupon.recordRedemption(5);\\n        }\\n        assertThat(coupon.getStatus()).isEqualTo(CouponStatus.EXHAUSTED);\\n\\n        coupon.voidRedemption();\\n\\n        assertThat(coupon.getRedemptionCount()).isEqualTo(4);\\n        assertThat(coupon.getStatus()).isEqualTo(CouponStatus.ACTIVE);\\n    }\\n\\n    @Test\\n    void canEbDelete_should_return_false_when_ebQuantitySoldAtLastSync_is_greater_than_zero() {\\n        Coupon coupon = coupon();\\n        coupon.markSynced(\\\"eb_123\\\", 1);\\n\\n        boolean canDelete = coupon.canEbDelete();\\n\\n        assertThat(canDelete).isFalse();\\n    }\\n\\n    private Coupon coupon() {\\n        Promotion promotion = new Promotion(\\n            1L,\\n            \\\"Promo\\\",\\n            DiscountType.PERCENT_OFF,\\n            new BigDecimal(\\\"10\\\"),\\n            PromotionScope.ORG_WIDE,\\n            null,\\n            5,\\n            2,\\n            Instant.now().minusSeconds(3600),\\n            Instant.now().plusSeconds(3600)\\n        );\\n        return new Coupon(promotion, 1L, \\\"SAVE10\\\");\\n    }\\n}\\nEOF\\n\\ncat > promotions/src/test/java/com/eventplatform/promotions/domain/DiscountCalculationResultTest.java <<'EOF'\\npackage com.eventplatform.promotions.domain;\\n\\nimport static org.assertj.core.api.Assertions.assertThat;\\n\\nimport java.math.BigDecimal;\\nimport java.math.RoundingMode;\\nimport org.junit.jupiter.api.Test;\\n\\nclass DiscountCalculationResultTest {\\n\\n    @Test\\n    void percentOff_should_compute_discount_correctly_in_smallest_unit() {\\n        long cartTotal = 10_000L;\\n        BigDecimal percent = new BigDecimal(\\\"10\\\");\\n\\n        long discount = BigDecimal.valueOf(cartTotal)\\n            .multiply(percent)\\n            .divide(BigDecimal.valueOf(100), 0, RoundingMode.FLOOR)\\n            .longValue();\\n        long adjusted = cartTotal - discount;\\n\\n        assertThat(discount).isEqualTo(1_000L);\\n        assertThat(adjusted).isEqualTo(9_000L);\\n    }\\n\\n    @Test\\n    void amountOff_should_floor_to_zero_when_discount_exceeds_cart_total() {\\n        long cartTotal = 500L;\\n        long amountOff = 1_000L;\\n\\n        long discount = Math.min(amountOff, cartTotal);\\n        long adjusted = Math.max(0L, cartTotal - discount);\\n\\n        assertThat(discount).isEqualTo(500L);\\n        assertThat(adjusted).isEqualTo(0L);\\n    }\\n}\\nEOF\"}",
    "call_id": "call_ds0JI4J7HaB9gJsfVvpFS2aD"
  }
}
```

com.eventplatform.shared.common.service.CartSnapshotReader;\\nimport com.eventplatform.shared.common.service.SlotSummaryReader;\\nimport java.math.BigDecimal;\\nimport java.time.Instant;\\nimport java.util.List;\\nimport java.util.Optional;\\nimport org.junit.jupiter.api.BeforeEach;\\nimport org.junit.jupiter.api.Test;\\nimport org.junit.jupiter.api.extension.ExtendWith;\\nimport org.mockito.ArgumentCaptor;\\nimport org.mockito.InjectMocks;\\nimport org.mockito.Mock;\\nimport org.mockito.junit.jupiter.MockitoExtension;\\nimport org.springframework.context.ApplicationEventPublisher;\\n\\n@ExtendWith(MockitoExtension.class)\\nclass CouponEligibilityServiceTest {\\n\\n    @Mock\\n    private CouponRepository couponRepository;\\n    @Mock\\n    private CouponUsageReservationRepository reservationRepository;\\n    @Mock\\n    private CouponRedemptionRepository redemptionRepository;\\n    @Mock\\n    private CartSnapshotReader cartSnapshotReader;\\n    @Mock\\n    private SlotSummaryReader slotSummaryReader;\\n    @Mock\\n    private ApplicationEventPublisher eventPublisher;\\n\\n    @InjectMocks\\n    private CouponEligibilityService service;\\n\\n    private Promotion promotion;\\n    private Coupon coupon;\\n    private CartSummaryDto cartSummary;\\n\\n    @BeforeEach\\n    void setUp() {\\n        promotion = new Promotion(\\n            1L,\\n            \\\"Promo\\\",\\n            DiscountType.PERCENT_OFF,\\n            new BigDecimal(\\\"10\\\"),\\n            PromotionScope.ORG_WIDE,\\n            null,\\n            10,\\n            2,\\n            Instant.now().minusSeconds(3600),\\n            Instant.now().plusSeconds(3600)\\n        );\\n        coupon = new Coupon(promotion, 1L, \\\"SAVE10\\\");\\n        cartSummary = new CartSummaryDto(100L, 1L, 10L, null, Instant.now().plusSeconds(1800), \\\"inr\\\");\\n\\n        when(cartSnapshotReader.getCartSummary(100L)).thenReturn(cartSummary);\\n        when(cartSnapshotReader.getCartItems(100L)).thenReturn(List.of(\\n            new CartItemSnapshotDto(1L, null, null, \\\"tc1\\\", 10_000L, \\\"inr\\\", 1)\\n        ));\\n        when(couponRepository.findTopByCodeIgnoreCase(\\\"SAVE10\\\")).thenReturn(Optional.of(coupon));\\n        when(reservationRepository.countActiveByCouponId(any(), any())).thenReturn(0L);\\n        when(redemptionRepository.countByCouponIdAndUserIdAndVoidedFalse(any(), any())).thenReturn(0L);\\n        when(reservationRepository.findActiveByCouponIdAndCartId(any(), any(), any())).thenReturn(Optional.empty());\\n    }\\n\\n    @Test\\n    void validate_should_return_discount_breakdown_for_valid_active_coupon() {\\n        DiscountBreakdownResponse result = service.validateAndApply(99L, new CouponValidateRequest(\\\"SAVE10\\\", 100L));\\n\\n        assertThat(result.couponCode()).isEqualTo(\\\"SAVE10\\\");\\n        assertThat(result.discountAmountInSmallestUnit()).isEqualTo(1000L);\\n        assertThat(result.adjustedCartTotalInSmallestUnit()).isEqualTo(9000L);\\n        verify(reservationRepository).save(any(CouponUsageReservation.class));\\n        verify(eventPublisher).publishEvent(any(CouponValidatedEvent.class));\\n        verify(eventPublisher).publishEvent(any(CouponAppliedEvent.class));\\n    }\\n\\n    @Test\\n    void validate_should_throw_CouponExpiredException_when_outside_validity_window() {\\n        Promotion expiredPromotion = new Promotion(\\n            1L, \\\"Promo\\\", DiscountType.PERCENT_OFF, new BigDecimal(\\\"10\\\"), PromotionScope.ORG_WIDE,\\n            null, 10, 2, Instant.now().minusSeconds(7200), Instant.now().minusSeconds(3600)\\n        );\\n        Coupon expiredCoupon = new Coupon(expiredPromotion, 1L, \\\"SAVE10\\\");\\n        when(couponRepository.findTopByCodeIgnoreCase(\\\"SAVE10\\\")).thenReturn(Optional.of(expiredCoupon));\\n\\n        assertThatThrownBy(() -> service.validateAndApply(99L, new CouponValidateRequest(\\\"SAVE10\\\", 100L)))\\n            .isInstanceOf(CouponExpiredException.class);\\n    }\\n\\n    @Test\\n    void validate_should_throw_CouponInactiveException_when_status_is_EXHAUSTED() {\\n        for (int i = 0; i < 10; i++) {\\n            coupon.recordRedemption(10);\\n        }\\n        assertThat(coupon.getStatus()).isEqualTo(CouponStatus.EXHAUSTED);\\n\\n        assertThatThrownBy(() -> service.validateAndApply(99L, new CouponValidateRequest(\\\"SAVE10\\\", 100L)))\\n            .isInstanceOf(CouponInactiveException.class);\\n    }\\n\\n    @Test\\n    void validate_should_throw_CouponOrgMismatchException_when_coupon_org_differs_from_cart_org() {\\n        when(couponRepository.findTopByCodeIgnoreCase(\\\"SAVE10\\\"))\\n            .thenReturn(Optional.of(new Coupon(promotion, 2L, \\\"SAVE10\\\")));\\n\\n        assertThatThrownBy(() -> service.validateAndApply(99L, new CouponValidateRequest(\\\"SAVE10\\\", 100L)))\\n            .isInstanceOf(CouponOrgMismatchException.class);\\n    }\\n\\n    @Test\\n    void validate_should_throw_CouponEventMismatchException_for_event_scoped_coupon_on_wrong_slot() {\\n        Promotion eventScoped = new Promotion(\\n            1L, \\\"Promo\\\", DiscountType.PERCENT_OFF, new BigDecimal(\\\"10\\\"), PromotionScope.EVENT_SCOPED,\\n            \\\"eb-event-1\\\", 10, 2, Instant.now().minusSeconds(3600), Instant.now().plusSeconds(3600)\\n        );\\n        Coupon scopedCoupon = new Coupon(eventScoped, 1L, \\\"SAVE10\\\");\\n        when(couponRepository.findTopByCodeIgnoreCase(\\\"SAVE10\\\")).thenReturn(Optional.of(scopedCoupon));\\n        when(slotSummaryReader.getSlotSummary(10L))\\n            .thenReturn(new SlotSummaryDto(10L, \\\"ACTIVE\\\", \\\"eb-event-2\\\", SeatingMode.GA, 1L, 1L, 1L, null));\\n\\n        assertThatThrownBy(() -> service.validateAndApply(99L, new CouponValidateRequest(\\\"SAVE10\\\", 100L)))\\n            .isInstanceOf(CouponEventMismatchException.class);\\n    }\\n\\n    @Test\\n    void validate_should_throw_CouponUsageLimitReachedException_when_count_plus_reservations_equals_max() {\\n        for (int i = 0; i < 4; i++) {\\n            coupon.recordRedemption(100);\\n        }\\n        when(reservationRepository.countActiveByCouponId(any(), any())).thenReturn(1L);\\n        Promotion limitPromotion = new Promotion(\\n            1L, \\\"Promo\\\", DiscountType.PERCENT_OFF, new BigDecimal(\\\"10\\\"), PromotionScope.ORG_WIDE,\\n            null, 5, 2, Instant.now().minusSeconds(3600), Instant.now().plusSeconds(3600)\\n        );\\n        Coupon limitCoupon = new Coupon(limitPromotion, 1L, \\\"SAVE10\\\");\\n        for (int i = 0; i < 4; i++) {\\n            limitCoupon.recordRedemption(100);\\n        }\\n        when(couponRepository.findTopByCodeIgnoreCase(\\\"SAVE10\\\")).thenReturn(Optional.of(limitCoupon));\\n\\n        assertThatThrownBy(() -> service.validateAndApply(99L, new CouponValidateRequest(\\\"SAVE10\\\", 100L)))\\n            .isInstanceOf(CouponUsageLimitReachedException.class);\\n    }\\n\\n    @Test\\n    void validate_should_throw_CouponPerUserCapReachedException_when_user_has_reached_per_user_cap() {\\n        Promotion capPromotion = new Promotion(\\n            1L, \\\"Promo\\\", DiscountType.PERCENT_OFF, new BigDecimal(\\\"10\\\"), PromotionScope.ORG_WIDE,\\n            null, 10, 1, Instant.now().minusSeconds(3600), Instant.now().plusSeconds(3600)\\n        );\\n        Coupon capCoupon = new Coupon(capPromotion, 1L, \\\"SAVE10\\\");\\n        when(couponRepository.findTopByCodeIgnoreCase(\\\"SAVE10\\\")).thenReturn(Optional.of(capCoupon));\\n        when(redemptionRepository.countByCouponIdAndUserIdAndVoidedFalse(any(), any())).thenReturn(1L);\\n\\n        assertThatThrownBy(() -> service.validateAndApply(99L, new CouponValidateRequest(\\\"SAVE10\\\", 100L)))\\n            .isInstanceOf(CouponPerUserCapReachedException.class);\\n    }\\n\\n    @Test\\n    void validate_should_return_idempotent_response_when_reservation_already_exists_for_same_cart() {\\n        when(reservationRepository.findActiveByCouponIdAndCartId(any(), any(), any()))\\n            .thenReturn(Optional.of(new CouponUsageReservation(coupon, 100L, 99L, Instant.now().plusSeconds(1200))));\\n\\n        DiscountBreakdownResponse result = service.validateAndApply(99L, new CouponValidateRequest(\\\"SAVE10\\\", 100L));\\n\\n        assertThat(result.discountAmountInSmallestUnit()).isEqualTo(1000L);\\n        verify(reservationRepository, never()).save(any(CouponUsageReservation.class));\\n        verify(eventPublisher, never()).publishEvent(any(CouponValidatedEvent.class));\\n        verify(eventPublisher, never()).publishEvent(any(CouponAppliedEvent.class));\\n    }\\n\\n    @Test\\n    void validate_should_create_CouponUsageReservation_with_expiresAt_matching_cart_expiry() {\\n        Instant expiry = Instant.now().plusSeconds(1800);\\n        when(cartSnapshotReader.getCartSummary(100L)).thenReturn(new CartSummaryDto(100L, 1L, 10L, null, expiry, \\\"inr\\\"));\\n\\n        service.validateAndApply(99L, new CouponValidateRequest(\\\"SAVE10\\\", 100L));\\n\\n        ArgumentCaptor<CouponUsageReservation> captor = ArgumentCaptor.forClass(CouponUsageReservation.class);\\n        verify(reservationRepository).save(captor.capture());\\n        assertThat(captor.getValue().getExpiresAt()).isEqualTo(expiry);\\n    }\\n}\\nEOF\"}",

-> service.validateAndApply(99L, new CouponValidateRequest(\\\"SAVE10\\\", 100L)))\\n            .isInstanceOf(CouponEventMismatchException.class);\\n    }\\n\\n    @Test\\n    void validate_should_throw_CouponUsageLimitReachedException_when_count_plus_reservations_equals_max() {\\n        for (int i = 0; i < 4; i++) {\\n            coupon.recordRedemption(100);\\n        }\\n        when(reservationRepository.countActiveByCouponId(any(), any())).thenReturn(1L);\\n        Promotion limitPromotion = new Promotion(\\n            1L, \\\"Promo\\\", DiscountType.PERCENT_OFF, new BigDecimal(\\\"10\\\"), PromotionScope.ORG_WIDE,\\n            null, 5, 2, Instant.now().minusSeconds(3600), Instant.now().plusSeconds(3600)\\n        );\\n        Coupon limitCoupon = new Coupon(limitPromotion, 1L, \\\"SAVE10\\\");\\n        for (int i = 0; i < 4; i++) {\\n            limitCoupon.recordRedemption(100);\\n        }\\n        when(couponRepository.findTopByCodeIgnoreCase(\\\"SAVE10\\\")).thenReturn(Optional.of(limitCoupon));\\n\\n        assertThatThrownBy(() -> service.validateAndApply(99L, new CouponValidateRequest(\\\"SAVE10\\\", 100L)))\\n            .isInstanceOf(CouponUsageLimitReachedException.class);\\n    }\\n\\n    @Test\\n    void validate_should_throw_CouponPerUserCapReachedException_when_user_has_reached_per_user_cap() {\\n        Promotion capPromotion = new Promotion(\\n            1L, \\\"Promo\\\", DiscountType.PERCENT_OFF, new BigDecimal(\\\"10\\\"), PromotionScope.ORG_WIDE,\\n            null, 10, 1, Instant.now().minusSeconds(3600), Instant.now().plusSeconds(3600)\\n        );\\n        Coupon capCoupon = new Coupon(capPromotion, 1L, \\\"SAVE10\\\");\\n        when(couponRepository.findTopByCodeIgnoreCase(\\\"SAVE10\\\")).thenReturn(Optional.of(capCoupon));\\n        when(redemptionRepository.countByCouponIdAndUserIdAndVoidedFalse(any(), any())).thenReturn(1L);\\n\\n        assertThatThrownBy(() -> service.validateAndApply(99L, new CouponValidateRequest(\\\"SAVE10\\\", 100L)))\\n            .isInstanceOf(CouponPerUserCapReachedException.class);\\n    }\\n\\n    @Test\\n    void validate_should_return_idempotent_response_when_reservation_already_exists_for_same_cart() {\\n        when(reservationRepository.findActiveByCouponIdAndCartId(any(), any(), any()))\\n            .thenReturn(Optional.of(new CouponUsageReservation(coupon, 100L, 99L, Instant.now().plusSeconds(1200))));\\n\\n        DiscountBreakdownResponse result = service.validateAndApply(99L, new CouponValidateRequest(\\\"SAVE10\\\", 100L));\\n\\n        assertThat(result.discountAmountInSmallestUnit()).isEqualTo(1000L);\\n        verify(reservationRepository, never()).save(any(CouponUsageReservation.class));\\n        verify(eventPublisher, never()).publishEvent(any(CouponValidatedEvent.class));\\n        verify(eventPublisher, never()).publishEvent(any(CouponAppliedEvent.class));\\n    }\\n\\n    @Test\\n    void validate_should_create_CouponUsageReservation_with_expiresAt_matching_cart_expiry() {\\n        Instant expiry = Instant.now().plusSeconds(1800);\\n        when(cartSnapshotReader.getCartSummary(100L)).thenReturn(new CartSummaryDto(100L, 1L, 10L, null, expiry, \\\"inr\\\"));\\n\\n        service.validateAndApply(99L, new CouponValidateRequest(\\\"SAVE10\\\", 100L));\\n\\n        ArgumentCaptor<CouponUsageReservation> captor = ArgumentCaptor.forClass(CouponUsageReservation.class);\\n        verify(reservationRepository).save(captor.capture());\\n        assertThat(captor.getValue().getExpiresAt()).isEqualTo(expiry);\\n    }\\n}\\nEOF\"}",

static org.mockito.Mockito.when;\\n\\nimport com.eventplatform.promotions.domain.Coupon;\\nimport com.eventplatform.promotions.domain.CouponRedemption;\\nimport com.eventplatform.promotions.domain.enums.EbSyncStatus;\\nimport com.eventplatform.promotions.domain.enums.PromotionScope;\\nimport com.eventplatform.promotions.repository.CouponRedemptionRepository;\\nimport com.eventplatform.promotions.repository.CouponRepository;\\nimport com.eventplatform.promotions.repository.CouponUsageReservationRepository;\\nimport com.eventplatform.shared.common.dto.CartSummaryDto;\\nimport com.eventplatform.shared.common.service.CartSnapshotReader;\\nimport java.math.BigDecimal;\\nimport java.time.Instant;\\nimport java.util.Optional;\\nimport org.junit.jupiter.api.BeforeEach;\\nimport org.junit.jupiter.api.Test;\\nimport org.junit.jupiter.api.extension.ExtendWith;\\nimport org.mockito.ArgumentCaptor;\\nimport org.mockito.InjectMocks;\\nimport org.mockito.Mock;\\nimport org.mockito.junit.jupiter.MockitoExtension;\\nimport org.springframework.context.ApplicationEventPublisher;\\n\\n@ExtendWith(MockitoExtension.class)\\nclass CouponRedemptionServiceTest {\\n\\n    @Mock\\n    private CouponRepository couponRepository;\\n    @Mock\\n    private CouponRedemptionRepository redemptionRepository;\\n    @Mock\\n    private CouponUsageReservationRepository reservationRepository;\\n    @Mock\\n    private CouponEligibilityService eligibilityService;\\n    @Mock\\n    private CartSnapshotReader cartSnapshotReader;\\n    @Mock\\n    private DiscountSyncOrchestrator discountSyncOrchestrator;\\n    @Mock\\n    private ApplicationEventPublisher eventPublisher;\\n\\n    @InjectMocks\\n    private CouponRedemptionService service;\\n\\n    private Promotion promotion;\\n    private Coupon coupon;\\n    private CouponUsageReservation reservation;\\n\\n    @BeforeEach\\n    void setUp() {\\n        promotion = new Promotion(\\n            1L,\\n            \\\"Promo\\\",\\n            DiscountType.PERCENT_OFF,\\n            new BigDecimal(\\\"10\\\"),\\n            PromotionScope.ORG_WIDE,\\n            null,\\n            5,\\n            2,\\n            Instant.now().minusSeconds(3600),\\n            Instant.now().plusSeconds(3600)\\n        );\\n        coupon = new Coupon(promotion, 1L, \\\"SAVE10\\\");\\n        reservation = new CouponUsageReservation(coupon, 500L, 99L, Instant.now().plusSeconds(1800));\\n    }\\n\\n    @Test\\n    void onBookingConfirmed_should_create_redemption_and_increment_count() {\\n        when(cartSnapshotReader.getCartSummary(500L)).thenReturn(new CartSummaryDto(500L, 1L, 10L, \\\"SAVE10\\\", Instant.now().plusSeconds(1800), \\\"inr\\\"));\\n        when(reservationRepository.findOpenByCartId(500L)).thenReturn(Optional.of(reservation));\\n        when(couponRepository.findByIdForUpdate(any())).thenReturn(Optional.of(coupon));\\n        when(redemptionRepository.existsByCouponIdAndBookingIdAndVoidedFalse(any(), any())).thenReturn(false);\\n        when(eligibilityService.calculateDiscount(coupon, \\\"inr\\\", 500L))\\n            .thenReturn(new DiscountCalculationResult(\\\"SAVE10\\\", DiscountType.PERCENT_OFF, 1000L, 9000L, \\\"inr\\\"));\\n\\n        service.onBookingConfirmed(91L, 500L, 99L);\\n\\n        ArgumentCaptor<CouponRedemption> redCaptor = ArgumentCaptor.forClass(CouponRedemption.class);\\n        verify(redemptionRepository).save(redCaptor.capture());\\n        assertThat(redCaptor.getValue().getBookingId()).isEqualTo(91L);\\n        assertThat(coupon.getRedemptionCount()).isEqualTo(1);\\n        assertThat(reservation.isReleased()).isTrue();\\n    }\\n\\n    @Test\\n    void onBookingConfirmed_should_mark_coupon_EXHAUSTED_and_trigger_guarded_delete_when_limit_reached() {\\n        for (int i = 0; i < 4; i++) {\\n            coupon.recordRedemption(5);\\n        }\\n        when(cartSnapshotReader.getCartSummary(500L)).thenReturn(new CartSummaryDto(500L, 1L, 10L, \\\"SAVE10\\\", Instant.now().plusSeconds(1800), \\\"inr\\\"));\\n        when(reservationRepository.findOpenByCartId(500L)).thenReturn(Optional.of(reservation));\\n        when(couponRepository.findByIdForUpdate(any())).thenReturn(Optional.of(coupon));\\n        when(redemptionRepository.existsByCouponIdAndBookingIdAndVoidedFalse(any(), any())).thenReturn(false);\\n        when(eligibilityService.calculateDiscount(coupon, \\\"inr\\\", 500L))\\n            .thenReturn(new DiscountCalculationResult(\\\"SAVE10\\\", DiscountType.PERCENT_OFF, 500L, 0L, \\\"inr\\\"));\\n\\n        service.onBookingConfirmed(91L, 500L, 99L);\\n\\n        assertThat(coupon.getStatus()).isEqualTo(com.eventplatform.promotions.domain.enums.CouponStatus.EXHAUSTED);\\n        verify(discountSyncOrchestrator).guardedDelete(coupon.getId());\\n    }\\n\\n    @Test\\n    void onBookingConfirmed_should_be_noop_when_no_coupon_in_cart_snapshot() {\\n        when(cartSnapshotReader.getCartSummary(500L)).thenReturn(new CartSummaryDto(500L, 1L, 10L, null, Instant.now().plusSeconds(1800), \\\"inr\\\"));\\n\\n        service.onBookingConfirmed(91L, 500L, 99L);\\n\\n        verify(redemptionRepository, never()).save(any());\\n    }\\n\\n    @Test\\n    void onBookingCancelled_should_void_redemption_and_decrement_count() {\\n        coupon.recordRedemption(5);\\n        CouponRedemption redemption = new CouponRedemption(coupon, 99L, 91L, 500L, new BigDecimal(\\\"10.00\\\"), \\\"inr\\\");\\n        when(redemptionRepository.findByBookingIdAndVoidedFalse(91L)).thenReturn(Optional.of(redemption));\\n        when(couponRepository.findByIdForUpdate(any())).thenReturn(Optional.of(coupon));\\n\\n        service.onBookingCancelled(91L);\\n\\n        assertThat(redemption.isVoided()).isTrue();\\n        assertThat(coupon.getRedemptionCount()).isEqualTo(0);\\n    }\\n\\n    @Test\\n    void onBookingCancelled_should_revert_EXHAUSTED_to_ACTIVE_and_not_recreate_on_EB() {\\n        for (int i = 0; i < 5; i++) {\\n            coupon.recordRedemption(5);\\n        }\\n        coupon.markDeleteBlocked(2);\\n        CouponRedemption redemption = new CouponRedemption(coupon, 99L, 91L, 500L, new BigDecimal(\\\"10.00\\\"), \\\"inr\\\");\\n        when(redemptionRepository.findByBookingIdAndVoidedFalse(91L)).thenReturn(Optional.of(redemption));\\n        when(couponRepository.findByIdForUpdate(any())).thenReturn(Optional.of(coupon));\\n\\n        service.onBookingCancelled(91L);\\n\\n        assertThat(coupon.getStatus()).isEqualTo(com.eventplatform.promotions.domain.enums.CouponStatus.ACTIVE);\\n        assertThat(coupon.getEbSyncStatus()).isEqualTo(EbSyncStatus.DELETE_BLOCKED);\\n        verify(discountSyncOrchestrator, never()).createSync(any());\\n    }\\n\\n    @Test\\n    void onPaymentFailed_should_release_open_usage_reservation_for_cart() {\\n        service.onPaymentFailed(500L, 99L);\\n\\n        verify(reservationRepository).releaseByCartIdAndUserId(500L, 99L);\\n    }\\n}\\nEOF\"}",
