org.mockito.junit.jupiter.MockitoExtension;\\nimport org.springframework.context.ApplicationEventPublisher;\\n\\n@ExtendWith(MockitoExtension.class)\\nclass CouponRedemptionServiceTest {\\n\\n    @Mock\\n    private CouponRepository couponRepository;\\n    @Mock\\n    private CouponRedemptionRepository redemptionRepository;\\n    @Mock\\n    private CouponUsageReservationRepository reservationRepository;\\n    @Mock\\n    private CouponEligibilityService eligibilityService;\\n    @Mock\\n    private CartSnapshotReader cartSnapshotReader;\\n    @Mock\\n    private DiscountSyncOrchestrator discountSyncOrchestrator;\\n    @Mock\\n    private ApplicationEventPublisher eventPublisher;\\n\\n    @InjectMocks\\n    private CouponRedemptionService service;\\n\\n    private Promotion promotion;\\n    private Coupon coupon;\\n    private CouponUsageReservation reservation;\\n\\n    @BeforeEach\\n    void setUp() {\\n        promotion = new Promotion(\\n            1L,\\n            \\\"Promo\\\",\\n            DiscountType.PERCENT_OFF,\\n            new BigDecimal(\\\"10\\\"),\\n            PromotionScope.ORG_WIDE,\\n            null,\\n            5,\\n            2,\\n            Instant.now().minusSeconds(3600),\\n            Instant.now().plusSeconds(3600)\\n        );\\n        coupon = new Coupon(promotion, 1L, \\\"SAVE10\\\");\\n        reservation = new CouponUsageReservation(coupon, 500L, 99L, Instant.now().plusSeconds(1800));\\n    }\\n\\n    @Test\\n    void onBookingConfirmed_should_create_redemption_and_increment_count() {\\n        when(cartSnapshotReader.getCartSummary(500L)).thenReturn(new CartSummaryDto(500L, 1L, 10L, \\\"SAVE10\\\", Instant.now().plusSeconds(1800), \\\"inr\\\"));\\n        when(reservationRepository.findOpenByCartId(500L)).thenReturn(Optional.of(reservation));\\n        when(couponRepository.findByIdForUpdate(any())).thenReturn(Optional.of(coupon));\\n        when(redemptionRepository.existsByCouponIdAndBookingIdAndVoidedFalse(any(), any())).thenReturn(false);\\n        when(eligibilityService.calculateDiscount(coupon, \\\"inr\\\", 500L))\\n            .thenReturn(new DiscountCalculationResult(\\\"SAVE10\\\", DiscountType.PERCENT_OFF, 1000L, 9000L, \\\"inr\\\"));\\n\\n        service.onBookingConfirmed(91L, 500L, 99L);\\n\\n        ArgumentCaptor<CouponRedemption> redCaptor = ArgumentCaptor.forClass(CouponRedemption.class);\\n        verify(redemptionRepository).save(redCaptor.capture());\\n        assertThat(redCaptor.getValue().getBookingId()).isEqualTo(91L);\\n        assertThat(coupon.getRedemptionCount()).isEqualTo(1);\\n        assertThat(reservation.isReleased()).isTrue();\\n    }\\n\\n    @Test\\n    void onBookingConfirmed_should_mark_coupon_EXHAUSTED_and_trigger_guarded_delete_when_limit_reached() {\\n        for (int i = 0; i < 4; i++) {\\n            coupon.recordRedemption(5);\\n        }\\n        when(cartSnapshotReader.getCartSummary(500L)).thenReturn(new CartSummaryDto(500L, 1L, 10L, \\\"SAVE10\\\", Instant.now().plusSeconds(1800), \\\"inr\\\"));\\n        when(reservationRepository.findOpenByCartId(500L)).thenReturn(Optional.of(reservation));\\n        when(couponRepository.findByIdForUpdate(any())).thenReturn(Optional.of(coupon));\\n        when(redemptionRepository.existsByCouponIdAndBookingIdAndVoidedFalse(any(), any())).thenReturn(false);\\n        when(eligibilityService.calculateDiscount(coupon, \\\"inr\\\", 500L))\\n            .thenReturn(new DiscountCalculationResult(\\\"SAVE10\\\", DiscountType.PERCENT_OFF, 500L, 0L, \\\"inr\\\"));\\n\\n        service.onBookingConfirmed(91L, 500L, 99L);\\n\\n        assertThat(coupon.getStatus()).isEqualTo(com.eventplatform.promotions.domain.enums.CouponStatus.EXHAUSTED);\\n        verify(discountSyncOrchestrator).guardedDelete(coupon.getId());\\n    }\\n\\n    @Test\\n    void onBookingConfirmed_should_be_noop_when_no_coupon_in_cart_snapshot() {\\n        when(cartSnapshotReader.getCartSummary(500L)).thenReturn(new CartSummaryDto(500L, 1L, 10L, null, Instant.now().plusSeconds(1800), \\\"inr\\\"));\\n\\n        service.onBookingConfirmed(91L, 500L, 99L);\\n\\n        verify(redemptionRepository, never()).save(any());\\n    }\\n\\n    @Test\\n    void onBookingCancelled_should_void_redemption_and_decrement_count() {\\n        coupon.recordRedemption(5);\\n        CouponRedemption redemption = new CouponRedemption(coupon, 99L, 91L, 500L, new BigDecimal(\\\"10.00\\\"), \\\"inr\\\");\\n        when(redemptionRepository.findByBookingIdAndVoidedFalse(91L)).thenReturn(Optional.of(redemption));\\n        when(couponRepository.findByIdForUpdate(any())).thenReturn(Optional.of(coupon));\\n\\n        service.onBookingCancelled(91L);\\n\\n        assertThat(redemption.isVoided()).isTrue();\\n        assertThat(coupon.getRedemptionCount()).isEqualTo(0);\\n    }\\n\\n    @Test\\n    void onBookingCancelled_should_revert_EXHAUSTED_to_ACTIVE_and_not_recreate_on_EB() {\\n        for (int i = 0; i < 5; i++) {\\n            coupon.recordRedemption(5);\\n        }\\n        coupon.markDeleteBlocked(2);\\n        CouponRedemption redemption = new CouponRedemption(coupon, 99L, 91L, 500L, new BigDecimal(\\\"10.00\\\"), \\\"inr\\\");\\n        when(redemptionRepository.findByBookingIdAndVoidedFalse(91L)).thenReturn(Optional.of(redemption));\\n        when(couponRepository.findByIdForUpdate(any())).thenReturn(Optional.of(coupon));\\n\\n        service.onBookingCancelled(91L);\\n\\n        assertThat(coupon.getStatus()).isEqualTo(com.eventplatform.promotions.domain.enums.CouponStatus.ACTIVE);\\n        assertThat(coupon.getEbSyncStatus()).isEqualTo(EbSyncStatus.DELETE_BLOCKED);\\n        verify(discountSyncOrchestrator, never()).createSync(any());\\n    }\\n\\n    @Test\\n    void onPaymentFailed_should_release_open_usage_reservation_for_cart() {\\n        service.onPaymentFailed(500L, 99L);\\n\\n        verify(reservationRepository).releaseByCartIdAndUserId(500L, 99L);\\n    }\\n}\\nEOF\"}",
    "call_id": "call_bWHbJYSdR4yI4SKEfq7EjDJU"
  }
}

org.mockito.Mockito.never;\\nimport static org.mockito.Mockito.verify;\\nimport static org.mockito.Mockito.when;\\n\\nimport com.eventplatform.promotions.domain.Coupon;\\nimport com.eventplatform.promotions.domain.Promotion;\\nimport com.eventplatform.promotions.domain.enums.DiscountType;\\nimport com.eventplatform.promotions.domain.enums.EbSyncStatus;\\nimport com.eventplatform.promotions.domain.enums.PromotionScope;\\nimport com.eventplatform.promotions.mapper.EbDiscountSyncPayloadMapper;\\nimport com.eventplatform.promotions.repository.CouponRepository;\\nimport com.eventplatform.shared.eventbrite.dto.request.EbDiscountCreateRequest;\\nimport com.eventplatform.shared.eventbrite.dto.response.EbDiscountResponse;\\nimport com.eventplatform.shared.eventbrite.service.EbDiscountSyncService;\\nimport java.math.BigDecimal;\\nimport java.time.Instant;\\nimport java.util.List;\\nimport java.util.Optional;\\nimport org.junit.jupiter.api.BeforeEach;\\nimport org.junit.jupiter.api.Test;\\nimport org.junit.jupiter.api.extension.ExtendWith;\\nimport org.mockito.ArgumentCaptor;\\nimport org.mockito.InjectMocks;\\nimport org.mockito.Mock;\\nimport org.mockito.junit.jupiter.MockitoExtension;\\n\\n@ExtendWith(MockitoExtension.class)\\nclass DiscountSyncOrchestratorTest {\\n\\n    @Mock\\n    private CouponRepository couponRepository;\\n    @Mock\\n    private EbDiscountSyncService ebDiscountSyncService;\\n    @Mock\\n    private EbDiscountSyncPayloadMapper payloadMapper;\\n\\n    @InjectMocks\\n    private DiscountSyncOrchestrator orchestrator;\\n\\n    private Coupon coupon;\\n\\n    @BeforeEach\\n    void setUp() {\\n        Promotion promotion = new Promotion(\\n            1L, \\\"Promo\\\", DiscountType.PERCENT_OFF, new BigDecimal(\\\"10\\\"), PromotionScope.ORG_WIDE,\\n            null, 10, 2, Instant.now().minusSeconds(3600), Instant.now().plusSeconds(3600)\\n        );\\n        coupon = new Coupon(promotion, 1L, \\\"SAVE10\\\");\\n    }\\n\\n    @Test\\n    void createSync_should_call_EbDiscountSyncService_and_store_eb_discount_id_on_success() {\\n        when(couponRepository.findByIdForUpdate(1L)).thenReturn(Optional.of(coupon));\\n        when(ebDiscountSyncService.listDiscounts(\\\"1\\\")).thenReturn(List.of());\\n        when(payloadMapper.toRequest(any(), any()))\\n            .thenReturn(new EbDiscountCreateRequest(\\\"SAVE10\\\", \\\"percent\\\", 10.0, null, null, null, 10, null));\\n        when(ebDiscountSyncService.createDiscount(any(), any()))\\n            .thenReturn(new EbDiscountResponse(\\\"eb_discount_abc\\\", \\\"SAVE10\\\", \\\"percent\\\", 10.0, null, 0, 10, null));\\n        when(ebDiscountSyncService.getDiscount(\\\"eb_discount_abc\\\"))\\n            .thenReturn(new EbDiscountResponse(\\\"eb_discount_abc\\\", \\\"SAVE10\\\", \\\"percent\\\", 10.0, null, 0, 10, null));\\n\\n        orchestrator.createSync(1L);\\n\\n        assertThat(coupon.getEbDiscountId()).isEqualTo(\\\"eb_discount_abc\\\");\\n        assertThat(coupon.getEbSyncStatus()).isEqualTo(EbSyncStatus.SYNCED);\\n    }\\n\\n    @Test\\n    void createSync_should_set_SYNC_FAILED_when_EB_create_returns_error_and_not_block_internal() {\\n        when(couponRepository.findByIdForUpdate(1L)).thenReturn(Optional.of(coupon));\\n        when(ebDiscountSyncService.listDiscounts(\\\"1\\\")).thenReturn(List.of());\\n        when(payloadMapper.toRequest(any(), any()))\\n            .thenReturn(new EbDiscountCreateRequest(\\\"SAVE10\\\", \\\"percent\\\", 10.0, null, null, null, 10, null));\\n        when(ebDiscountSyncService.createDiscount(any(), any())).thenThrow(new RuntimeException(\\\"boom\\\"));\\n\\n        assertThatCode(() -> orchestrator.createSync(1L)).doesNotThrowAnyException();\\n\\n        assertThat(coupon.getEbSyncStatus()).isEqualTo(EbSyncStatus.SYNC_FAILED);\\n    }\\n\\n    @Test\\n    void modifySync_should_delete_then_recreate_on_EB_when_quantity_sold_is_zero() {\\n        coupon.markSynced(\\\"old_id\\\", 0);\\n        when(couponRepository.findByIdForUpdate(1L)).thenReturn(Optional.of(coupon));\\n        when(ebDiscountSyncService.getDiscount(\\\"old_id\\\"))\\n            .thenReturn(new EbDiscountResponse(\\\"old_id\\\", \\\"SAVE10\\\", \\\"percent\\\", 10.0, null, 0, 10, null));\\n        when(ebDiscountSyncService.listDiscounts(\\\"1\\\")).thenReturn(List.of());\\n        when(payloadMapper.toRequest(any(), any()))\\n            .thenReturn(new EbDiscountCreateRequest(\\\"SAVE10\\\", \\\"percent\\\", 10.0, null, null, null, 10, null));\\n        when(ebDiscountSyncService.createDiscount(any(), any()))\\n            .thenReturn(new EbDiscountResponse(\\\"new_id\\\", \\\"SAVE10\\\", \\\"percent\\\", 10.0, null, 0, 10, null));\\n        when(ebDiscountSyncService.getDiscount(\\\"new_id\\\"))\\n            .thenReturn(new EbDiscountResponse(\\\"new_id\\\", \\\"SAVE10\\\", \\\"percent\\\", 10.0, null, 0, 10, null));\\n\\n        orchestrator.resyncAfterPromotionUpdate(1L);\\n\\n        assertThat(coupon.getEbDiscountId()).isEqualTo(\\\"new_id\\\");\\n        assertThat(coupon.getEbSyncStatus()).isEqualTo(EbSyncStatus.SYNCED);\\n        verify(ebDiscountSyncService).deleteDiscount(\\\"old_id\\\");\\n    }\\n\\n    @Test\\n    void modifySync_should_set_CANNOT_RESYNC_when_quantity_sold_is_greater_than_zero() {\\n        coupon.markSynced(\\\"old_id\\\", 0);\\n        when(couponRepository.findByIdForUpdate(1L)).thenReturn(Optional.of(coupon));\\n        when(ebDiscountSyncService.getDiscount(\\\"old_id\\\"))\\n            .thenReturn(new EbDiscountResponse(\\\"old_id\\\", \\\"SAVE10\\\", \\\"percent\\\", 10.0, null, 3, 10, null));\\n\\n        orchestrator.resyncAfterPromotionUpdate(1L);\\n\\n        assertThat(coupon.getEbSyncStatus()).isEqualTo(EbSyncStatus.CANNOT_RESYNC);\\n        verify(ebDiscountSyncService, never()).deleteDiscount(any());\\n    }\\n\\n    @Test\\n    void deleteSync_should_call_EB_delete_when_quantity_sold_is_zero() {\\n        coupon.markSynced(\\\"eb_123\\\", 0);\\n        when(couponRepository.findByIdForUpdate(1L)).thenReturn(Optional.of(coupon));\\n        when(ebDiscountSyncService.getDiscount(\\\"eb_123\\\"))\\n            .thenReturn(new EbDiscountResponse(\\\"eb_123\\\", \\\"SAVE10\\\", \\\"percent\\\", 10.0, null, 0, 10, null));\\n\\n        orchestrator.guardedDelete(1L);\\n\\n        verify(ebDiscountSyncService).deleteDiscount(\\\"eb_123\\\");\\n        assertThat(coupon.getEbDiscountId()).isNull();\\n        assertThat(coupon.getEbSyncStatus()).isEqualTo(EbSyncStatus.NOT_SYNCED);\\n    }\\n\\n    @Test\\n    void deleteSync_should_set_DELETE_BLOCKED_when_EB_responds_DISCOUNT_CANNOT_BE_DELETED() {\\n java.time.Instant;\\nimport java.util.List;\\nimport java.util.Optional;\\nimport org.junit.jupiter.api.BeforeEach;\\nimport org.junit.jupiter.api.Test;\\nimport org.junit.jupiter.api.extension.ExtendWith;\\nimport org.mockito.ArgumentCaptor;\\nimport org.mockito.InjectMocks;\\nimport org.mockito.Mock;\\nimport org.mockito.junit.jupiter.MockitoExtension;\\n\\n@ExtendWith(MockitoExtension.class)\\nclass DiscountReconciliationServiceTest {\\n\\n    @Mock\\n    private CouponRepository couponRepository;\\n    @Mock\\n    private OrphanEbDiscountRepository orphanRepository;\\n    @Mock\\n    private DiscountReconciliationLogRepository logRepository;\\n    @Mock\\n    private EbDiscountSyncService ebDiscountSyncService;\\n\\n    @InjectMocks\\n    private DiscountReconciliationService service;\\n\\n    private Coupon coupon;\\n\\n    @BeforeEach\\n    void setUp() {\\n        Promotion promotion = new Promotion(\\n            1L, \\\"Promo\\\", DiscountType.PERCENT_OFF, new BigDecimal(\\\"10\\\"), PromotionScope.ORG_WIDE,\\n            null, 10, 2, Instant.now().minusSeconds(3600), Instant.now().plusSeconds(3600)\\n        );\\n        coupon = new Coupon(promotion, 1L, \\\"SAVE10\\\");\\n        coupon.markSynced(\\\"eb_1\\\", 0);\\n    }\\n\\n    @Test\\n    void reconciliation_should_update_internal_redemption_count_when_EB_quantity_sold_is_higher() {\\n        coupon.recordRedemption(100);\\n        coupon.recordRedemption(100);\\n        when(couponRepository.findByOrgIdAndEbSyncStatus(1L, EbSyncStatus.SYNCED)).thenReturn(List.of(coupon));\\n        when(ebDiscountSyncService.listDiscounts(\\\"1\\\"))\\n            .thenReturn(List.of(new EbDiscountResponse(\\\"eb_1\\\", \\\"SAVE10\\\", \\\"percent\\\", 10.0, null, 3, 10, null)));\\n\\n        service.reconcileOrg(1L);\\n\\n        assertThat(coupon.getRedemptionCount()).isEqualTo(3);\\n        assertThat(coupon.getEbQuantitySoldAtLastSync()).isEqualTo(3);\\n        ArgumentCaptor<DiscountReconciliationLog> logCaptor = ArgumentCaptor.forClass(DiscountReconciliationLog.class);\\n        verify(logRepository).save(logCaptor.capture());\\n        assertThat(logCaptor.getValue().getDriftsFound()).isEqualTo(1);\\n    }\\n\\n    @Test\\n    void reconciliation_should_create_OrphanEbDiscount_when_no_internal_match_found() {\\n        when(couponRepository.findByOrgIdAndEbSyncStatus(1L, EbSyncStatus.SYNCED)).thenReturn(List.of(coupon));\\n        when(ebDiscountSyncService.listDiscounts(\\\"1\\\"))\\n            .thenReturn(List.of(new EbDiscountResponse(\\\"orphan_id\\\", \\\"ORPHAN\\\", \\\"percent\\\", 10.0, null, 0, 10, null)));\\n\\n        service.reconcileOrg(1L);\\n\\n        verify(orphanRepository).save(any());\\n        ArgumentCaptor<DiscountReconciliationLog> logCaptor = ArgumentCaptor.forClass(DiscountReconciliationLog.class);\\n        verify(logRepository).save(logCaptor.capture());\\n        assertThat(logCaptor.getValue().getOrphansFound()).isEqualTo(1);\\n    }\\n\\n    @Test\\n    void reconciliation_should_set_EB_DELETED_EXTERNALLY_when_synced_coupon_missing_from_EB_list() {\\n        when(couponRepository.findByOrgIdAndEbSyncStatus(1L, EbSyncStatus.SYNCED)).thenReturn(List.of(coupon));\\n        when(ebDiscountSyncService.listDiscounts(\\\"1\\\")).thenReturn(List.of());\\n\\n        service.reconcileOrg(1L);\\n\\n        assertThat(coupon.getEbSyncStatus()).isEqualTo(EbSyncStatus.EB_DELETED_EXTERNALLY);\\n        ArgumentCaptor<DiscountReconciliationLog> logCaptor = ArgumentCaptor.forClass(DiscountReconciliationLog.class);\\n        verify(logRepository).save(logCaptor.capture());\\n        assertThat(logCaptor.getValue().getExternallyDeletedFound()).isEqualTo(1);\\n    }\\n\\n    @Test\\n    void reconciliation_should_set_DRIFT_DETECTED_when_EB_fields_differ_from_internal() {\\n        when(couponRepository.findByOrgIdAndEbSyncStatus(1L, EbSyncStatus.SYNCED)).thenReturn(List.of(coupon));\\n        when(ebDiscountSyncService.listDiscounts(\\\"1\\\"))\\n            .thenReturn(List.of(new EbDiscountResponse(\\\"eb_1\\\", \\\"SAVE20\\\", \\\"percent\\\", 10.0, null, 0, 10, null)));\\n\\n        service.reconcileOrg(1L);\\n\\n        assertThat(coupon.getEbSyncStatus()).isEqualTo(EbSyncStatus.DRIFT_DETECTED);\\n        assertThat(coupon.getCode()).isEqualTo(\\\"SAVE10\\\");\\n    }\\n\\n    @Test\\n    void reconciliation_should_skip_org_and_log_on_EB_list_call_failure_without_aborting_other_orgs() {\\n        when(couponRepository.findDistinctOrgIdByEbSyncStatus(EbSyncStatus.SYNCED)).thenReturn(List.of(1L, 2L));\\n        when(couponRepository.findByOrgIdAndEbSyncStatus(1L, EbSyncStatus.SYNCED)).thenReturn(List.of(coupon));\\n        when(couponRepository.findByOrgIdAndEbSyncStatus(2L, EbSyncStatus.SYNCED)).thenReturn(List.of(coupon));\\n        when(ebDiscountSyncService.listDiscounts(\\\"1\\\")).thenThrow(new RuntimeException(\\\"eb down\\\"));\\n        when(ebDiscountSyncService.listDiscounts(\\\"2\\\"))\\n            .thenReturn(List.of(new EbDiscountResponse(\\\"eb_1\\\", \\\"SAVE10\\\", \\\"percent\\\", 10.0, null, 0, 10, null)));\\n\\n        service.reconcileAllOrgs();\\n\\n        verify(logRepository, times(2)).save(any());\\n    }\\n}\\nEOF\"}",
    "call_id": "call_Ybf87AKpbrc2yRXtV9wAWd1f"
  }
}

org.assertj.core.api.Assertions.assertThat;\\nimport static org.mockito.ArgumentMatchers.any;\\nimport static org.mockito.Mockito.doThrow;\\nimport static org.mockito.Mockito.times;\\nimport static org.mockito.Mockito.verify;\\nimport static org.mockito.Mockito.when;\\n\\nimport com.eventplatform.promotions.domain.Coupon;\\nimport com.eventplatform.promotions.domain.Promotion;\\nimport com.eventplatform.promotions.domain.enums.CouponStatus;\\nimport com.eventplatform.promotions.domain.enums.DiscountType;\\nimport com.eventplatform.promotions.domain.enums.EbSyncStatus;\\nimport com.eventplatform.promotions.domain.enums.PromotionScope;\\nimport com.eventplatform.promotions.repository.CouponRepository;\\nimport com.eventplatform.promotions.repository.CouponUsageReservationRepository;\\nimport com.eventplatform.promotions.scheduler.CouponExpiryJob;\\nimport java.math.BigDecimal;\\nimport java.time.Instant;\\nimport java.util.List;\\nimport org.junit.jupiter.api.BeforeEach;\\nimport org.junit.jupiter.api.Test;\\nimport org.junit.jupiter.api.extension.ExtendWith;\\nimport org.mockito.InjectMocks;\\nimport org.mockito.Mock;\\nimport org.mockito.junit.jupiter.MockitoExtension;\\n\\n@ExtendWith(MockitoExtension.class)\\nclass CouponExpiryJobTest {\\n\\n    @Mock\\n    private CouponRepository couponRepository;\\n    @Mock\\n    private CouponUsageReservationRepository reservationRepository;\\n    @Mock\\n    private DiscountSyncOrchestrator discountSyncOrchestrator;\\n\\n    @InjectMocks\\n    private CouponExpiryJob job;\\n\\n    private Coupon expiredCoupon1;\\n    private Coupon expiredCoupon2;\\n    private Coupon expiredCoupon3;\\n\\n    @BeforeEach\\n    void setUp() {\\n        expiredCoupon1 = coupon(\\\"SAVE1\\\");\\n        expiredCoupon2 = coupon(\\\"SAVE2\\\");\\n        expiredCoupon3 = coupon(\\\"SAVE3\\\");\\n        expiredCoupon1.markSynced(\\\"eb1\\\", 0);\\n        expiredCoupon2.markSynced(\\\"eb2\\\", 0);\\n        expiredCoupon3.markSynced(\\\"eb3\\\", 0);\\n    }\\n\\n    @Test\\n    void expiryJob_should_deactivate_expired_coupons_and_release_open_reservations() {\\n        when(couponRepository.findExpiredActiveCoupons(any())).thenReturn(List.of(expiredCoupon1));\\n        when(couponRepository.findByStatusAndEbSyncStatus(CouponStatus.ACTIVE, EbSyncStatus.SYNC_FAILED)).thenReturn(List.of());\\n\\n        job.run();\\n\\n        assertThat(expiredCoupon1.getStatus()).isEqualTo(CouponStatus.INACTIVE);\\n        verify(reservationRepository).releaseAllByCouponId(expiredCoupon1.getId());\\n    }\\n\\n    @Test\\n    void expiryJob_should_trigger_guarded_EB_delete_for_expired_coupon_with_zero_quantity_sold() {\\n        when(couponRepository.findExpiredActiveCoupons(any())).thenReturn(List.of(expiredCoupon1));\\n        when(couponRepository.findByStatusAndEbSyncStatus(CouponStatus.ACTIVE, EbSyncStatus.SYNC_FAILED)).thenReturn(List.of());\\n\\n        job.run();\\n\\n        verify(discountSyncOrchestrator).guardedDelete(expiredCoupon1.getId());\\n    }\\n\\n    @Test\\n    void expiryJob_should_continue_processing_remaining_coupons_when_one_fails() {\\n        when(couponRepository.findExpiredActiveCoupons(any())).thenReturn(List.of(expiredCoupon1, expiredCoupon2, expiredCoupon3));\\n        when(couponRepository.findByStatusAndEbSyncStatus(CouponStatus.ACTIVE, EbSyncStatus.SYNC_FAILED)).thenReturn(List.of());\\n        doThrow(new RuntimeException(\\\"fail one\\\")).when(discountSyncOrchestrator).guardedDelete(expiredCoupon2.getId());\\n\\n        job.run();\\n\\n        assertThat(expiredCoupon1.getStatus()).isEqualTo(CouponStatus.INACTIVE);\\n        assertThat(expiredCoupon3.getStatus()).isEqualTo(CouponStatus.INACTIVE);\\n        verify(couponRepository, times(3)).save(any(Coupon.class));\\n    }\\n\\n    private Coupon coupon(String code) {\\n        Promotion promotion = new Promotion(\\n            1L, \\\"Promo\\\", DiscountType.PERCENT_OFF, new BigDecimal(\\\"10\\\"), PromotionScope.ORG_WIDE,\\n            null, 10, 2, Instant.now().minusSeconds(7200), Instant.now().minusSeconds(3600)\\n        );\\n        return new Coupon(promotion, 1L, code);\\n    }\\n}\\nEOF\"}",

  }
}

## Entry 475
**Timestamp:** 2026-03-04T21:53:49.637Z
**Role/Type:** response_item
**Content:**
```json
{
  "timestamp": "2026-03-04T21:53:49.637Z",
  "type": "response_item",
  "payload": {
    "type": "function_call",
    "name": "exec_command",
    "arguments": "{\"cmd\":\"cat > promotions/src/test/java/com/eventplatform/promotions/arch/PromotionsArchTest.java <<'EOF'\\npackage com.eventplatform.promotions.arch;\\n\\nimport static com.tngtech.archunit.lang.syntax.ArchRuleDefinition.classes;\\nimport static com.tngtech.archunit.lang.syntax.ArchRuleDefinition.methods;\\nimport static com.tngtech.archunit.lang.syntax.ArchRuleDefinition.noClasses;\\n\\nimport com.eventplatform.shared.common.event.published.BookingCancelledEvent;\\nimport com.eventplatform.shared.common.event.published.BookingConfirmedEvent;\\nimport com.eventplatform.shared.common.event.published.CartAssembledEvent;\\nimport com.eventplatform.shared.common.event.published.CouponAppliedEvent;\\nimport com.eventplatform.shared.common.event.published.CouponValidatedEvent;\\nimport com.eventplatform.shared.common.event.published.PaymentFailedEvent;\\nimport com.tngtech.archunit.junit.AnalyzeClasses;\\nimport com.tngtech.archunit.junit.ArchTest;\\nimport com.tngtech.archunit.lang.ArchRule;\\nimport org.junit.jupiter.api.Test;\\nimport org.springframework.transaction.event.TransactionalEventListener;\\n\\n@AnalyzeClasses(packages = \\\"com.eventplatform.promotions\\\")\\nclass PromotionsArchTest {\\n\\n    @ArchTest\\n    static final ArchRule promotions_module_should_not_import_any_other_module_service_or_repository =\\n        noClasses().that().resideInAPackage(\\\"..promotions..\\\")\\n            .should().dependOnClassesThat().resideInAnyPackage(\\n                \\\"..bookinginventory.service..\\\",\\n                \\\"..bookinginventory.repository..\\\",\\n                \\\"..paymentsticketing.service..\\\",\\n                \\\"..paymentsticketing.repository..\\\",\\n                \\\"..identity.service..\\\",\\n                \\\"..identity.repository..\\\",\\n                \\\"..scheduling.service..\\\",\\n                \\\"..scheduling.repository..\\\"\\n            );\\n\\n    @ArchTest\\n    static final ArchRule promotions_module_should_only_call_eventbrite_via_EbDiscountSyncService_facade =\\n        noClasses().that().resideInAPackage(\\\"..promotions..\\\")\\n            .should().dependOnClassesThat().resideInAnyPackage(\\n                \\\"..shared.eventbrite.service.Default*\\\",\\n                \\\"..shared.eventbrite.client..\\\"\\n            );\\n\\n    @ArchTest\\n    static final ArchRule promotions_event_listeners_should_only_accept_shared_event_types =\\n        methods().that().areAnnotatedWith(TransactionalEventListener.class)\\n            .and().areDeclaredInClassesThat().resideInAPackage(\\\"..promotions.event.listener..\\\")\\n            .should().haveRawParameterTypes(\\n                BookingConfirmedEvent.class,\\n                BookingCancelledEvent.class,\\n                PaymentFailedEvent.class,\\n                CartAssembledEvent.class\\n            );\\n\\n    @Test\\n    void CouponAppliedEvent_and_CouponValidatedEvent_should_reside_in_shared_module_only() {\\n        org.assertj.core.api.Assertions.assertThat(CouponAppliedEvent.class.getPackageName())\\n            .contains(\\\"shared.common.event.published\\\");\\n        org.assertj.core.api.Assertions.assertThat(CouponValidatedEvent.class.getPackageName())\\n            .contains(\\\"shared.common.event.published\\\");\\n    }\\n}\\nEOF\"}",
    "call_id": "call_2lJP05KdRwexuZmA5BYLklpO"
  }
}
```

## Entry 480
**Timestamp:** 2026-03-04T21:54:02.449Z
**Role/Type:** response_item
**Content:**
```json
{
  "timestamp": "2026-03-04T21:54:02.449Z",
  "type": "response_item",
  "payload": {
    "type": "custom_tool_call",
    "status": "completed",
    "call_id": "call_WRo0wgz1HdX8MhWz45IVHTpb",
    "name": "apply_patch",
    "input": "*** Begin Patch\n*** Update File: promotions/src/test/java/com/eventplatform/promotions/arch/PromotionsArchTest.java\n@@\n-import static com.tngtech.archunit.lang.syntax.ArchRuleDefinition.methods;\n@@\n import com.eventplatform.shared.common.event.published.BookingCancelledEvent;\n import com.eventplatform.shared.common.event.published.BookingConfirmedEvent;\n import com.eventplatform.shared.common.event.published.CartAssembledEvent;\n import com.eventplatform.shared.common.event.published.CouponAppliedEvent;\n import com.eventplatform.shared.common.event.published.CouponValidatedEvent;\n import com.eventplatform.shared.common.event.published.PaymentFailedEvent;\n@@\n import com.tngtech.archunit.junit.ArchTest;\n import com.tngtech.archunit.lang.ArchRule;\n+import java.lang.reflect.Method;\n+import java.util.List;\n import org.junit.jupiter.api.Test;\n import org.springframework.transaction.event.TransactionalEventListener;\n@@\n-    @ArchTest\n-    static final ArchRule promotions_event_listeners_should_only_accept_shared_event_types =\n-        methods().that().areAnnotatedWith(TransactionalEventListener.class)\n-            .and().areDeclaredInClassesThat().resideInAPackage(\"..promotions.event.listener..\")\n-            .should().haveRawParameterTypes(\n-                BookingConfirmedEvent.class,\n-                BookingCancelledEvent.class,\n-                PaymentFailedEvent.class,\n-                CartAssembledEvent.class\n-            );\n-\n     @Test\n     void CouponAppliedEvent_and_CouponValidatedEvent_should_reside_in_shared_module_only() {\n         org.assertj.core.api.Assertions.assertThat(CouponAppliedEvent.class.getPackageName())\n             .contains(\"shared.common.event.published\");\n         org.assertj.core.api.Assertions.assertThat(CouponValidatedEvent.class.getPackageName())\n             .contains(\"shared.common.event.published\");\n     }\n+\n+    @Test\n+    void promotions_event_listeners_should_only_accept_shared_event_types() {\n+        List<Class<?>> allowed = List.of(\n+            BookingConfirmedEvent.class,\n+            BookingCancelledEvent.class,\n+            PaymentFailedEvent.class,\n+            CartAssembledEvent.class\n+        );\n+        List<Class<?>> listeners = List.of(\n+            com.eventplatform.promotions.event.listener.BookingConfirmedListener.class,\n+            com.eventplatform.promotions.event.listener.BookingCancelledListener.class,\n+            com.eventplatform.promotions.event.listener.PaymentFailedListener.class,\n+            com.eventplatform.promotions.event.listener.CartAssembledListener.class\n+        );\n+\n+        for (Class<?> listener : listeners) {\n+            for (Method method : listener.getDeclaredMethods()) {\n+                if (method.getAnnotation(TransactionalEventListener.class) == null) {\n+                    continue;\n+                }\n+                org.assertj.core.api.Assertions.assertThat(method.getParameterTypes())\n+                    .hasSize(1);\n+                org.assertj.core.api.Assertions.assertThat(allowed)\n+                    .contains(method.getParameterTypes()[0]);\n+            }\n+        }\n+    }\n }\n*** End Patch\n"
  }
}
```

## Entry 539
**Timestamp:** 2026-03-04T21:58:34.107Z
**Role/Type:** response_item
**Content:**
```json
{
  "timestamp": "2026-03-04T21:58:34.107Z",
  "type": "response_item",
  "payload": {
    "type": "function_call",
    "name": "exec_command",
    "arguments": "{\"cmd\":\"cat > test_result_folder/fr7_coupon_engine_20260305_032816.md <<'EOF'\\n# Test Result — FR7 Coupon Engine\\n\\n- Timestamp: 2026-03-05 03:28:16\\n- Spec: POQ/Coupon/SPEC_7.md (Stage 8)\\n- Module(s): promotions, shared (dependency), booking-inventory (event listener dependency)\\n- Commit/Working State: local working tree (post `fb28ec4`)\\n\\n## Coverage of Stage 8 Cases\\n- Total planned: 53\\n- Implemented: 53\\n- Passed: 53\\n- Failed: 0\\n- Skipped: 0\\n\\n## Failures Found\\n1. `CouponEligibilityServiceTest` error (`UnnecessaryStubbingException`)\\n   - Error: Mockito strict stubbing failure on negative-path tests\\n   - Root cause: shared Arrange stubs were unused in exception-short-circuit test branches\\n   - Fix applied: set `@MockitoSettings(strictness = Strictness.LENIENT)` for `CouponEligibilityServiceTest`\\n\\n2. `DiscountReconciliationServiceTest` error (`UnnecessaryStubbingException`)\\n   - Error: unused stubbing in multi-org failure scenario\\n   - Root cause: one org path intentionally aborted before using all stubs\\n   - Fix applied: set `@MockitoSettings(strictness = Strictness.LENIENT)` for `DiscountReconciliationServiceTest`\\n\\n3. `PromotionsControllerTest` bootstrap error (`IllegalStateException`)\\n   - Error: no `@SpringBootConfiguration` found for `@WebMvcTest`\\n   - Root cause: promotions module lacked a test boot application anchor\\n   - Fix applied: added `PromotionsTestApplication` and `@ContextConfiguration(classes = PromotionsTestApplication.class)`\\n\\n## Code/Test Changes Applied\\n- `promotions/src/test/java/com/eventplatform/promotions/domain/PromotionTest.java` — D1–D3\\n- `promotions/src/test/java/com/eventplatform/promotions/domain/CouponTest.java` — D4–D6\\n- `promotions/src/test/java/com/eventplatform/promotions/domain/DiscountCalculationResultTest.java` — D7–D8\\n- `promotions/src/test/java/com/eventplatform/promotions/service/CouponEligibilityServiceTest.java` — S1–S9\\n- `promotions/src/test/java/com/eventplatform/promotions/service/CouponRedemptionServiceTest.java` — S10–S15\\n- `promotions/src/test/java/com/eventplatform/promotions/service/DiscountSyncOrchestratorTest.java` — S16–S23\\n- `promotions/src/test/java/com/eventplatform/promotions/service/DiscountReconciliationServiceTest.java` — S24–S28\\n- `promotions/src/test/java/com/eventplatform/promotions/service/CouponExpiryJobTest.java` — S29–S31\\n- `promotions/src/test/java/com/eventplatform/promotions/api/PromotionsControllerTest.java` — A1–A10\\n- `promotions/src/test/java/com/eventplatform/promotions/arch/PromotionsArchTest.java` — AR1–AR4\\n- `promotions/src/test/java/com/eventplatform/promotions/PromotionsTestApplication.java` — test context bootstrap\\n\\nProduction fixes required to satisfy Stage 8 behavior:\\n- `promotions/src/main/java/com/eventplatform/promotions/domain/Promotion.java`\\n  - added coupon cascade on `deactivate()`\\n  - added `isValid(Instant)`\\n  - added `addCoupon(Coupon)`\\n- `promotions/src/main/java/com/eventplatform/promotions/domain/Coupon.java`\\n  - added `canEbDelete()`\\n  - normalized `markNotSynced()` quantity reset\\n- `promotions/src/main/java/com/eventplatform/promotions/repository/CouponRepository.java`\\n  - added `findTopByCodeIgnoreCase(String)`\\n- `promotions/src/main/java/com/eventplatform/promotions/service/CouponAdminService.java`\\n  - create coupon now initializes `SYNC_PENDING` before async EB sync\\n- `promotions/src/main/java/com/eventplatform/promotions/service/CouponEligibilityService.java`\\n  - org-mismatch path based on coupon lookup before org check\\n  - idempotent reservation branch no longer republishes events\\n- `promotions/src/main/java/com/eventplatform/promotions/service/CouponRedemptionService.java`\\n  - `onBookingConfirmed` now no-op when cart snapshot has no coupon code\\n- `promotions/src/main/java/com/eventplatform/promotions/service/DiscountReconciliationService.java`\\n  - quantity drift now increments `driftsFound`\\n\\n## Final Status\\n- PASS\\n- Notes:\\n  - Command executed: `mvn -pl promotions -am test`\\n  - Promotions Stage 8 suite completed green with all 53 required cases.\\nEOF\"}",
    "call_id": "call_vnJR9zMGcf4xprWcQrGCNuVq"
  }
}
```

{
  "timestamp": "2026-03-04T22:00:20.378Z",
  "type": "turn_context",
  "payload": {
    "turn_id": "019cbadd-be99-74a1-bede-c1f12571aa0c",
    "cwd": "/home/dell/Multi-City-Event-Booking",
    "current_date": "2026-03-05",
    "timezone": "Asia/Kolkata",
    "approval_policy": "on-request",
    "sandbox_policy": {
      "type": "workspace-write",
      "network_access": false,
      "exclude_tmpdir_env_var": false,
      "exclude_slash_tmp": false
    },
    "model": "gpt-5.3-codex",
    "personality": "pragmatic",
    "collaboration_mode": {
      "mode": "default",
      "settings": {
        "model": "gpt-5.3-codex",
        "reasoning_effort": "medium",
        "developer_instructions": "# Collaboration Mode: Default\n\nYou are now in Default mode. Any previous instructions for other modes (e.g. Plan mode) are no longer active.\n\nYour active mode changes only when new developer instructions with a different `<collaboration_mode>...</collaboration_mode>` change it; user requests or tool descriptions do not change mode by themselves. Known mode names are Default and Plan.\n\n## request_user_input availability\n\nThe `request_user_input` tool is unavailable in Default mode. If you call it while in Default mode, it will return an error.\n\nIn Default mode, strongly prefer making reasonable assumptions and executing the user's request rather than stopping to ask questions. If you absolutely must ask a question because the answer cannot be discovered from local context and a reasonable assumption would be risky, ask the user directly with a concise plain-text question. Never write a multiple choice question as a textual assistant message.\n"
      }
    },
    "effort": "medium",
    "summary": "none",
    "user_instructions": "# AGENTS.md — Reference Index\n\n> Every agent working in this codebase must read the files listed below before producing\n> any output. Each file governs a specific concern. Read the ones that apply to your task.\n\n---\n\n## Reference Files\n\n| File | Governs |\n|---|---|\n| `PRODUCT.md` | The 7 modules, what each one owns, dependency order, inter-module event map, Eventbrite ACL facade names, hard architectural rules, and where new code goes. Read this before touching any module. |\n| `docs/EVENTBRITE_INTEGRATION.md` | Eventbrite integration architecture: ACL facades, all FR flows (planned vs. implemented), critical constraints (no user/order creation, no single-order cancel, no seat locking), workarounds. Read before designing any Eventbrite feature. |\n| `docs/MODULE_STRUCTURE_TEMPLATE.md` | Canonical folder and package layout for every module. The exact location of every layer: `api/controller/`, `api/dto/`, `domain/`, `service/`, `repository/`, `mapper/`, `event/published/`, `event/listener/`, `statemachine/`, `exception/`. Anti-patterns list. Read this before writing any class. |\n| `agents/SPEC_GENERATOR.md` | How to produce a `SPEC.md` for any feature. Eight confirmation-gated stages with module context and Eventbrite constraints built-in. Requirements → Domain Model → Architecture & File Structure → DB Schema → API → Business Logic → Error Handling → Tests. Read this before speccing any feature. |\n| `agents/CODING_AGENT.md` | Spring Boot 3.5.11 / Java 21 coding standards. Domain behaviour, service orchestration, mapper rules, controller rules, event rules, 10 Eventbrite ACL facades, inter-module communication (REST + Spring Events), admin/ special rules, state machine, Spring AI. Read this before writing any production code. |\n| `agents/TEST_AGENT.md` | Test agent responsibilities and best practices. Builds tests from `SPEC_*.md` Stage 8, executes tests, fixes test/code issues caused by behavior mismatches, and writes timestamped logs under `test_result_folder/`. Read this before writing or running tests. |\n| `docs/TESTING_GUIDE.md` | Four-layer test structure: `domain/` (unit), `service/` (Mockito), `api/` (@WebMvcTest), `arch/` (ArchUnit enforcing 10 hard rules + Eventbrite constraints). All rule examples, happy path, negative path, exception patterns. Read before writing any test. |\n| `mock-eventbrite-api/README.md` | **Mock Eventbrite Service:** Python FastAPI in-memory mock of Eventbrite API v3. Used for local development and testing. Exposes all 10 ACL facade endpoints without hitting production Eventbrite. See setup instructions below. |\n\n---\n\n## Module Quick Reference\n\nFull detail for each module is in `PRODUCT.md`. This table is a lookup only.\n\n| Module | Owns | External ACL Facades Used |\n|---|---|---|\n| `discovery-catalog` | Events, Venues, Cities, catalog sync | `EbEventSyncService`, `EbTicketService` |\n| `scheduling` | Show slots, conflict validation | `EbEventSyncService` |\n| `identity` | Users, JWT, profiles, preferences, wallet | — |\n| `booking-inventory` | Seats, SeatMap, Cart, Pricing, Seat Lock State Machine | `EbTicketService` |\n| `payments-ticketing` | Bookings, Payments, E-Tickets, Cancellations, Refunds, Wallet | `StripePaymentService`, `StripeRefundService`, `StripeWebhookHandler` |\n| `promotions` | Coupons, Promotions, Eligibility rules | `EbDiscountSyncService` |\n| `engagement` | Reviews, Moderation, AI Chatbot (`service/chatbot/`), RAG pipeline | `EbEventSyncService`, `EbAttendeeService` |\n| `admin/` | No domain ownership. Orchestration and aggregation only. | — |\n| `shared/` | All external ACL facades, JWT, base classes, common DTOs, configs | — |\n\n---\n\n## Hard Rules — Never Violate\n\nCanonical numbering and wording are owned by `PRODUCT.md` Section 9. These shorthand rules apply to every task without exception.\n\n1. No module imports another module's `@Service`, `@Entity`, or `@Repository`.\n  - Exception: `admin/` MAY import module `@Service` beans for READ operations only; all writes MUST go through the owning module REST API.\n2. No module calls Eventbrite, Stripe, or OpenAI HTTP directly — only through `shared/` ACL facades.\n3. ACL facade names are exactly as listed below — never invent new ones.\n4. Spring Events carry only primitives, IDs, enums, and value objects — never `@Entity` objects.\n5. One `GlobalExceptionHandler` in `shared/common/exception/` — never `@ControllerAdvice` in a module.\n6. All field mapping goes in `mapper/` using MapStruct — never inside a service or controller.\n7. `admin/` owns no `@Entity` and no database table.\n8. `shared/` has no dependency on any module.\n9. `app/` has zero business logic.\n10. Dependency direction is strictly downward — no circular imports between modules.\n\n---\n\n## Eventbrite ACL Facade Names (HARD RULE #3)\nRead the docs/eventbriteapiv3public.apib for detail API Endpoint with schema, Response, Request and errors\n\nAll 10 facades are in `shared/eventbrite/service/`. These are the ONLY things modules call for Eventbrite:\n\n1. **EbEventSyncService** — Create, update, publish, cancel events; pull org event catalog\n2. **EbVenueService** — Create and update venues; list org venues\n3. **EbScheduleService** — Create recurring event schedules and occurrences\n4. **EbTicketService** — Create/update ticket classes; manage inventory; check availability\n5. **EbCapacityService** — Retrieve and update event capacity tiers\n6. **EbOrderService** — Read orders post-checkout (admin/ reporting only — NOT used in FR5/FR6 payment flows; JS SDK widget only creates orders)\n7. **EbAttendeeService** — List attendees; verify attendance for reviews (engagement only — FR8 attendance verification)\n8. **EbDiscountSyncService** — Create, update, delete discount codes\n9. **EbRefundService** — INACTIVE for payments — all refunds go through `StripeRefundService`; original EB refund read-only API has no submission endpoint\n10. **EbWebhookService** — Mock/testing only; not used in production registration flow\n\n**See `docs/EVENTBRITE_INTEGRATION.md` for which module uses which facade and what gaps exist.**\n\n---\n\n## Stripe ACL Facades (payments-ticketing only)\n\nAll 3 facades are in `shared/stripe/service/`. Only `payments-ticketing` calls these:\n\n1. **StripePaymentService** — Create PaymentIntents; confirm and capture payments\n2. **StripeRefundService** — Submit refunds; query refund status\n3. **StripeWebhookHandler** — Verify webhook signatures; parse `payment_intent.succeeded` / `payment_intent.payment_failed` / `charge.refunded` events\n\n**Hard Rule:** Never call `com.stripe.*` SDK classes directly from a module service — always delegate to the facade in `shared/stripe/service/`.\n\n---\n\n## Module Dependency Order (HARD RULE #10)\n\n```\nshared/               <- foundational; no dependencies\n  |\n  v\ndiscovery-catalog    <- depends on shared only\n  |\n  v\nscheduling           <- depends on shared + discovery-catalog (REST reads)\nidentity             <- depends on shared only\n  |\n  v\nbooking-inventory    <- depends on shared + discovery-catalog (REST reads)\n  |\n  v\npayments-ticketing   <- depends on shared + booking-inventory + identity (REST)\n  |\n  v\npromotions           <- depends on shared + booking-inventory + identity (REST)\n  |\n  v\nengagement           <- depends on shared + payments-ticketing + identity (REST)\n  |\n  v\nadmin/               <- thin orchestration; reads from all, writes via REST APIs\n  |\n  v\napp/                 <- entry point only; zero business logic\n```\n\n**Golden Rule:** Module at level N can depend on level N-1 or lower (or `shared/`) only. Never import from sibling or downstream modules.\n\n**See `PRODUCT.md` Section 2 for detailed rationale.**\n\n\n## Skills\nA skill is a set of local instructions to follow that is stored in a `SKILL.md` file. Below is the list of skills that can be used. Each entry includes a name, description, and file path so you can open the source for full instructions when using a specific skill.\n### Available skills\n- find-skills: Helps users discover and install agent skills when they ask questions like \"how do I do X\", \"find a skill for X\", \"is there a skill that can...\", or express interest in extending capabilities. This skill should be used when the user is looking for functionality that might exist as an installable skill. (file: /home/dell/.agents/skills/find-skills/SKILL.md)\n- skill-creator: Guide for creating effective skills. This skill should be used when users want to create a new skill (or update an existing skill) that extends Codex's capabilities with specialized knowledge, workflows, or tool integrations. (file: /home/dell/.codex/skills/.system/skill-creator/SKILL.md)\n- skill-installer: Install Codex skills into $CODEX_HOME/skills from a curated list or a GitHub repo path. Use when a user asks to list installable skills, install a curated skill, or install a skill from another repo (including private repos). (file: /home/dell/.codex/skills/.system/skill-installer/SKILL.md)\n### How to use skills\n- Discovery: The list above is the skills available in this session (name + description + file path). Skill bodies live on disk at the listed paths.\n- Trigger rules: If the user names a skill (with `$SkillName` or plain text) OR the task clearly matches a skill's description shown above, you must use that skill for that turn. Multiple mentions mean use them all. Do not carry skills across turns unless re-mentioned.\n- Missing/blocked: If a named skill isn't in the list or the path can't be read, say so briefly and continue with the best fallback.\n- How to use a skill (progressive disclosure):\n  1) After deciding to use a skill, open its `SKILL.md`. Read only enough to follow the workflow.\n  2) When `SKILL.md` references relative paths (e.g., `scripts/foo.py`), resolve them relative to the skill directory listed above first, and only consider other paths if needed.\n  3) If `SKILL.md` points to extra folders such as `references/`, load only the specific files needed for the request; don't bulk-load everything.\n  4) If `scripts/` exist, prefer running or patching them instead of retyping large code blocks.\n  5) If `assets/` or templates exist, reuse them instead of recreating from scratch.\n- Coordination and sequencing:\n  - If multiple skills apply, choose the minimal set that covers the request and state the order you'll use them.\n  - Announce which skill(s) you're using and why (one short line). If you skip an obvious skill, say why.\n- Context hygiene:\n  - Keep context small: summarize long sections instead of pasting them; only load extra files when needed.\n  - Avoid deep reference-chasing: prefer opening only files directly linked from `SKILL.md` unless you're blocked.\n  - When variants exist (frameworks, providers, domains), pick only the relevant reference file(s) and note that choice.\n- Safety and fallback: If a skill can't be applied cleanly (missing files, unclear instructions), state the issue, pick the next-best approach, and continue.",
    "truncation_policy": {
      "mode": "tokens",
      "limit": 10000
    }
  }
}
```

Read only enough to follow the workflow.\n  2) When `SKILL.md` references relative paths (e.g., `scripts/foo.py`), resolve them relative to the skill directory listed above first, and only consider other paths if needed.\n  3) If `SKILL.md` points to extra folders such as `references/`, load only the specific files needed for the request; don't bulk-load everything.\n  4) If `scripts/` exist, prefer running or patching them instead of retyping large code blocks.\n  5) If `assets/` or templates exist, reuse them instead of recreating from scratch.\n- Coordination and sequencing:\n  - If multiple skills apply, choose the minimal set that covers the request and state the order you'll use them.\n  - Announce which skill(s) you're using and why (one short line). If you skip an obvious skill, say why.\n- Context hygiene:\n  - Keep context small: summarize long sections instead of pasting them; only load extra files when needed.\n  - Avoid deep reference-chasing: prefer opening only files directly linked from `SKILL.md` unless you're blocked.\n  - When variants exist (frameworks, providers, domains), pick only the relevant reference file(s) and note that choice.\n- Safety and fallback: If a skill can't be applied cleanly (missing files, unclear instructions), state the issue, pick the next-best approach, and continue.",
    "truncation_policy": {
      "mode": "tokens",
      "limit": 10000
    }
  }
}
```

**Timestamp:** 2026-03-04T22:01:47.291Z
**Role/Type:** turn_context
**Content:**
```json
{
  "timestamp": "2026-03-04T22:01:47.291Z",
  "type": "turn_context",
  "payload": {
    "turn_id": "019cbadf-1217-7f41-a686-0966389ff7a2",
    "cwd": "/home/dell/Multi-City-Event-Booking",
    "current_date": "2026-03-05",
    "timezone": "Asia/Kolkata",
    "approval_policy": "on-request",
    "sandbox_policy": {
      "type": "workspace-write",
      "network_access": false,
      "exclude_tmpdir_env_var": false,
      "exclude_slash_tmp": false
    },
    "model": "gpt-5.3-codex",
    "personality": "pragmatic",
    "collaboration_mode": {
      "mode": "default",
      "settings": {
        "model": "gpt-5.3-codex",
        "reasoning_effort": "medium",
        "developer_instructions": "# Collaboration Mode: Default\n\nYou are now in Default mode. Any previous instructions for other modes (e.g. Plan mode) are no longer active.\n\nYour active mode changes only when new developer instructions with a different `<collaboration_mode>...</collaboration_mode>` change it; user requests or tool descriptions do not change mode by themselves. Known mode names are Default and Plan.\n\n## request_user_input availability\n\nThe `request_user_input` tool is unavailable in Default mode. If you call it while in Default mode, it will return an error.\n\nIn Default mode, strongly prefer making reasonable assumptions and executing the user's request rather than stopping to ask questions. If you absolutely must ask a question because the answer cannot be discovered from local context and a reasonable assumption would be risky, ask the user directly with a concise plain-text question. Never write a multiple choice question as a textual assistant message.\n"
      }
    },
    "effort": "medium",
    "summary": "none",
    "user_instructions": "# AGENTS.md — Reference Index\n\n> Every agent working in this codebase must read the files listed below before producing\n> any output. Each file governs a specific concern. Read the ones that apply to your task.\n\n---\n\n## Reference Files\n\n| File | Governs |\n|---|---|\n| `PRODUCT.md` | The 7 modules, what each one owns, dependency order, inter-module event map, Eventbrite ACL facade names, hard architectural rules, and where new code goes. Read this before touching any module. |\n| `docs/EVENTBRITE_INTEGRATION.md` | Eventbrite integration architecture: ACL facades, all FR flows (planned vs. implemented), critical constraints (no user/order creation, no single-order cancel, no seat locking), workarounds. Read before designing any Eventbrite feature. |\n| `docs/MODULE_STRUCTURE_TEMPLATE.md` | Canonical folder and package layout for every module. The exact location of every layer: `api/controller/`, `api/dto/`, `domain/`, `service/`, `repository/`, `mapper/`, `event/published/`, `event/listener/`, `statemachine/`, `exception/`. Anti-patterns list. Read this before writing any class. |\n| `agents/SPEC_GENERATOR.md` | How to produce a `SPEC.md` for any feature. Eight confirmation-gated stages with module context and Eventbrite constraints built-in. Requirements → Domain Model → Architecture & File Structure → DB Schema → API → Business Logic → Error Handling → Tests. Read this before speccing any feature. |\n| `agents/CODING_AGENT.md` | Spring Boot 3.5.11 / Java 21 coding standards. Domain behaviour, service orchestration, mapper rules, controller rules, event rules, 10 Eventbrite ACL facades, inter-module communication (REST + Spring Events), admin/ special rules, state machine, Spring AI. Read this before writing any production code. |\n| `agents/TEST_AGENT.md` | Test agent responsibilities and best practices. Builds tests from `SPEC_*.md` Stage 8, executes tests, fixes test/code issues caused by behavior mismatches, and writes timestamped logs under `test_result_folder/`. Read this before writing or running tests. |\n| `docs/TESTING_GUIDE.md` | Four-layer test structure: `domain/` (unit), `service/` (Mockito), `api/` (@WebMvcTest), `arch/` (ArchUnit enforcing 10 hard rules + Eventbrite constraints). All rule examples, happy path, negative path, exception patterns. Read before writing any test. |\n| `mock-eventbrite-api/README.md` | **Mock Eventbrite Service:** Python FastAPI in-memory mock of Eventbrite API v3. Used for local development and testing. Exposes all 10 ACL facade endpoints without hitting production Eventbrite. See setup instructions below. |\n\n---\n\n## Module Quick Reference\n\nFull detail for each module is in `PRODUCT.md`. This table is a lookup only.\n\n| Module | Owns | External ACL Facades Used |\n|---|---|---|\n| `discovery-catalog` | Events, Venues, Cities, catalog sync | `EbEventSyncService`, `EbTicketService` |\n| `scheduling` | Show slots, conflict validation | `EbEventSyncService` |\n| `identity` | Users, JWT, profiles, preferences, wallet | — |\n| `booking-inventory` | Seats, SeatMap, Cart, Pricing, Seat Lock State Machine | `EbTicketService` |\n| `payments-ticketing` | Bookings, Payments, E-Tickets, Cancellations, Refunds, Wallet | `StripePaymentService`, `StripeRefundService`, `StripeWebhookHandler` |\n| `promotions` | Coupons, Promotions, Eligibility rules | `EbDiscountSyncService` |\n| `engagement` | Reviews, Moderation, AI Chatbot (`service/chatbot/`), RAG pipeline | `EbEventSyncService`, `EbAttendeeService` |\n| `admin/` | No domain ownership. Orchestration and aggregation only. | — |\n| `shared/` | All external ACL facades, JWT, base classes, common DTOs, configs | — |\n\n---\n\n## Hard Rules — Never Violate\n\nCanonical numbering and wording are owned by `PRODUCT.md` Section 9. These shorthand rules apply to every task without exception.\n\n1. No module imports another module's `@Service`, `@Entity`, or `@Repository`.\n  - Exception: `admin/` MAY import module `@Service` beans for READ operations only; all writes MUST go through the owning module REST API.\n2. No module calls Eventbrite, Stripe, or OpenAI HTTP directly — only through `shared/` ACL facades.\n3. ACL facade names are exactly as listed below — never invent new ones.\n4. Spring Events carry only primitives, IDs, enums, and value objects — never `@Entity` objects.\n5. One `GlobalExceptionHandler` in `shared/common/exception/` — never `@ControllerAdvice` in a module.\n6. All field mapping goes in `mapper/` using MapStruct — never inside a service or controller.\n7. `admin/` owns no `@Entity` and no database table.\n8. `shared/` has no dependency on any module.\n9. `app/` has zero business logic.\n10. Dependency direction is strictly downward — no circular imports between modules.\n\n---\n\n## Eventbrite ACL Facade Names (HARD RULE #3)\nRead the docs/eventbriteapiv3public.apib for detail API Endpoint with schema, Response, Request and errors\n\nAll 10 facades are in `shared/eventbrite/service/`. These are the ONLY things modules call for Eventbrite:\n\n1. **EbEventSyncService** — Create, update, publish, cancel events; pull org event catalog\n2. **EbVenueService** — Create and update venues; list org venues\n3. **EbScheduleService** — Create recurring event schedules and occurrences\n4. **EbTicketService** — Create/update ticket classes; manage inventory; check availability\n5. **EbCapacityService** — Retrieve and update event capacity tiers\n6. **EbOrderService** — Read orders post-checkout (admin/ reporting only — NOT used in FR5/FR6 payment flows; JS SDK widget only creates orders)\n7. **EbAttendeeService** — List attendees; verify attendance for reviews (engagement only — FR8 attendance verification)\n8. **EbDiscountSyncService** — Create, update, delete discount codes\n9. **EbRefundService** — INACTIVE for payments — all refunds go through `StripeRefundService`; original EB refund read-only API has no submission endpoint\n10. **EbWebhookService** — Mock/testing only; not used in production registration flow\n\n**See `docs/EVENTBRITE_INTEGRATION.md` for which module uses which facade and what gaps exist.**\n\n---\n\n## Stripe ACL Facades (payments-ticketing only)\n\nAll 3 facades are in `shared/stripe/service/`. Only `payments-ticketing` calls these:\n\n1. **StripePaymentService** — Create PaymentIntents; confirm and capture payments\n2. **StripeRefundService** — Submit refunds; query refund status\n3. **StripeWebhookHandler** — Verify webhook signatures; parse `payment_intent.succeeded` / `payment_intent.payment_failed` / `charge.refunded` events\n\n**Hard Rule:** Never call `com.stripe.*` SDK classes directly from a module service — always delegate to the facade in `shared/stripe/service/`.\n\n---\n\n## Module Dependency Order (HARD RULE #10)\n\n```\nshared/               <- foundational; no dependencies\n  |\n  v\ndiscovery-catalog    <- depends on shared only\n  |\n  v\nscheduling           <- depends on shared + discovery-catalog (REST reads)\nidentity             <- depends on shared only\n  |\n  v\nbooking-inventory    <- depends on shared + discovery-catalog (REST reads)\n  |\n  v\npayments-ticketing   <- depends on shared + booking-inventory + identity (REST)\n  |\n  v\npromotions           <- depends on shared + booking-inventory + identity (REST)\n  |\n  v\nengagement           <- depends on shared + payments-ticketing + identity (REST)\n  |\n  v\nadmin/               <- thin orchestration; reads from all, writes via REST APIs\n  |\n  v\napp/                 <- entry point only; zero business logic\n```\n\n**Golden Rule:** Module at level N can depend on level N-1 or lower (or `shared/`) only. Never import from sibling or downstream modules.\n\n**See `PRODUCT.md` Section 2 for detailed rationale.**\n\n\n## Skills\nA skill is a set of local instructions to follow that is stored in a `SKILL.md` file. Below is the list of skills that can be used. Each entry includes a name, description, and file path so you can open the source for full instructions when using a specific skill.\n### Available skills\n- find-skills: Helps users discover and install agent skills when they ask questions like \"how do I do X\", \"find a skill for X\", \"is there a skill that can...\", or express interest in extending capabilities. This skill should be used when the user is looking for functionality that might exist as an installable skill. (file: /home/dell/.agents/skills/find-skills/SKILL.md)\n- skill-creator: Guide for creating effective skills. This skill should be used when users want to create a new skill (or update an existing skill) that extends Codex's capabilities with specialized knowledge, workflows, or tool integrations. (file: /home/dell/.codex/skills/.system/skill-creator/SKILL.md)\n- skill-installer: Install Codex skills into $CODEX_HOME/skills from a curated list or a GitHub repo path. Use when a user asks to list installable skills, install a curated skill, or install a skill from another repo (including private repos). (file: /home/dell/.codex/skills/.system/skill-installer/SKILL.md)\n### How to use skills\n- Discovery: The list above is the skills available in this session (name + description + file path). Skill bodies live on disk at the listed paths.\n- Trigger rules: If the user names a skill (with `$SkillName` or plain text) OR the task clearly matches a skill's description shown above, you must use that skill for that turn. Multiple mentions mean use them all. Do not carry skills across turns unless re-mentioned.\n- Missing/blocked: If a named skill isn't in the list or the path can't be read, say so briefly and continue with the best fallback.\n- How to use a skill (progressive disclosure):\n  1) After deciding to use a skill, open its `SKILL.md`. If you skip an obvious skill, say why.\n- Context hygiene:\n  - Keep context small: summarize long sections instead of pasting them; only load extra files when needed.\n  - Avoid deep reference-chasing: prefer opening only files directly linked from `SKILL.md` unless you're blocked.\n  - When variants exist (frameworks, providers, domains), pick only the relevant reference file(s) and note that choice.\n- Safety and fallback: If a skill can't be applied cleanly (missing files, unclear instructions), state the issue, pick the next-best approach, and continue.",

## Entry 585
**Timestamp:** 2026-03-04T22:01:55.459Z
**Role/Type:** event_msg
**Content:**
```json
{
  "timestamp": "2026-03-04T22:01:55.459Z",
  "type": "event_msg",
  "payload": {
    "type": "agent_message",
    "message": "## PR Summary\n\nImplements FR7 promotions testing and stability alignment for `promotions` module.\n\n### What changed\n- Added complete Stage 8 FR7 test suite (53 tests) across:\n  - `domain` (D1–D8)\n  - `service` (S1–S31)\n  - `api` (A1–A10 via `@WebMvcTest`)\n  - `arch` (AR1–AR4)\n- Added promotions test bootstrap app:\n  - `promotions/src/test/java/com/eventplatform/promotions/PromotionsTestApplication.java`\n- Added test execution report:\n  - `test_result_folder/fr7_coupon_engine_20260305_032816.md`\n\n### Production fixes made during test run\n- `Promotion`: added `isValid`, coupon cascade on `deactivate`, `addCoupon`.\n- `Coupon`: added `canEbDelete`, normalized sync reset behavior.\n- `CouponRepository`: added code-only lookup for eligibility path.\n- `CouponAdminService`: initialize new coupon as `SYNC_PENDING` before async EB sync.\n- `CouponEligibilityService`: corrected org-mismatch behavior and idempotent no-republish.\n- `CouponRedemptionService`: no-op when cart snapshot has no coupon.\n- `DiscountReconciliationService`: count quantity drift in reconciliation metrics.\n\n### Validation\n- `mvn -pl promotions -am test` passed.\n- Result: **53 passed, 0 failed, 0 skipped**.",
    "phase": "final_answer"
  }
}
```
**Metadata:**
```json
{
  "payload": {
    "type": "agent_message",
    "message": "## PR Summary\n\nImplements FR7 promotions testing and stability alignment for `promotions` module.\n\n### What changed\n- Added complete Stage 8 FR7 test suite (53 tests) across:\n  - `domain` (D1–D8)\n  - `service` (S1–S31)\n  - `api` (A1–A10 via `@WebMvcTest`)\n  - `arch` (AR1–AR4)\n- Added promotions test bootstrap app:\n  - `promotions/src/test/java/com/eventplatform/promotions/PromotionsTestApplication.java`\n- Added test execution report:\n  - `test_result_folder/fr7_coupon_engine_20260305_032816.md`\n\n### Production fixes made during test run\n- `Promotion`: added `isValid`, coupon cascade on `deactivate`, `addCoupon`.\n- `Coupon`: added `canEbDelete`, normalized sync reset behavior.\n- `CouponRepository`: added code-only lookup for eligibility path.\n- `CouponAdminService`: initialize new coupon as `SYNC_PENDING` before async EB sync.\n- `CouponEligibilityService`: corrected org-mismatch behavior and idempotent no-republish.\n- `CouponRedemptionService`: no-op when cart snapshot has no coupon.\n- `DiscountReconciliationService`: count quantity drift in reconciliation metrics.\n\n### Validation\n- `mvn -pl promotions -am test` passed.\n- Result: **53 passed, 0 failed, 0 skipped**.",
    "phase": "final_answer"
  }
}

{
  "timestamp": "2026-03-04T22:01:55.480Z",
  "type": "event_msg",
  "payload": {
    "type": "task_complete",
    "turn_id": "019cbadf-1217-7f41-a686-0966389ff7a2",
    "last_agent_message": "## PR Summary\n\nImplements FR7 promotions testing and stability alignment for `promotions` module.\n\n### What changed\n- Added complete Stage 8 FR7 test suite (53 tests) across:\n  - `domain` (D1–D8)\n  - `service` (S1–S31)\n  - `api` (A1–A10 via `@WebMvcTest`)\n  - `arch` (AR1–AR4)\n- Added promotions test bootstrap app:\n  - `promotions/src/test/java/com/eventplatform/promotions/PromotionsTestApplication.java`\n- Added test execution report:\n  - `test_result_folder/fr7_coupon_engine_20260305_032816.md`\n\n### Production fixes made during test run\n- `Promotion`: added `isValid`, coupon cascade on `deactivate`, `addCoupon`.\n- `Coupon`: added `canEbDelete`, normalized sync reset behavior.\n- `CouponRepository`: added code-only lookup for eligibility path.\n- `CouponAdminService`: initialize new coupon as `SYNC_PENDING` before async EB sync.\n- `CouponEligibilityService`: corrected org-mismatch behavior and idempotent no-republish.\n- `CouponRedemptionService`: no-op when cart snapshot has no coupon.\n- `DiscountReconciliationService`: count quantity drift in reconciliation metrics.\n\n### Validation\n- `mvn -pl promotions -am test` passed.\n- Result: **53 passed, 0 failed, 0 skipped**."
  }
}
```
